name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Children need to know
body:
Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement.

| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,If you agree that it’s time for Christians to boldly and unashamedly lead our schools and our culture back to our country’s founding values......will you help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow?The Bible tells us that God gave us the rainbow as a symbol of his covenant with the earth:
---
**“I have set my rainbow in the clouds, and it will be the sign of the covenant between me and the earth.” Genesis 9:13**
---
Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement.After all, it was back in 1999 that Bill Clinton first recognized June as “LGBTQ+ Pride Month.” And LGBTQ+ “rainbow” flags now fly year-round in stores, libraries, schools, and the halls of Congress...and even in some churches. **[That’s why I’m hoping you will take just one simple action today to help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow and God’s word.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqs07u8jipvduoeejhpbbau1589qtemql8coa5ig_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c1i69pr6cjh2bs)** With Christianity under attack in America, our nation desperately needs Christians who are willing to stand up and defend our faith.My name is Kirk Cameron.Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Monumental.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me.I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandfather, and a Christian.When I saw the anti-God, anti-family, and anti-America messages the Left was pushing on young parents and children, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.But that’s not all they are doing.BRAVE Books is giving parents, grandparents, and teachers the necessary tools to combat the Left’s hijacking of our children’s hearts and minds in schools, libraries, and elsewhere.And now, because of faithful Americans like you, God’s Word is being heard in the public square once again.Friend, I’m used to receiving hate mail from atheists and radical Left-wing activists who don’t like our faith message.But their responses make me realize just how much the LGBTQ+ community has changed our culture in just one generation.In the past, the gay community largely claimed they just wanted “tolerance.”But now that’s not enough.Today, they want everyone to celebrate and approve of their lifestyle – and they’re accusing those who don’t of “hate speech.” But by not standing up for God’s Word, Christians have allowed the Left’s indoctrination to creep into our churches, schools, and into our nation.And now we’re seeing the terrible effects of our inaction: our young children are being corrupted and led astray from the Faith. Think of all the drag queen story hours being held in public libraries, or the soft porn being promoted as teen reading, or even the classrooms where leftist teachers are sharing their “sexual orientation” and pronouns with kids as young as 5-years-old.More and more people are calling good evil...and evil good (Isaiah 5:20). My heart is heavy when I think of what’s in store for this nation if we don’t protect our children from these demonic influences.Never before has our culture so desperately needed parents and teachers to point our children towards the truth and away from the lies of man.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zab20bgm5i3paf7lctq4m282h57um549pnmtpn08_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c1i69pr6cjh2bs)
---
| That’s exactly why **BRAVE Books** started the “See You at the Library” movement and my children’s TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” -- to boldly, publicly and unashamedly remind Christians and non-believers alike of the truth of God’s Word and the Christian values our country was founded on.
---
| | That’s exactly why **BRAVE Books** started the “See You at the Library” movement and my children’s TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” -- to boldly, publicly and unashamedly remind Christians and non-believers alike of the truth of God’s Word and the Christian values our country was founded on.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z01rummouei4u2j8o8fjdthlcncgp7bus28tumbg_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c1i69pr6cjh2bs)
---
| | Our national “See You at the Library” movement has reached tens of thousands of children in thousands of libraries across the country – including the Library of Congress!At each event, we pray together, say the pledge of allegiance, and read books that instill Godly and patriotic values in our kids.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgn38tpfls8d8dm476qpov59t4sb55mv5mqpjmi0_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c1i69pr6cjh2bs)
---
| | Our national “See You at the Library” movement has reached tens of thousands of children in thousands of libraries across the country – including the Library of Congress!At each event, we pray together, say the pledge of allegiance, and read books that instill Godly and patriotic values in our kids.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbq5c1l7u80i863a97b9hvc6udqhva8s4qh1c4lg_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c1i69pr6cjh2bs)
---
| | Just the thing we need to counteract the evil “Drag Queen Story Hours” and every other leftist lie.And with our TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” we are reaching hundreds of thousands of families with timeless Christian values.Giving parents and kids an alternative to the filth being shown on screens today. As you can imagine, secularists despise our mission. They do not want us engaging the culture with biblical truths. And they are doing everything in their power to discredit, shame, and silence us. If you agree that we must introduce thousands of more children to the truth of God’s Word in these troubled times, [**then I would like to invite you to be a part of our life-changing mission here at BRAVE Books.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjhofgcmm7rk2tqq553df1qu0s3j0pb9mf3s67sg_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c1i69pr6cjh2bs) Will you help us teach children Christian virtues and proclaim truth to a hurting world that needs God’s Word more than ever?So many children simply don’t know the truth about God or His love for them. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll help us reach even more families through **BRAVE Books** ’ crucial projects, like our Christmas “Mouse in the House,” a Godly alternative to that secular “elf” game that so many families use, or producing the next season of “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” giving children wholesome content that entertains while building their character. [**Would you prayerfully consider making a gift to BRAVE Books today?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk1vb3ncbebefj554tqt4b5003lvj16qm71v0pfo_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c1i69pr6cjh2bs) America’s public schools are “normalizing” the ungodly agenda of the radical Left by decorating classrooms and hallways with “Gay Pride” rainbows, filling library shelves with LGBTQ+ books, and pushing movies and TV shows that glorify sinful behavior.They’re leading our children away from Christ...and toward an empty, godless and hopeless secular doctrine. But **BRAVE Books** is giving parents and grandparents a way to fight back and teach the next generation that God’s word is GOOD. Thank you for supporting BRAVE Books – and for helping us protect our precious children and grandchildren!
---
| | Sincerely,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znvugvni2ldutenj2qap8a2t87jkuo8nlcsrrb30_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c1i69pr6cjh2bs)
---
Kirk Cameron

Two teenage boys have been arrested for allegedly shooting and killing a 14-year-old and then lighting her body on fire.Danika Troy was reported missing by her mother on Monday, according to Santa Rosa County Sheriff Bob Johnson, who conducted a media briefing on Thursday.'The evidence pointed to them immediately. They took them into custody immediately.'A day later, the girl's badly burned remains were found by a man walking near Kimberly Road in Floridatown.

body:
This is what we’ve warned you about

Friend, we just got hit with the most alarming numbers of the election cycle.

A brand new poll shows Democrats leading Republicans by _**[14 POINTS](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcgididgb5ve241q7te28r5e4nuhpmgb79lqf1bg_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c1h6cpj4c9h2bs)**_ on the generic ballot.

**[It's fueled by Democrats racing to update their voter file and verify as many people as possible.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfqrbnnqlvq8ertcn71q8o88bhpritmb3ulpf498_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c1h6cpj4c9h2bs)**

_They 're running circles around us, Friend._

This is what we've been warning you about. This is why we've begged you to verify your voter profile.

**[Now, the clock's ticking on 2025 and we're at grave risk of starting 2026 14 POINTS BEHIND.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp4o0km8k3q4gri8olg71cirvm5hqc5pd05jiv08_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c1h6cpj4c9h2bs)**

That would be catastrophic for our chances of keeping President Trump's Majority, much less growing it.

**[We know you don't want Chuck Schumer and the Democrats to take back the Senate because of your inaction, right Friend. So please verify your voter profile before it's too late.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvutn0a9aq7f7opb9ihpe73bj8t2ruifs7sagfi8_rp22sh2s8i6eor5c1h6cpj4c9h2bs)**

subject: BREAKING: President Trump's Approval Rating SKYROCKETS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
President Trump's approval rating has surged to an impressive 54%. Do you approve of his job performance?

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,
We've just received word that **_President Trump's approval rating has surged to an impressive 54%_** according to a brand-new InsiderAdvantage poll!

| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012jSmHvu7V8IEpWMKmNMaQpWzQWfscX62J4sSIHt3B-VH-EzhYxY8XkOeKtEmuCeuzXrDy4oUA2aWgUW6DZceDnaD0lM91fvxc_zWN2geUwyxy2HC2ggZktQAOczLYWZAW-NxfPwC-XXVajCDfg4qfZN8P4TQfwWguQ0w__Qt5SJgCh8pVDcEsPUkxBss_tpwjHDR79LPf7zksWa4CVy3ZLZxRg_dTVum54u2gG0tSKw=&c=6ZHj7Ci6oZFB5APTygO9hwy0kBGfbAYt9imRf2M5n7taikjQbHAzyA==&ch=lf9Db40fN5Rr0zf-RGV-BMrurhVazV5FJ9dFghWoLd_0PiNuBKEC7g==)

Peter,
Trisha Calvarese beats Lauren Boebert by 3 points.
If the trends that we saw on Tuesday, and in nearly every election over the past year, continue, this is the headline you'll be reading on November 5th 2026.
Aftyn Behn's performance in TN-7 proves what we've been seeing across the country: Democrats are closing gaps and swinging deep-red districts by double digits.
A 15 point shift like we saw in Tennessee, or a 16 pt swing like the one Democrat Josh Weil accomplished in deep-red FL-06, puts Lauren Boebert's district (which is markedly less red than TN-07 and FL-16) firmly in Democratic hands next year.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012jSmHvu7V8IEpWMKmNMaQpWzQWfscX62J4sSIHt3B-VH-EzhYxY8XkOeKtEmuCeuzXrDy4oUA2aWgUW6DZceDnaD0lM91fvxc_zWN2geUwyxy2HC2ggZktQAOczLYWZAW-NxfPwC-XXVajCDfg4qfZN8P4TQfwWguQ0w__Qt5SJgCh8pVDcEsPUkxBss_tpwjHDR79LPf7zksWa4CVy3ZHyAK0c5LcMp9m5z2Bohc5E=&c=6ZHj7Ci6oZFB5APTygO9hwy0kBGfbAYt9imRf2M5n7taikjQbHAzyA==&ch=lf9Db40fN5Rr0zf-RGV-BMrurhVazV5FJ9dFghWoLd_0PiNuBKEC7g==)
---

Powering Aftyn Behn and Josh Weil's colossal overperformances this year wasn't just disapproval of the administration, it was their politics.
Weil and Behn are economic populists who ran on platforms that included: fighting MAGA tooth and nail with no compromise, universal healthcare, and ending America's blood soaked foreign policy.
The age of running unrepentant former Republicans, right-wing Dems, and corporate funded AIPAC groupies that sell us out at the drop of a hat, is over. Having real values is what it takes to win in the world of 2025 and the voters won't stop telling us this.
If every House district in the country shifted left by the amount that Aftyn and Josh accomplished we would be looking at a blue wave so massive that it would blow 2018's Democratic midterm sweep out of the water.
This is why when Trisha Calvarese, a labor leader and unabashed populist, took on Boebert in 2024 she overperformed VP Harris by 6 points whereas Boebert trailed Trump in every district. She cut the margin in 2024 so dramatically that national observers now see CO-4 as a top-tier pickup opportunity.
[This is our best chance in a generation to flip CO-4 and beat Boebert but we are going to need a tidal wave of grassroots support to beat Boebert and the tens of millions she's raked in from her massive corporate backers. Please can you make a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to help us elect a leader with values, reclaim the House, and defeat Boebert?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012jSmHvu7V8IEpWMKmNMaQpWzQWfscX62J4sSIHt3B-VH-EzhYxY8XkOeKtEmuCeu5MhRRNnf_G3bGm8bWQUpYAWws9PSTyGYWce9VZj-F8-RV11PQlGUFhxjFal6eqvTWbhSoYglWgu-J2uUA7qVZc3pCPmg8tq318xcgQcDb43cmZfInxW3khS4RfEJ4-tjwaBR8R6H2FD0sxFygZ7s9ea2tSKoA5Tb4vO0WNk65RogPVuHH32iXg==&c=6ZHj7Ci6oZFB5APTygO9hwy0kBGfbAYt9imRf2M5n7taikjQbHAzyA==&ch=lf9Db40fN5Rr0zf-RGV-BMrurhVazV5FJ9dFghWoLd_0PiNuBKEC7g==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, Trisha Calvarese beats Lauren Boebert by 3 points. If the trends that we saw on Tuesday, and in nearly every election over the past year, continue, this is the headline you'll be reading on November 5th 2026. Aftyn Behn's performance in TN-7 proves what we've been seeing across the country: Democrats are closing gaps and swinging deep-red districts by double digits. A 15 point shift like we saw in Tennessee, or a 16 pt swing like the one Democrat Josh Weil accomplished in deep-red FL-06, puts Lauren Boebert's district (which is markedly less red than TN-07 and FL-16) firmly in Democratic hands next year. | == Powering Aftyn Behn and Josh Weil's colossal overperformances this year wasn't just disapproval of the administration, it was their politics. Weil and Behn are economic populists who ran on platforms that included: fighting MAGA tooth and nail with no compromise, universal healthcare, and ending America's blood soaked foreign policy. The age of running unrepentant former Republicans, right-wing Dems, and corporate funded AIPAC groupies that sell us out at the drop of a hat, is over. Having real values is what it takes to win in the world of 2025 and the voters won't stop telling us this. If every House district in the country shifted left by the amount that Aftyn and Josh accomplished we would be looking at a blue wave so massive that it would blow 2018's Democratic midterm sweep out of the water. This is why when Trisha Calvarese, a labor leader and unabashed populist, took on Boebert in 2024 she overperformed VP Harris by 6 points whereas Boebert trailed Trump in every district. She cut the margin in 2024 so dramatically that national observers now see CO-4 as a top-tier pickup opportunity. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == 2026's blue wave starts today and it begins with electing real Democrats with real values. | Peter,
The math is ugly.
Republicans aren't trying to win 19 new seats by convincing voters. They are trying to steal 19 new seats by rigging congressional maps.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z1lKpeFikvvFiVAm0LxY8cMWVKaRsUcV7MSS_F9-dnizyCU6H8R1BwF-JxoOmepPnMO5Q9vk8mmQMMCwWEkJYaj5oOkxHZT8d_d7HP_pxxujGNqNjEQRQ_AbgScv0BmKqqOXNGeml3rEsh2WxIxxLU8v02IJwhtZonw_85AoV5MhefRb2jZWq-LhL4iflqfzZA0WwwT8fCZVyBlfMu4sU27cTWnkdrEb&c=O8ysh0_DJCmNh7aqBZBXVtWH12foAV6-6qNnP08I0fmRL_6Lm2C2QQ==&ch=qH1hulfCVEB1baG2wrOL5fDB3TLCtMpzePNyUJE8sb1IpVsAC5-Bvg==)

This is an emergency. If they succeed in hijacking 19 seats, they keep control of the House in 2026 and into the foreseeable future.
Fair Fight Colorado refuses to let them turn our democracy into a rigged system where politicians pick their voters, not the other way around. That's why we are spearheading a ballot measure in Colorado that would help Democrats counter the GOP's election rigging scheme.
This is the fight of our lives and we are giving it with everything we have--but we need you in the trenches with us.
[Will you rush a contribution of $19, the number of seats Democrats could lose, to help us counter MAGA's election rigging scheme?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z1lKpeFikvvFiVAm0LxY8cMWVKaRsUcV7MSS_F9-dnizyCU6H8R1BwF-JxoOmepPM-9H-gt-tK471N_0RocsUB0UFT1H99XYomn1AjPnopMXjqqNBKzH7hfJhHh_ONwYxe2ln60Vfg9ZiA9KhvY5rzYDOFePubUFrzUWQ22RUFMtS8OpiDuW4AggDwg9Ioop9EuOUbBy6a4ci4-PJd33-sTSz9nJYloniWDmIp28z2w=&c=O8ysh0_DJCmNh7aqBZBXVtWH12foAV6-6qNnP08I0fmRL_6Lm2C2QQ==&ch=qH1hulfCVEB1baG2wrOL5fDB3TLCtMpzePNyUJE8sb1IpVsAC5-Bvg==)

---|---
| | |
---
**District 46 Neighbors, **

**In our last update, I shared that the Senate did not plan to convene for mid-decade redistricting. Unfortunately, that has changed.**

Beginning December 8, the Senate will return to the Statehouse to vote on **[mid-decade gerrymandered maps](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ad9c60f16eb46541eefcb62923dd2f931dc1a700b4f679c16ef7cbabfc7e6fea3ff754b1689a4afd2755f683279cf3154564bd9fdec472a2 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.indianahouserepublicans.com/clientuploads/2026/Dec._Session/Draft_CD_2025_Counties__Townships.pdf__;!!FlTQaCg!gkP4x_ZXXt4SF2uwKCgVUc46aPPQlB8YXK9toyig_65sA8iVwD8DPtV_RG2NX4UMK231wjpxPZZGcbq65PBBzIR85KY$") **that would shift Indiana's Congressional makeup from 7 Republicans and 2 Democrats to an all-Republican 9 to 0 delegation. Many explanations have been offered for why redistricting is happening now, but during House debate this week, the reasoning became clear: these maps are about consolidating Republican political power and purely for political performance, not serving Hoosiers.

While Republicans in the House, Senate and Governor's office focus on maps driven by interests in Washington rather than the people of Indiana, I am focused on the needs of Hoosiers.

The Indiana Senate Democratic Caucus enters December with clear priorities: lowering utility costs, making health care more accessible and affordable, expanding access to affordable housing, and increasing child care options for working families. Our work is centered on _you_.

That is why I want to hear directly from you. [Please share ](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ad9c60f16eb465413a3a86655af6d8c2738cc4e9882bff2e75ca1dadea73aaa449ead59854ff39c38ff3e4d5ef312e0a1e946fdeee394880 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.canva.com/design/DAG6dozpRAs/8CldLxwgofRxN7vs-pxX9Q/view?utm_content=DAG6dozpRAs&utm_campaign=designshare&utm_medium=link2&utm_source=uniquelinks&utlId=h4062e9fa71__;!!FlTQaCg!gIG6iEDlbX_uuGtkHAztDfwUVwOzWy2-pPUHnyWE0qwQztdEoZCYLnw4LOp0HzCxHII_52RNlEBaGfwCXRiwa3hRFQ$") how rising costs are affecting your life and your family. Your stories help me bring real Hoosier experiences to the Senate floor and ensure your voice is heard when decisions are made.

We should be convening for constituents, not for Washington D.C. insiders attempting to puppet Indiana from the top down.

**I hope you will take a moment to share your story with me, so I can best represent you and our community during session.**
---
| | [Share Your Story ](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ad9c60f16eb465414d4a2d0050bda2ad9d1f774a1917c85d9f6fe0bc04acc000ccae40f977099b27e77774fbbd246c9c0a25138fd01381d4)

**The Gerrymandered Map Will be in the State Senate on Monday**
**See the handout above for a quick breakdown of redistricting and what it means for our community. **

Scan the QR code to sign the Common Cause Petition for fair maps in our state.
* * *
---
|
---
## Your Voice Is Needed at the Statehouse
The **[Senate Elections Committee](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ad9c60f16eb46541cef2f09621555182f6369d63318964d44b8d5e137b7711910605665c4036cb78947275972f90b51dc137467a8ec34160 "https://iga.in.gov/2026/committees/senate/elections")** will meet on December 8 from 1:30 to 5:30 p.m. at the Indiana Statehouse to take public testimony on **[proposed congressional maps](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ad9c60f16eb46541eefcb62923dd2f931dc1a700b4f679c16ef7cbabfc7e6fea3ff754b1689a4afd2755f683279cf3154564bd9fdec472a2 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.indianahouserepublicans.com/clientuploads/2026/Dec._Session/Draft_CD_2025_Counties__Townships.pdf__;!!FlTQaCg!gkP4x_ZXXt4SF2uwKCgVUc46aPPQlB8YXK9toyig_65sA8iVwD8DPtV_RG2NX4UMK231wjpxPZZGcbq65PBBzIR85KY$")** that could shape our representation for the next decade. Testimony sign-ups begin at 8:30 a.m. outside the Senate Chamber. Space may be limited, so arriving early is your best chance to be heard. **If you believe voters should pick their leaders and not the other way around, this is your opportunity.**

Bring your story, your concerns and your Hoosier commitment to fairness. Your voice belongs in this process.
* * *
---
---
**Recommendations for the future of public schools in Indianapolis have been revealed

Swipe to learn about ILEA, the proposed plan and what you can do to take action.**
* * *
** **

### Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Program
The Energy Assistance Program's (EAP) application is now live until April 20, 2026. You can apply [online](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ad9c60f16eb465419a2d87b2b6ffa2cd369d0822e689d48f92cb29db6106a90a952c332a5aacd50c86b7a834a66eecc41a84d46d26d5e748 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.in.gov/ihcda/homeowners-and-renters/low-income-home-energy-assistance-program-liheap/__;!!FlTQaCg!i0IlNmwztWy24u3OfjflEyvBopYLxqtX54ZBOGpkRIGHfA-g0F4tvn2RkRjwIClxVywwPaZ8QxM8BqUkhHdM0-IFVw$"), by mail or in person. To apply in person or request a paper application form, applicants must contact their local service provider (LSP). For more information on which LSP serves an area, be sure to check the map available on Indiana's [LIHEAP site](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ad9c60f16eb465419a2d87b2b6ffa2cd369d0822e689d48f92cb29db6106a90a952c332a5aacd50c86b7a834a66eecc41a84d46d26d5e748 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.in.gov/ihcda/homeowners-and-renters/low-income-home-energy-assistance-program-liheap/__;!!FlTQaCg!i0IlNmwztWy24u3OfjflEyvBopYLxqtX54ZBOGpkRIGHfA-g0F4tvn2RkRjwIClxVywwPaZ8QxM8BqUkhHdM0-IFVw$").

In addition to this program, Indiana's utilities have financial assistance programs available, as well as other tools that can help customers manage their bills. You can find _[AES's program here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ad9c60f16eb46541dc1616c30bff5d33cc5ce3b8ee2407c9f93405eb121254609d1367f6ac78b063c81ffc80033946d111ce50950a13f0c3 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.aesindiana.com/payment-assistance__;!!FlTQaCg!jwpfitqHKx4bP-5cnhYvoAX1m8Q0kv3P901-pv7dMHXQdpRgas_bRhhF66AOaSuHe8tMuc2p6moGi_XjArAanOEmX3Q$") [.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=ad9c60f16eb46541abe93c29fa93909729fb2a22d3f5ffd2bb739661455f5937a475322d434a8cb624c9b06f36411bd0809b4714a377a36e "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.nipsco.com/bills-and-payments/financial-support__;!!FlTQaCg!i0IlNmwztWy24u3OfjflEyvBopYLxqtX54ZBOGpkRIGHfA-g0F4tvn2RkRjwIClxVywwPaZ8QxM8BqUkhHfV2_ol6Q$")_

As a reminder, the winter moratorium runs from December 1 through March 15 and prevents disconnection of residential energy utility service to any customer who is eligible for and has applied for the Energy Assistance Program. Moratorium protection applies once a household submits an application and allows the Local Service Provider time to determine eligibility.

Utility bills continue to rise, and what should be an essential service has become an overwhelming burden for many families. If you're eligible, please take advantage of the available resources so you don't have to choose between keeping food on the table and keeping the lights on.

## This isn't over--there is still time to make your voice heard.
Though the maps passed the House yesterday afternoon, the bill still needs to pass through the Senate.

Don't stop calling. Don't stop sharing information. Don't stop showing up.

**This is the home stretch, and it will take all of us. **

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | | | District 46 Neighbors, In our last update, I shared that the Senate did not plan to convene for mid-decade redistricting. Unfortunately, that has changed. Beginning December 8, the Senate will return to the Statehouse to vote on "$" that would shift Indiana's Congressional makeup from 7 Republicans and 2 Democrats to an all-Republican 9 to 0 delegation. Many explanations have been offered for why redistricting is happening now, but during House debate this week, the reasoning became clear: these maps are about consolidating Republican political power and purely for political performance, not serving Hoosiers. While Republicans in the House, Senate and Governor's office focus on maps driven by interests in Washington rather than the people of Indiana, I am focused on the needs of Hoosiers. The Indiana Senate Democratic Caucus enters December with clear priorities: lowering utility costs, making health care more accessible and affordable, expanding access to affordable housing, and increasing child care options for working families. Our work is centered on you. That is why I want to hear directly from you. "$" how rising costs are affecting your life and your family. Your stories help me bring real Hoosier experiences to the Senate floor and ensure your voice is heard when decisions are made. We should be convening for constituents, not for Washington D.C. insiders attempting to puppet Indiana from the top down. I hope you will take a moment to share your story with me, so I can best represent you and our community during session. | | | The Gerrymandered Map Will be in the State Senate on Monday See the handout above for a quick breakdown of redistricting and what it means for our community. Scan the QR code to sign the Common Cause Petition for fair maps in our state. | Your Voice Is Needed at the Statehouse The "" will meet on December 8 from 1:30 to 5:30 p.m. at the Indiana Statehouse to take public testimony on "$" that could shape our representation for the next decade. Testimony sign-ups begin at 8:30 a.m. outside the Senate Chamber. Space may be limited, so arriving early is your best chance to be heard. If you believe voters should pick their leaders and not the other way around, this is your opportunity. Bring your story, your concerns and your Hoosier commitment to fairness. Your voice belongs in this process. Recommendations for the future of public schools in Indianapolis have been revealed Swipe to learn about ILEA, the proposed plan and what you can do to take action. | Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Program The Energy Assistance Program's (EAP) application is now live until April 20, 2026. You can apply "$", by mail or in person. To apply in person or request a paper application form, applicants must contact their local service provider (LSP). For more information on which LSP serves an area, be sure to check the map available on Indiana's "$". In addition to this program, Indiana's utilities have financial assistance programs available, as well as other tools that can help customers manage their bills. You can find "$" "$" As a reminder, the winter moratorium runs from December 1 through March 15 and prevents disconnection of residential energy utility service to any customer who is eligible for and has applied for the Energy Assistance Program. Moratorium protection applies once a household submits an application and allows the Local Service Provider time to determine eligibility. Utility bills continue to rise, and what should be an essential service has become an overwhelming burden for many families. If you're eligible, please take advantage of the available resources so you don't have to choose between keeping food on the table and keeping the lights on. | | | | | I am happy to share that I have filed the first two of my seven bills I will be authoring for the 2026 Legislative Session. Swipe through the carousel above for a brief overview of these bills and use the links below for more details! ⬇️ "SB 60 - Advanced Practice Registered Nurses" "SB 72 - Coverage of Orthotic and Prosthetic Devices \(Every BODY Can Move\") I am looking forward to the opportunity to share updates on more legislation I am carrying to help create an Indiana that works for all of us. This isn't over--there is still time to make your voice heard. Though the maps passed the House yesterday afternoon, the bill still needs to pass through the Senate. Don't stop calling. Don't stop sharing information. Don't stop showing up. This is the home stretch, and it will take all of us. | | | News Around Our State | | | "$" "How redistricting could split Woodruff Place neighborhood" "$" "$" COMMUNITY RESOURCES To view my community resources guide, "click here. " | | | | | | | | | Created and distributed by the Indiana Senate Democratic Communications office mailto:Nancy.Singh@iga.in.gov mailto:Chester.Bryant@iga.in.gov mailto:Molly.Neary@iga.in.gov ---|---|--- | This email was sent by: Indiana General Assembly** 200 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN, 46204, US

name: blowback
subject: Illegal wars, death squads, and CIA child soldiers
body:
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fiT2opLYuZ7DMG8CZJlEhJmvTdsU9aYtGCa8iAVCvulttLYnxcmp_QsrozXe0G39tY9vZ0C_GLjamk7z-N9eR_sb8fRO7IY4pVywJYtsHl5KoQ0CB45U_IfRerxSlwQjQnhW8eXt4ADRFKm2yWB5QUF7N-SV7lyhz2UM3rXd6JuJ6YNiQDW93Il0EubRNyTw2Gr00oi00HSAwmCgqJap4-yiVDk57wWA&c=V0wlaacrFFc96f-a_oNrEmHWwF005jqB230NjSFwBpX8DOhhWVlARQ==&ch=Lg_JhRJ0BMXYey26HJXWc33IS9mijlAT0sacsXxhogfV7D-aigScXA==)
---
|
Peter,
We have spent decades being told that secret wars and covert operations keep America safe. We were told that what happens overseas stays overseas.
We are now seeing the horrifying proof that this is a lie.
By now you know about the "double-tap" strike ordered by Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth in early September. You know that he reportedly ordered our military to bomb a boat, wait for survivors to surface, and then bomb them again.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fiT2opLYuZ7DMG8CZJlEhJmvTdsU9aYtGCa8iAVCvulttLYnxcmp_QsrozXe0G39tY9vZ0C_GLjamk7z-N9eR_sb8fRO7IY4pVywJYtsHl5KoQ0CB45U_IfRerxSlwQjQnhW8eXt4ADRFKm2yWB5QUF7N-SV7lyhz2UM3rXd6JuJ6YNiQDW93Il0EubRNyTw2Gr00oi00HTYkkDZtM5ETFf-Nc3yLJkH&c=V0wlaacrFFc96f-a_oNrEmHWwF005jqB230NjSFwBpX8DOhhWVlARQ==&ch=Lg_JhRJ0BMXYey26HJXWc33IS9mijlAT0sacsXxhogfV7D-aigScXA==)
---
|
This is not defense. It is a war crime. It is the kind of lawless brutality that breeds generational hatred.
And just days ago, we saw that hatred come home to our capital when two National Guard members were shot in Washington, D.C. by an Afghan soldier who had been resettled in America.
This was not a random act. The shooter, Rahmanullah Lakanwal, was a member of a CIA-backed "Zero Unit" death squad in Afghanistan. Recruited by the CIA at age 15. He was trained by our government to commit extrajudicial killings which included frequent massacres of children at religious schools that US and Afghan authorities feared the Taliban would recruit from.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fiT2opLYuZ7DMG8CZJlEhJmvTdsU9aYtGCa8iAVCvulttLYnxcmp_QsrozXe0G39tY9vZ0C_GLjamk7z-N9eR_sb8fRO7IY4pVywJYtsHl5KoQ0CB45U_IfRerxSlwQjQnhW8eXt4ADRFKm2yWB5QUF7N-SV7lyhz2UM3rXd6JuJ6YNiQDW93Il0EubRNyTw2Gr00oi00HT_gWZYgZVtOBXJpKklxZqs&c=V0wlaacrFFc96f-a_oNrEmHWwF005jqB230NjSFwBpX8DOhhWVlARQ==&ch=Lg_JhRJ0BMXYey26HJXWc33IS9mijlAT0sacsXxhogfV7D-aigScXA==)
---
|
We created him. We trained him in violence, used him for our dirty wars, and then acted surprised when he brought that violence here. This is the price of "forever wars" that Congress refuses to end.
While Trump and Hegseth are busy ordering illegal strikes and bypassing Congress to provoke a regime-change war in Venezuela, we are paying the price for the last twenty years of unchecked militarism at home.
The Constitution is clear: Only Congress has the power to declare war.
We cannot continue to let the Executive Branch run private wars, train secret armies, and commit war crimes in our name. We need to reign in these powers before the next "Zero Unit" tragedy happens--and before Hegseth's illegal orders drag us into a new catastrophe.
I will fight to do exactly that as the next representative for IL-9. [Will you help us send a message that we are done with illegal wars and the violence they bring home, by chipping in $50, $25, or whatever you can spare?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fiT2opLYuZ7DMG8CZJlEhJmvTdsU9aYtGCa8iAVCvulttLYnxcmp_QsrozXe0G399TwAevskn9NRgypsGdgy8odkWtPRdhyCZyDJsWYR2VqdMzz1VwW2Gm7KUnXX23sqbsnof5bFbNVW98tWQ9jksVuB-19DkRXvqvIMo9ukNZqvW-AGAQzrhTAxhG9day527ZDRhEnMWLqmjYDU7gunJ7nrFPzg9PHLg-CUrkIZ0hg=&c=V0wlaacrFFc96f-a_oNrEmHWwF005jqB230NjSFwBpX8DOhhWVlARQ==&ch=Lg_JhRJ0BMXYey26HJXWc33IS9mijlAT0sacsXxhogfV7D-aigScXA==)

The Constitution is clear: Only Congress has the power to declare war. We cannot continue to let the Executive Branch run private wars, train secret armies, and commit war crimes in our name. We need to reign in these powers before the next "Zero Unit" tragedy happens--and before Hegseth's illegal orders drag us into a new catastrophe. I will fight to do exactly that as the next representative for IL-9. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | We can build a future based on diplomacy and law, or we can continue down this path of endless violence. The choice is ours. In solidarity, | | == | Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-09 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 12.5.2025
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-alytdkd-didthutlhu-e/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot,As temperatures have dropped across Wisconsin, the 2026 elections have begun to heat up! With new candidates joining the race for Governor, and nomination papers for local races and the race for Supreme Court circulating, it is crucial to get involved TODAY! The best way to get the message out about the Democrats' far-left candidates and their agenda, and support local candidates, is to get involved with your local party [HERE](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-y/). We have also attached a list of [events](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-j/) across Wisconsin this month - go check them out and help us win big in 2026!-Team WisGOP **Barnes Jumps Into the Democratic Primary** Mandela Barnes, who you likely know from his failed attempt to unseat Senator Ron Johnson in 2022, is back and running for Governor. He joins half a dozen other candidates in the crowded Democratic field. His last campaign already put his far-left policies on full display, such as...
* Supporting the economic disaster "Green New Deal" and other socialist fantasies like Medicare for All.
* Pushing to eliminate cash bail, wearing an "Abolish ICE" shirt, and flirting with the idea of defunding the police.
* Said on [X](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-t/) that "I really could not care less about a 2nd Amendment right."

Wisconsin voters already rejected Barnes and his radical agenda in 2022. We cannot let him win the highest office in our state in 2026.**Chris Taylor Exposed** State Supreme Court candidate Chris Taylor has been exposed for a [letter of recommendation](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-i/) she wrote for another Democrat judge, Lena Taylor, for her "continued advocacy" for liberal causes, admitting that ideological activism is a priority for her. If Chris Taylor sees that it is a good quality in a judge, then she will strive to be an activist judge on Wisconsin's Supreme Court instead of upholding judicial impartiality.
* In the same letter, Chris Taylor says that partisan advocacy "is needed now more than ever...in the judiciary."
* Wisconsin's Supreme Court chooses which cases it hears, so Taylor and her liberal colleagues would be able to pick and choose cases that help advance their agenda.
* If Chris Taylor thinks outspoken activists like Lena Taylor are exactly what Wisconsin courts need, imagine the extreme left-wing activist she would be as a Supreme Court justice.

**Upcoming Republican Events** Engage with your local Republican Party by attending one or many of the events listed below! Visit [wisgop.org/events/](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-d/) for more information and a complete list of Republican meetings and events across Wisconsin!

**12/6: Monroe Conservative Breakfast Club
12/6: Eau Claire County Member Meeting
12/6: Jackson County Member Meeting
12/6: Trempealeau County Farm Team Training
12/6: Juneau County Farm Team Training
12/7: St. Croix County Bags/Cornhole Tournament
12/7: Portage Regional Farm Team Training
12/7: La Crosse Regional Farm Team Training

12/9: Portage County Member Meeting

12/11: Rusk County Member Meeting

12/11: Milwaukee County Holiday Open House
12/12: St. Croix County Christmas Party
12/12: Winnebago County Christmas Party
12/13: WisGOP Coalitions Christmas Party at MKE Hispanic Office
12/13: Portage County Farm Team Meeting
12/13: Trempealeau County Chili Fundraiser
12/15: Racine County GOP Christmas Party
12/15: Kenosha County Pints and Politics
12/15: Marathon County Member Meeting
12/16: Shawano County Member Meeting
12/16: La Crosse County Member Meeting
12/16: UW La Crosse CR Meeting
12/18: Green County Christmas Party
12/20: Monroe County Conservative Breakfast Meeting** **Take Action!****We need Letter to the Editor Signers!**
Become a Letter to the Editor (LTE) signer and help get the Republican message out to every community across the state. LTE volunteers are critical to continuing to advance our Republican values. Our goal is to have groups in every county who submit LTEs regularly. These groups will have resources provided from our team, including talking points, draft LTEs, and submission instructions. If you have any questions, please reach out to our Communications Director, Anika Rickard, at [arickard@wisgop.org](mailto:arickard@wisgop.org). [BECOME A LTE SIGNER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-h/) **Become a Poll Observer!**
Missed the poll worker deadline? Don't worry, there's still time to become a poll observer. Sign up below! [BECOME A POLL OBSERVER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-k/)
# **Worth the Read**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-u/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-o/)
# **Top Shareable Content**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-b/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-n/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-a/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-f/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-z/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-alytdkd-didthutlhu-v/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-alytdkd-didthutlhu-g/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-alytdkd-didthutlhu-w/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-alytdkd-l-yd)

| FBI Warning: U.S. Water Systems Are Under Attack | **SHOCKING REPORT:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. WATER SUPPLY** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=3bc70ee6951a0870938b8d7a8d2ce6e682c73d8ca7cf539be732a23751dd6c5b6342961fe8d79808e210e9bbca3c5df77fe0fe112af625f0a68075a8066e5343) **FBI's Urgent Warning Sounds the Alarm** America's enemies have found a way to strike without firing a single shot. Hackers are attacking city water systems, overriding safety protocols to weaponize our utilities against us and positioning themselves to strike when the signal comes. National security experts warn China isn't alone. Iran, Russia and North Korea are preparing coordinated attacks. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems we trust to keep us safe. **Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link.** Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... _**But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.**_ If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like...
* **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.**
* If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water.
* **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.**
* Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out.
* **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.**
* Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it.

Well we have great news to share! Folks have been calling... Folks have been emailing... Folks have been leaving Facebook messages asking about our just-released... **NEW AND IMPROVED...** [**NEW Ultra-Fast MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=3bc70ee6951a0870938b8d7a8d2ce6e682c73d8ca7cf539be732a23751dd6c5b6342961fe8d79808e210e9bbca3c5df77fe0fe112af625f0a68075a8066e5343) **5X Faster Flow Rate for Perfect, Delicious Drinking Water** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=3bc70ee6951a0870938b8d7a8d2ce6e682c73d8ca7cf539be732a23751dd6c5b6342961fe8d79808e210e9bbca3c5df77fe0fe112af625f0a68075a8066e5343) **But hurry - we have limited stock, and this MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System is first-come first-served. We only have a small number of units to go around.** Order today you'll also get a FREE Bonus Package with 7 FREE Gifts worth $263.75!
* **FREE Gift #1:** FREE Aqua-Tote Collapsible Water Container ($16.95 Value)
* **FREE Gift #2:** FREE Personal Water Filter Straw ($24.95 Value)
* **FREE Gift #3:** FREE "Water Solutions" Online Class ($149.00 Value)
* **FREE Gift #4:** FREE Water Survival Digital Guide ($9.95 Value)
* **FREE Gift #5:** FREE "What's in your Tap Water" Digital Guide ($9.95 Value)
* **FREE Gift #6:** $25.00 Savings Certificate
* **FREE Gift #7:** FREE Shipping and Handling

[**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=3bc70ee6951a0870938b8d7a8d2ce6e682c73d8ca7cf539be732a23751dd6c5b6342961fe8d79808e210e9bbca3c5df77fe0fe112af625f0a68075a8066e5343) The best part is... _**This advanced filtration technology filters the nastiest, filthiest, bacteria-riddled and parasite infested water using no chemicals, no electricity and no moving parts!**_ It's powered by the same technology that the U.S. Military and NASA trust to filter their water. But now available for you in your home. You're among the first to get access to these advanced, carbon-block water filters designed to filter water on your countertop at a sub-micron level without power or water hookup. **So you can reduce...** Harmful Bacteria - up to 99.9999%
Life-Threatening Viruses - up to 99.99%
Disease-Carrying Cysts - up to 99.9% Plus, this table-top unit targets 200+ dangerous contaminants from your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, arsenic, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, VOCs and more. All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in their homes. [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=3bc70ee6951a0870938b8d7a8d2ce6e682c73d8ca7cf539be732a23751dd6c5b6342961fe8d79808e210e9bbca3c5df77fe0fe112af625f0a68075a8066e5343) **The NEW & improved Filtration System may look the same...** But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. They're MORE reliable and easier to replace, too. So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family. **But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while.** In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually. [**Now we've just got a fresh batch in.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=3bc70ee6951a0870938b8d7a8d2ce6e682c73d8ca7cf539be732a23751dd6c5b6342961fe8d79808e210e9bbca3c5df77fe0fe112af625f0a68075a8066e5343) And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out. **And YES there's an interest-FREE payment plan!** Yes, right now, you can get your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System on a convenient, no-credit-check, interest-FREE payment plan. We know you're good for it. You'll have the **peace of mind** knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come. [**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=3bc70ee6951a0870938b8d7a8d2ce6e682c73d8ca7cf539be732a23751dd6c5b6342961fe8d79808e210e9bbca3c5df77fe0fe112af625f0a68075a8066e5343) To your survival, Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Derrick loves the convenience of his MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System: _"It was so easy to install. Within minutes we had water that tasted so good, we couldn't believe it. We don't like the chlorine in tap water and we got tired of lugging around cases of bottled water."_ **Customers Love Their Ultimate
Water Filtration System!** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=3bc70ee6951a0870938b8d7a8d2ce6e682c73d8ca7cf539be732a23751dd6c5b6342961fe8d79808e210e9bbca3c5df77fe0fe112af625f0a68075a8066e5343) **_Cyndi L._**_
"No question... beats the competition. After reviewing several other companies and seeing that I was not the only one thinking this way, as everyone was sold out of products, I decided to go with 4Patriots. They seem to be good people who are very helpful and their products seemed above average to others."_ _**Michael B.**
"Saves me a ton of money and grocery-store headaches. During the pandemic, water wasn't always available. Not so with the Purifier. We love it and I have 5 gallons of water on hand all the time."_ _**Faith P.**
"Water you can actually trust. This is so much better than storing gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make existing, natural water sources drinkable. I feel really good knowing that in an emergency situation, we'd be able to filter our water."_ _**Carol B.**
"Stop worrying about what's in the water! We use our system for drinking and cooking but you can use it almost anywhere. It's easy to use and it doesn't take long to filter. The water tastes pure and delicious."_ _**Rick O.**
"Easiest way to upgrade your drinking water. We chose this one because it handles everything and it's affordable. You never know when things will go out on you."_ _**Thomas P.**
"Finally, I don't have to keep refilling my pitcher all day. I'm very happy with my water filter. Not only does our water now taste good (it tasted dirty from the tap) but the large capacity tank means I'm not refilling small pitchers repeatedly during the day."_ [**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=3bc70ee6951a0870938b8d7a8d2ce6e682c73d8ca7cf539be732a23751dd6c5b6342961fe8d79808e210e9bbca3c5df77fe0fe112af625f0a68075a8066e5343)

And YES there's an interest-FREE payment plan! Yes, right now, you can get your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System on a convenient, no-credit-check, interest-FREE payment plan. We know you're good for it. You'll have the peace of mind knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Derrick loves the convenience of his MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System: "It was so easy to install. Within minutes we had water that tasted so good, we couldn't believe it. We don't like the chlorine in tap water and we got tired of lugging around cases of bottled water." Customers Love Their Ultimate Water Filtration System! Cyndi L. "No question... beats the competition. After reviewing several other companies and seeing that I was not the only one thinking this way, as everyone was sold out of products, I decided to go with 4Patriots. They seem to be good people who are very helpful and their products seemed above average to others." Michael B. "Saves me a ton of money and grocery-store headaches. During the pandemic, water wasn't always available. Not so with the Purifier. We love it and I have 5 gallons of water on hand all the time." Faith P. "Water you can actually trust. This is so much better than storing gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make existing, natural water sources drinkable. I feel really good knowing that in an emergency situation, we'd be able to filter our water." Carol B. "Stop worrying about what's in the water! We use our system for drinking and cooking but you can use it almost anywhere. It's easy to use and it doesn't take long to filter. The water tastes pure and delicious." Rick O. "Easiest way to upgrade your drinking water. We chose this one because it handles everything and it's affordable. You never know when things will go out on you." Thomas P. "Finally, I don't have to keep refilling my pitcher all day. I'm very happy with my water filter. Not only does our water now taste good (it tasted dirty from the tap) but the large capacity tank means I'm not refilling small pitchers repeatedly during the day."

# Saturday, December 6, 2025

**Good morning!** On this day in 1884, work was completed on [the Washington Monument](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9yhCAYBPCn0Q4HEFELijR2lzalg_BxkvDHge_O-PaZy-QNUv9md2f247betA8-3d91BIUurwnOGgARylofR4EIJj8K5q-K8K1r1EfJK6d8IIwTKlerfbhW0VrlADj0LSg2yoGymfOp3RXdRrtZuYGZh3kyYrCMuWkWm-vdNBjWevVqY5xKxuhIh06IXo5WCmccg95ujaBgPebSfWafcAcXrvyE0pkc26B2xKM2_VvDl4Yv53l2u6-Yy_Xyhi-4-0qsvohP5E8avlgwEDcoRL5Cuu4-3TEnEnN6REhITI5HAATbFmWP04fgqxwbQe9R-_C7jf867Kn4TwAAAP__atmC3g) when workers placed a 9-inch aluminum pyramid inscribed with "Laus Deo," meaning "praise (be) to God," atop the 555-foot white marble tower.

We've started receiving Christmas letters from friends telling about their year, and wondered how many people still do that. Let us know what you think in our _Poll_ below.

## Supreme Court OKs Texas Redistricting
The Supreme Court on Thursday ruled that Texas could [use a new congressional district map](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LEO2yAQBuCnwRsWHDbEA0MXb-na0cLmcGgwWEBC8_aVo75BtxtOv_7v_3Vf7sYHH_ef5kBdXVoithKwVsxLeZ0ZD9zSK9f0LBX_mHKYM6cFGIyUA2VyscaHzzJ0VjtEQNGh5kqOjE8At-6hYVKrk8xNKAUbrZvWGygmb8IJJY1aO6-vNA5Mcs4UG_thEFJZObjNcRR2JQND62vK_e_kY32gC5_0xtxv6eiCftR6FiJ-EJgJzK21Pq5bxPZJ-Xm9EJgvE4H5TMFXv13nPxr92qgJIbVCv0BaE30VpBEb3dNJtxT3jKX4FE2g1pea_VbpYU4CsxxAcjERmLus7dl8CL5IRQa2H8aHb8P6X7O-NfwNAAD__8bhjtk) that could add up to five GOP seats in Congress in next year's midterm election. By an apparent 6-3 vote, with the three liberal justices dissenting, the court [granted an emergency request](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0EGq3DAMBuDTODsPtuxxpgsvppQsCq-FttBlcGIlcZ8TGduZdG5fMvQGbyOEBELf__utf3Mhhm3-5la0daJ-w6NErBVzX_aUccWR9lzpvVT868rqUqYeBFy5BC5M712Iz1433k6IgKpBK1tzFfITwK1ZLJpxVK0Syg1G3aAdtJi09mqCwd-uN2iCPa9JEEZK0YrrRWtlWm_0NE4SlR-YFuhDpXz5Q2GrC07xSQ_Ml5HWJtql1lSYujPoGHTHcVzWsp07Bh1ufC8MuhPFoEsUQw3j2f638ReOz-GBhb-AnN55Jb4X5AuddXWJ--yO7RwPRKXymRKDzmV-v8sfX7_HX0x1NAbP1JfPZ5Z4lJ-YU5OtT0eIMRTTMi3m1YX4-rp-KOqHhX8BAAD__4RulUQ) from Texas officials to block a lower court ruling ordering the state to return to the district lines adopted in 2021. The unsigned order said that Texas is "likely to succeed on the merits of its claim," including that the lower court "failed to honor the presumption of legislative good faith" when assessing the state legislature's motives. The high court’s ruling also noted recent Democrat-led redistricting in California as well in a signal that the court might avoid interfering with efforts in other states as well.
## Netflix to Buy HBO, Warner Bros. Films
Netflix agreed to buy Warner Bros. Discovery’s [film studio and HBO Max](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuxCAQRL_G7rBgjbFTUKRxd2lTWmCWMwkGC_Bx9_eR7xdSrHakJ81o5vu23JTzLty_1I6y2LgErNljKZiWfB4Jd1zjmUr8zQWfKu_qSHEBCgNhQKhYjHL-tfDWSIsI2Lco2SgGyj4ApnaTql8nYINW2F9n-aiYAAA99YYZC62TlxsDKhijIx06znsxGsHtahn2RjeconElpu4nulA2tP4VH5i6Ne6tl1spR276zwbmBuZaa7fqfLW4eAPzJd-vWO-eRJ8vF-6kqhQwEZ1iJhOQkWjnvYuBHGdaN5WRBOufpOoG5jZJc9SLZzE2nN535fw7vfxrsoeEvwAAAP__3Q6CYw), ending a bidding war for the entertainment giant that included Paramount Skydance and Comcast. The companies said the cash-and-stock deal is valued at $72 billion in equity value, and [an estimated $82.7 billion enterprise](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL-ynCAUxp8GO3fggGAKijR0N21KB-W4S4LgwHFd3z5jXuF2X_H9m9_vr-nLxxTz85ff0NJapoxnS0iEdWrHXnHDpRyVyt9G-PFt83stE3AYegE911PwMV2T6oJdEQFlh1YYPXDxA2DsXhbDoAcQo9dqlHL0Mx-VVGaRyIMCOXTR3m0CuBaCGz48lJLaBK3WZRUow8wUxxCp1MefEjO9cE1XeWN9LGXrkn0R7Y3JnwwcA3ee5-Nonkrw121g4BqVejFwmAkr-Zg3zMTA0ZuBu7cZOAEMHL9VRlpT_PRU-vm4-tPXjLWfa2k9fvbkY8bAwI1G31HDuWHgumrDfsaUYtOGKf7cfEz__9G3oL4t_AsAAP__sXiJaQ) value overall. The sale excludes Warner Bros.’ cable TV holdings and Discovery Global, which includes Discovery Networks, CNN, TNT, and other channels. Friday’s [announcement drew apprehension](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFvgzAQBeBfYzbQ-QCTDB66sKVrR2Tsc3BrY2QuIfn3Ff0L3Z70pO9J7-s23UyIYb1_mkSafZ5WOvZIzFSm_bEVSmTzo3D-2ZleZk9mK3lCwL6WWIOanAnxPXWV054Iqa1Iy0H1IK-Il2rRcLWza-2MPQASzJ0fBmWlutiruRhUVdCnJhGUlDBA33RdqwanOm-9pNbNogNygXNpvnNYeSEf3_lJpbE5VVEvzNsu2g-Bo8DxOI7GrrM9S4HjSQscJQoc4UxcHmmrV2Ifw6s-Zlc7MrFZOMWqaLcdIcawq0F0cE8mxL8R_tczT42_AQAA___33na6) on antitrust growing from Republicans and Democrats, with the Trump administration reporting “heavy skepticism.” Movie theater owners also protested over fears that Netflix [could overturn conventional theatrical distribution](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOhCAYBOCnwQ4Dv4puQXGN3V57pUH5WblDMPC77r79xXuF6yaZ5Mtkvu7T3fjg4-PTbKjJpSniWQISYZ7KsWfccElHpvRTCF-mbGbPaQIBHZfAhZqs8eE9tZXVDhGwqVDLXnVC3gCGatWiE6hm5Zph6aWZh3643aAbGge9mAUOldeXJkEoKUUvurptG9Vb1brFSWzszFqB1lPK9XfykVZ04Z2emOslbVXQK9FeWPPBYGQwnudZL3FerpLBeNEMRgkMRnGliOSCf_HT5IiZzzkVbtEETisawsx9tEeh_ObHvqJ5mlCvtIUqa7ufPgRfVM9a8diMD38D6F-vPTX8BgAA__9su4Fe), with an eye toward moving films toward streaming instead of into movie houses.
## Football Titles On the Line
Four major college football titles are [up for grabs today](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGTpCAUhH-NZs8CVJwLCC4xm0svtBAeyoliwXO4-fdbTrzZxt3V3V__fU5P7YM_lj96R0UuTgeWHJAI05SvM-GOJl6J4pYJ_-u86zPFSTDRAxfA5GS1D--pq61yiALbGhUfZM_4LyEe9apwHgbbPSRncn5wLXCYUfbcSmlMz6SuvbrTuGCSczawvum6Vg5Wds44jq2dq46h9RRT8y_6g1Z04R1fmBoT9zqolejMVfu7EmMlxlJKY-acz5go345KjCaGgAuCi5FmHUIlxpvyGwWyWdFeAWHRO2b4cJZVE1CEosms4A8oiBvwHugFZtXHgSFD1nQlq9-webNF54D8jndFnZQ9iw_BZzlUHVt27cNnOv3o75cSXwEAAP__ZqSYVQ) in games that will determine the champions of the SEC, Big Ten, ACC, and Big 12 conferences. In Indianapolis, No. 1 Ohio State will face No. 2 Indiana for the [Big Ten title](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFyhCAUANDTYLfO54soBUUau02b0mHloyQoDvzdzd4-k1whF3gz7-M6X11M8Vjf3U6WQ54PetZEzFTmej8L7bTke-H8VZm-Xd3dWfKMgP1F4gX07F1Mr1k13gYipK4hKwfdgzSIY7PZJQQDvRkNOYc49LcxDHp0ZlFK6s5AE-2vJhG0lDBA3yrV6cFrFZYgqfM3oYB85FzazxwP3iikV35QaZe8N8luzGcV3ZvASeB0iyvT0eayCpxc4bgkEjj1BhQInJpi_fmMKcWqB6Fg3V1MfxD_a_-w-BMAAP__s6xtHw), pitting the last two unbeaten college teams against each other. In the SEC, No. 9 Alabama sits on the playoff bubble with a [chance to beat No. 3 Georgia](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkbvO3DoMhJ9G7rSQ6Hvh4jTu_tOmNLgSbSu_bpC46-zbB04eIRWBDyRnBvPja_tC5108_sdAC-9pi3RVT8xUtvrKhQKZ9CqcvivTL6wBc0kbKOilBqmGzaLzn61r7LITAbUNLXoceqVngKk5l9n2sx21mu08tZManr0aNOnhafoeCafGLfc3DWrQWo2qf3RdO4x26Haza2rtU3SKrONUHj-Ti3zS7j_pTeVhUmj8cjLnKtr_BKwC1uu6Hq-KnCx-7gUBa-VUPvfMqXAVsEaDuN-AjID1VhewahCwqv4vlubEkF2K9XRZHhhIoscnBpSVkUm-qzwolcOhzIWsM-xSlOwC3acxkpeVC2Fw8ZBmzzJZW2XB-O3icXuYxr5TGrRSo4C1KYvNl_Pe1WEUnToCOv8nH_9TKe8FfgcAAP__LNuhYQ) for the second time this season to claim the crown. The [Big 12 championship](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1yhCAURp8GOxz-XQuKNHabNqWDcFUSFAeuu_HtM7uvkP6b78w5X_fx7mKK-_LpNrA453GHZ02ACGWs51FgA5_PgvmnIvy6urmj5FEwoSkXlJkxuJiuUTXBzgACZAOWd0Yz3gtxa1Zres0n57wCA9zdPAMN4ea970NwPZuaaF9vXDDDOeuYbpWSpgtGzX7mIMNEFIMQMZf2O8cdV5jTlR9QWp-3JtkV8ahEfhAxEDHUIxes7eXWnF8DIgZXMPoElYhhuk6aD9grneJCzz1ACXmhbzMquJRaG8nbFbfUFBuOZ0wpVtMRxZbNxfRG4r86Paz4CwAA___fAn6C) features two teams that have never won the title: No. 4 Texas Tech will take on No. 11 BYU, a team it beat 29-7 earlier this year, and in the ACC, No. 17 Virginia can clinch its place in the bracket with a win over Duke.

Lloyd Doggett**, a Democrat, has announced that he will not seek reelection in wake of the Supreme Court’s decision on Friday to uphold the state’s new redistricting map. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw

Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Ukraine just took out 41 strategic aircraft in a single blow using nothing but drones and a mysterious new AI weapon.| | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | BREAKING: 41 Russian Warplanes Wiped Out in One Strike... And it changed modern warfare forever. Elon Musk says, “Drones are the future of warfare. Manned aircraft are not.” He’s right. Friend, I apologize for coming to you on such short notice. Now, I know you're busy, but I'm going to ask you to read this message in its entirety.

But Democrats and the vast network of left-wing NGOs are laser-focused on blocking the Trump America First agenda at all costs.

You know the threat firsthand, Friend. Every time you turn on the TV, there's some sleazy career politician spreading lies about President Trump and the good folks that make up our movement.

clean_body: I need you to know the full story Friend, I apologize for coming to you on such short notice. Now, I know you're busy, but I'm going to ask you to read this message in its entirety. Trust me, it 's that important. For those that don't know me, my name is Bill Hagerty, and I'm a United States Senator representing the great state of Tennessee. Before that, I served as President Trump's ambassador to Japan, fighting for America First policies on the other side of the world. I've poured my heart and soul into every second of this fight, and as one of President Trump's top allies in the Senate, I was proud to do it. But Democrats and the vast network of left-wing NGOs are laser-focused on blocking the Trump America First agenda at all costs. You know the threat firsthand, Friend. Every time you turn on the TV, there's some sleazy career politician spreading lies about President Trump and the good folks that make up our movement. Just look at Chuck Schumer - he shut down the government over giving taxpayer-funded healthcare to illegals! I've seen these politicians up close, and I know what they're capable of. And now, top Democrats and their cabal of shadow donors are orchestrating a million-dollar scheme to throw me out of the Senate. Yours in patriotism, Bill Hagerty, | Paid for by the NRSC. ## Supreme Court OKs Redistricting Map
The U.S. Supreme Court ruled 6-3 Thursday that Texas could use its [redrawn congressional map](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OhCAUhZ8GOybcK2IsKLaxm223NCgXJUExcOfv7Tcz3dZbn5zv5Hw_1-nqYorH-u12svwMeTroURMxU5kK-Vi5xIXjsbrzLPlOPqScJ1TYSUCpzORdTK9JN97Oyg_QkIXedApR90Oz2c60ZAJ2nXNaA8yhX2YNutULLEYpaqJ9wwCVAVQA5jIMS-uBlOm813MIQivykXO58EZMT1dDeuU7lcuS9ybZjfmsov0SOAoceaMtpvTOBI6F1ltyHPMhcFzyrbCcHXOiKnDsTKsNgPww5Z-z8uGKrLez0E7y0xM4NsX68xFTitX0Qqt1d_Ez1PD_1N0t_gYAAP__igWEvQ) in the upcoming midterm elections, overturning a lower court ruling that said the new maps were racially biased. In an [unsigned order](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2KwzAQBOCnkbsY7fpXhYpr3OXaK41krZwFJTLyYidvf_he4bqBgQ9mfu7z3XHi1_rtnmTlHfP8onNPJEJlLhR4l8KL8Gt121byQSGmnGfU2N0Ab7qfg-P0mdsqWK-DgYosDH2nEdvBVA_bAQEhjODHOLQ4emfGMJqIfmg0kanYXhig7gE1QF8bszQBSPddCK2PUbWaAksutTxI6O32mD75oFIv-Vkl-xDZdtV8KZwUTud51t4vV6dwusYonFwRXhJdcTlWOBC25hNyVWzYTk6J935QrV6fjtOfKv_74rD4GwAA__-cwHN8), the justices allowed midterm elections to proceed with the new map while the full appeal process, initiated by Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton, is carried out. Texas Gov. Greg Abbott [responded to the order](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAYhJ8GOw38Ip4FxTV2e-2VBvl_dklQCLC6-_YX9xWum2Qm32Tm97bcjA9-v_-YjXR9ubjsdJZAtVJeMqEvNXtb_X43KeV4ELoQ4wIchlZAy9WCxof3IhvUK8dJNKTFqAYOIMepeehhGNQowWE_yR75Ki3C-LVaiRP0pHjj9QUTwJUALoTqpsn2KIirAVGuzjHJCX2NuasPqvQyxYV3PCh3Nm5N0I9aU2H9N4OZwXyeZ2fXcq24fAbzJRnM5ZkybdTa-My1_XDazaQ2U3quwVuzX6kma0ynD8EXNTLJ75vx4VNU_3fPoeEvAAD__93qe1w) saying, _“We won! Texas is officially—and legally—more red,"_ and adding that the new maps “better align our representation in Washington D.C. with the values of our state.” After the order was announced, Rep. Lloyd Doggett (D-Tex) announced he will [not seek reelection](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OwyAQhJ8GOiLYYBwKimvc5dorLWzWNhIGCzZ_b39KuquvG2mkGX3fz3W8-phiXr_9jo6eSxkzPlpCIqxjxRAb1ThTzKs_jlruGJZUyggSOqFASDMGH9Nr1Dy4SQarODrVm04C6N7yzSFMFi4aezQ-9HIKnbbeXKSx_tIpkDy695gCaRRIpczJ2vkcFErThaCnZWFaYohU6ok2JHz6tqRXuWM9zWXnyW1ER2PnLwYDg4E23GJK747BsJUd30CfeGvIYOjM2cjeiFDWFYmEz7nc8oxNVKRYccdMwi-EVfzhZzDw6sLxiCnFZnqm5br7-Hni9D93dwe_AQAA___3rIUk) after 30 years in Congress.
## Police Release 911 Calls from July 4 Floods
Kerrville police have publicly [released 911 calls](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAQhp8GNiP7MEYMHrqwpWtHZLhz4vaCke1A8vYVUd-g2yed9Om-_-syXVzgsF4_3Z1sefo4rXRkplIoTYkw5JLCUsJ6dduW4k7oOcYJJHRCgZBmQhf4Neka7SxxUDVZ1ZtOAuh-qG92IAIHqtXKt9SZdh4QuxZmZwg8LK4O9pQpkEaBVMo0w7C0qEiaDlHP3ldaEoYSU1NuVOjpsudX3Ck1S7zXbG-lbLlqPyoYKxiP42jWeTkrznsF44kVjI8s_uiHUtoDM4m3TXw_-CW0OMMwi0EpsTjmLBIxuUwo0rI60H0n2zpZ3I7AHLLpKy2vdxf4_Uf533q7hd8AAAD__4FwhZ8) from the catastrophic July 4 floods at the request of eight media outlets via the Freedom of Information Act. Kerrville Police Chief Chris McCall announced Thursday the release of over 400 un-redacted 911 calls, noting that _" What you will hear in these calls is [distressing](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO4yAQhp8Gd0QwBhwKimvc7bVXWhiGhFtiIpjEm7c_OXtvsN38M5pP-vT_-Vg-fC55u_z2N3T0leqy4d4LEmFbGsbcqeVAebv4-73VJ8ZUal1AgOYSuDBL9Lm8FjVEt4po5YBOTkYLADXZ4epE0lNYDaxWe2uNkiEEO3mfhMY16jhkd8AkCCNBSGlO1oYxShRGx6jWlJgSGDPVdqIrEn75nsqrPrGdQr0NxV2J7p2NvxjMDOZ930-fuHV9XBnMvlEOBRnMhxiDuZOnI75J_P_yOxxqkcFspeQNQ20xb5fOgy-l809s7ZlLwffEQ31s9Pp-6fzvo7x4qo9GV_5mMZhhGjmaZFGIwIU2wBV44GetRz5KvaqQghHn89BcvO-5lNzNxJS43Hwubzf6WSNPB_8CAAD__zpUoJY). Some callers did not survive."_ Records show that calls began at 2:52 a.m. on July 4 with the department receiving 106 calls between 5 and 6 a.m. alone. McCall praised the two staffers receiving calls at the time for their "incredible perseverance" and their ability to "provide assistance and comfort to every caller." Excerpts from calls [reveal people saying](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUDuOgzAQPY3pjOzBOHHhYhu6bLslMnhIRjvByLYguf2KXGG7Jz29789tvAViWu_f4Ym-vpY0rngUxloxjxkjlZpprrTew7bltGNcOKURFPRSg1R2jIH4PZom-klFpxv0-mJ7BWAurnl4pw1MSoM1nbEh9NYapVwX3NVcLUTTkD_NNCirQWltW-fmLmpUto_RTMsijMJINeW2PrDiK5SF32nH3M7p2bB_1LoV0X0JGAQMx3G081TOFScvYDihgOGjlGf7WKTTWs6BuciMjKFglL-Y807MKLfENKOAock-bgcxU7EXYdT9GYg_qfV_X-0e_gIAAP__8D1-eg) they were on the roof of their home, noting how fast the water was rising, and asking when help would arrive, to which a dispatcher at one point responded, _" I don't know. I don't know."_
## Red Raiders Battle BYU for Big 12 Title
Texas Tech and Brigham Young University collide this morning at AT&T Stadium in the [Big 12 Championship playoff game](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAQRb8Gd6xg7MVx4SKNu5c2pYVhMKNgg2Cyfvv3kfcX0l8d3XN-f61flhKd-y974MzfIa8nXi0hM9a1oqfGlRzTudtSan6hDynnFRQ8pQapzOotpfc6dH7elJ90h7MezVMBDOPUxXkywzD2P8xooB_6YMbgjYX-aXs7Gq2wo_mGaVBGg9LaPKbJ9V6jMk_vhy0EMSj0xLk-OCLjt20hvfML68Plo0tzZC5N9D8FLAKW67oebmut5MrtXghYXE4Jd5QhZ95sSgKW21LA8sFJRhfl9v4ry23smPIpC7k_MnvfZCsVrZdXxIqSs7wsuygTvVButN8VXLRHoXy2SEXu9kABS1dnXy5KiZoZxaD2w1L6POb_6_ya4V8AAAD__2FplWM), with both 11-1 teams competing for an automatic bid to the College Football Playoff. The No. 4 Red Raiders defeated No. 11 BYU 29-7 at home when the teams clashed earlier this season, holding BYU's usually stout rushing attack to just 67 yards in the contest. Oddsmakers have set the Red Raiders as [roughly two-touchdown favorites](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DuupDAQheHVmMzIbyBwMAnZnXRCZKgCLBmM7OoHux91b-HmR9-R_n8_00-IKZ7b33Cgp_eapxNfNSERlqkgxEolLhTPLVxXyU-ENeU8KaEsl4oLN0GI6Z5MA34WMMgGveycFUqZbmh2LzRA35te97aTYBcQpltsb3Q32KEXoon-g0klnFRCStcOw6JBonAWwMzryoxAiJRLSzsSvkNd052fWNolH03yO9FVmf7D1MjUWK9cqLZ32HP-DJgaQ6G4JKxMjfP94PnCs_I5bvxxAhbIG_-qXEmtrXVatjsdqSkerldMKVbXMSO2I8T0vaTfhXp69T8AAP__jrd88g) today, with kickoff at 11 a.m. on ABC.
