Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Supreme Court OKs Redistricting Map The U.S. Supreme Court ruled 6-3 Thursday that Texas could use its in the upcoming midterm elections, overturning a lower court ruling that said the new maps were racially biased. In an , the justices allowed midterm elections to proceed with the new map while the full appeal process, initiated by Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton, is carried out. Texas Gov. Greg Abbott saying, “We won! Texas is officially—and legally—more red," and adding that the new maps “better align our representation in Washington D.C. with the values of our state.” After the order was announced, Rep. Lloyd Doggett (D-Tex) announced he will after 30 years in Congress. Police Release 911 Calls from July 4 Floods Kerrville police have publicly from the catastrophic July 4 floods at the request of eight media outlets via the Freedom of Information Act. Kerrville Police Chief Chris McCall announced Thursday the release of over 400 un-redacted 911 calls, noting that " What you will hear in these calls is . Some callers did not survive." Records show that calls began at 2:52 a.m. on July 4 with the department receiving 106 calls between 5 and 6 a.m. alone. McCall praised the two staffers receiving calls at the time for their "incredible perseverance" and their ability to "provide assistance and comfort to every caller." Excerpts from calls they were on the roof of their home, noting how fast the water was rising, and asking when help would arrive, to which a dispatcher at one point responded, " I don't know. I don't know." Red Raiders Battle BYU for Big 12 Title Texas Tech and Brigham Young University collide this morning at AT&T Stadium in the , with both 11-1 teams competing for an automatic bid to the College Football Playoff. The No. 4 Red Raiders defeated No. 11 BYU 29-7 at home when the teams clashed earlier this season, holding BYU's usually stout rushing attack to just 67 yards in the contest. Oddsmakers have set the Red Raiders as today, with kickoff at 11 a.m. on ABC. It's the consecutive conference championship games today that will determine who’s in and out of the College Football Playoffs. | Cold weather doesn’t mean you stop needing electrolytes. In fact, winter is when most people quietly under-hydrate, while heaters, dry air, and long work days all take a toll. That’s why our team has been leaning hard on . It’s light, refreshing, and somehow hits even better this time of year. LMNT gives you everything you need and nothing you don’t: no sugar, no artificial ingredients, no filler. Just a clean, that actually makes you feel better throughout the day. Around The Flyover office, . Some of us use it before workouts, some during the endless Zoom days, others just to stay hydrated when the winter dryness kicks in. If you’ve tried LMNT before, this is the flavor you’ll wish you’d found sooner. | ➤ Laredo: Webb County Judge Tano Tijerina announced that he's challenging Democrat Henry Cuellar for his seat in Congress. Tijerina was elected as a Democrat but switched to the Republican Party earlier this year. () ➤ Austin: Police revealed evidence that Texas A&M student Brianna Aguilera took her own life in Austin in the leadup to A&M’s rivalry game with Texas last Friday, countering claims of foul play surrounding her death. () ➤ Statewide: Texas A&M announced the launch of FarmHope, offering free mental healthcare to Texas farmers and their families in response to findings that farmers and ranchers face some of the highest rates of mental health issues in the nation. ()** ➤ Dallas: Democrat Rep. Jasmine Crockett has primed expectations that she will announce a run for U.S. Senate next week, noting that she will make a “special announcement” Monday just prior to the deadline for filing for candidacy and revealing that she called her would-be opponents on Sunday. () ➤ San Antonio: After about 50 years providing security at the Alamo, the Texas Rangers have transitioned that responsibility to the Department of Public Safety in alignment with a new state law moving oversight to the newly formed Alamo Commission. subject: School Boards Holding Firm, For Now, Against MHRC Efforts to Strong Arm Them on Title IX Policies
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** School Boards Holding Firm, For Now, Against MHRC Efforts to Strong Arm Them on Title IX Policies (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=988c6a36fa&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Maine Wire Staff on Dec 05, 2025 05:42 pm
The board of the Spruce Mountain school district, or RSU 73, voted on Thursday night to stick with their amended policy that keeps girls sports exclusively for biological females despite a new lawsuit brought by the Maine Human Rights Commission alleging they are in violation of state law. The handful of Maine school districts that [...]

------------------------------------------------------------

U.S. Border Patrol’s Houlton Sector said the man was taken into custody on October 20 in the parking lot [...]

------------------------------------------------------------

President Donald Trump scored another major political victory Thursday after the U.S. Supreme Court allowed Texas to move forward with a congressional map designed to expand Republican power in the 2026 midterm elections. In a sharply divided ruling, the Court halted a lower court decision that found the map likely discriminates against Hispanic and Black [...]

Just three weeks after receiving one of France’s highest military honors, a decorated WWII veteran from Maine has died. Born on June 27, 1924, on the Penobscot Indian Island Reservation in Maine, Shay was among some 500 Native Americans who [...]

---
| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

[Get the full facts here.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=c1de04025fd94386a4149ab0b5ded72b&_e=GDrkSpcunafOQxFq3f307i3fmBhDAq2j7k26l6MS0BsXFEMB21bUcORaBtaCx9kZgzD2SlQfF5oqKlDMasans_IbbDViVBB1tyeifcLVsiIaYaEWm5Shl5--malVidaQN1XAmwNxk54HiUaLxJEJAFCWWVmLw7g8zYdAwguy4B9mVYoINJA0q6BEBXsFTqs5bEMDsJT_C7WhugAVGNulOkTBFa-isXYmzEcL36xUstYYtXis6m1Inb_cDpA-Ftk1hEiyzcIq9Cxs6G18TtJGBS6eEOGvUZr7Tdf15JbpUhq_ZPpDgEW1boCWNRW38LprJb-ssRU42CgRkqC2nuQPsj5C0DZ5qZxuYLTt6DbBOfZHHGG_PnZiWWvvrTrnDCgP5Mo0P5aJz-C0VedrWYDRUMc3hYS-x98b32zMWRQLHlss6DkbE1HQKLiFukNxaldNuDrPZyFQlBJxi6APb5PLVx1xorTW7UJtNYm7AKGr1uFqkGJwJI_xlSpgEhk4bHwia8Ir2R1f8kVbTRo1xJNniNVz1trdwhl3EruolFaYgt9icBJ2YiC0kecQCJuQqDij)

P.S. RFK Jr. called Big Pharma’s grip on our health, “An undeniable and urgent reality.” **This video proves that fact beyond a shadow of a doubt.** [WATCH IT HERE while you can.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=c1de04025fd94386a4149ab0b5ded72b&_e=GDrkSpcunafOQxFq3f307i3fmBhDAq2j7k26l6MS0BsXFEMB21bUcORaBtaCx9kZgzD2SlQfF5oqKlDMasans_IbbDViVBB1tyeifcLVsiIaYaEWm5Shl5--malVidaQN1XAmwNxk54HiUaLxJEJAFCWWVmLw7g8zYdAwguy4B9mVYoINJA0q6BEBXsFTqs50F_Vuo5wPp_-BU9dOVHLHjYJxcu0S0OOKBCko9f_s5WuYSZP1DRzNOTSUjsaf92UQb12l5Nd5hf5SR_SghinHskJkcMHv2WlAF1gqxCBEnCVtkGtAYSu-VHJb5X6j3RSV_3P5pX-x0lVqmjATO0YCGBHS9M1_hZ2xu1QesTRb4g6c76_ciVjqglgUzxmckKPphsNmXfK_VtYFR75h5jPUD77f957oScs2WP1vwZjVD8tUeNj0WLI8Hp7XC0xHWRyIz2dX8TOE0E264gWUMdb1dbJ9eg5M7GI487o8kN0YYCKae1lsOF_yXonOqCSx7bguyTpfpOUO_7jdJUwr4CEpgtJ1ZAVs2uLt0M0KqFZmHJmaAVEBEkD_TR7U7F1HPSt)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. body:
Will you please complete the 2025 Voter Verification Audit AS SOON AS POSSIBLE? |
Fellow American,

Senate Republicans are hard at work, advancing President Trump's America First Agenda, but there's something important we still need from you.

We haven't been able to locate your response to the **[2025 Voter Verification Audit](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ba3cce92413f4d309b3739c188260073&_e=fiAV8KTgjjsYF-pdgEIjwr6XFDpS59QAQ93MHuJl4U2odnnTM80ZmrnjkSOAzEEqRgwQNoWwFPU89Z2JU7iHONFecTiCVrVBcJkfxXNinBEsti6hZX2z_JD6eRmttIvMyh_RWRJsMyMh03Tdhz9cWpcwfrqLI5lDhkSuB9uFT5zNFa_39J7xIWGzSnlj_4PyYhtRFiQPUYag4OZ86O21X6xDYIjX1445VQpW9hjQDrP5YwE6Vvo5HURjweQD9zPRz_hOjOkfomxeaN80KORUGtmkdqxddfGi1AEdMChmsSNNHNZYnDHZc4XPAXGkbXiuHd8QHR2G-cmvkRvv556nJkp6pjoHZl2lehMp4mlvLS4xVlTZLbtFib_iOGh7S7n7RPJ5dRYrv6dexv_m4LGWL7e_Dos49uZ3VVQ86q1kSlzbC70baOK7VSgZJX5DDCwJMEaWdfbRP1nJSRW3tOPYaXF-iUuwD5dd6O01PRjVCwBERDYE16xUCVNU0JqhauCgaQAKydZkHbk-ja7ZFwg4CeeAzS2S9SEy0RkSrlFqt5MLBBbohnCRQINS4Vu1jBtTRq_87idX1lFfd4g5QPKPboMAKss7XfPAmAyTCzmjj66kXpaPIWBoWiPCvFDmeycJRWLUhSguesMfN4tbGF6KgOjodlMHAdca-0lW0UfeeSPIcWLw6Xz6kzrQ2mBGmFksxdQjlLT04BVNBX4SPQ72dtGFklRjPQqHxgt1sPP22QZpfXQ-b8wleoO9HbZlzpVEg_Y3RGlhW7ZDz84PUdjsl_6p5Dugu-khhFgVE5vejPlONG3CaQQQUy097wKNjQnluZSb6X7tMi7IL8TySMSNMEu2TbhXFyxheDwiXSglYrNFh2QBasmTHE8ehHcXkExV_ia143KDrq3L4gnG-9prMg%3D%3D)** , and we're starting to get worried.

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: The One Number That Actually Matters
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/whatreallymatters?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
What’s the most important set of data in any economy?

Interest rates? Size of the debt? Inflation? No. It’s the output per person - what economists call productivity.

To put it bluntly: the higher the output per person, the higher the living standard that can be sustained. Grow productivity, and prosperity will follow. Fail to do so, and society will be poor—full stop. This has been true since the dawn of civilization.

Here’s a graph I love showing students, created by the great economic historian Angus Maddison. It tracks GDP per person going back two thousand years.
---
|
---
| For almost all of human history people were poor. Most folk in AD 1600 were barely richer than people in the year AD 1. Some years the line even dipped below subsistence—famines were routine.

Then, starting around 1776 (the year of the Declaration of Independence, the year Adam Smith published The Wealth of Nations, and the year James Watt patented his improved steam engine), the line turns vertical. That explosion is productivity growth.

It is still the most important economic stat today. Grow productivity and we can outgrow the national debt, China and any challenge you care to concern yourself with.

It is why America became - and remains - the most prosperous large society on earth.

Over the past thirty years U.S. productivity has grown roughly three times faster than Europe’s. From 2010 - 2024 the U.S. averaged 1.6% annual growth while the euro area limped along at about a third of that rate.

The gap has widened dramatically in the last five years: in 2024 the U.S. posted 2.3% productivity growth while Europe managed barely 0.5%. Through the third quarter of 2025 the U.S. is on track for something closer to an impressive 2.5%.

Why are Americans so much better at figuring out how to produce more with the same (or fewer) hours?
* **Technology** – America bets big technology and actually uses it. The Euros talk about it, regulate it, and treat innovation with the same distain that Ming emperors showed.
* **A workforce that works** – U.S. labor markets remain flexible. Hiring and firing is straightforward, so labor flows to its most valuable use. Across the Atlantic, rigid protections and high firing costs keep millions stuck in jobs (or out of jobs) that no longer make economic sense.
* **Capital markets that actually allocate capital** – Resources move quickly to the companies and places that can use them best. Zombie firms die; new ones are born at a world-beating rate (5.7 million new business applications in 2024 alone). In much of Europe, cheap credit keeps zombie companies alive, blocking innovators from the resources they need.
* **Energy abundance** – America has cheap, reliable energy, especially in the South and Midwest, thanks to the shale revolution and decades of market-driven investment. The Euros deliberately made energy expensive and unreliable in pursuit of green ideology. Doh.

Europe’s response to its productivity crisis?

Grandiose public projects and top-down industrial policy—ruinously expensive high-speed rail lines that nobody rides, “national champions” propped up by subsidies. To be sure, Washington politicians would love to play that game, but the American system – thanks to the Founders – curbs their ability to do so.

Japan is perhaps the cautionary tale everyone should study.

In 1995 Japan was richer per capita than the average American state. Today, if Japan were a U.S. state, it would rank alongside West Virginia. Thirty years of near-zero productivity growth turned the world’s former growth miracle into a middle-income country.

What should our leaders do to ensure we keep growing our output per person? Here’s a simple ‘to do’ list:
1. Keep taxes and regulations light
2. Keep energy costs low
3. Protect flexible labor markets
4. Invest in essential infrastructure – but discerningly
5. Ensure public universities and colleges keep producing capable people
6. Don’t be like Europe.

Have a wonderful weekend!

clean_body: | | | | | | If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind. | Dear Friend, What’s the most important set of data in any economy? Interest rates? Size of the debt? Inflation? No. It’s the output per person - what economists call productivity. To put it bluntly: the higher the output per person, the higher the living standard that can be sustained. Grow productivity, and prosperity will follow. Fail to do so, and society will be poor—full stop. This has been true since the dawn of civilization. Here’s a graph I love showing students, created by the great economic historian Angus Maddison. It tracks GDP per person going back two thousand years. | | For almost all of human history people were poor. Most folk in AD 1600 were barely richer than people in the year AD 1. Some years the line even dipped below subsistence—famines were routine. Then, starting around 1776 (the year of the Declaration of Independence, the year Adam Smith published The Wealth of Nations, and the year James Watt patented his improved steam engine), the line turns vertical. That explosion is productivity growth. It is still the most important economic stat today. Grow productivity and we can outgrow the national debt, China and any challenge you care to concern yourself with. It is why America became - and remains - the most prosperous large society on earth. Over the past thirty years U.S. productivity has grown roughly three times faster than Europe’s. From 2010 - 2024 the U.S. averaged 1.6% annual growth while the euro area limped along at about a third of that rate. The gap has widened dramatically in the last five years: in 2024 the U.S. posted 2.3% productivity growth while Europe managed barely 0.5%. Through the third quarter of 2025 the U.S. is on track for something closer to an impressive 2.5%. Why are Americans so much better at figuring out how to produce more with the same (or fewer) hours? Technology – America bets big technology and actually uses it. The Euros talk about it, regulate it, and treat innovation with the same distain that Ming emperors showed. A workforce that works – U.S. labor markets remain flexible. Hiring and firing is straightforward, so labor flows to its most valuable use. Across the Atlantic, rigid protections and high firing costs keep millions stuck in jobs (or out of jobs) that no longer make economic sense. Capital markets that actually allocate capital – Resources move quickly to the companies and places that can use them best. Zombie firms die; new ones are born at a world-beating rate (5.7 million new business applications in 2024 alone). In much of Europe, cheap credit keeps zombie companies alive, blocking innovators from the resources they need. Energy abundance – America has cheap, reliable energy, especially in the South and Midwest, thanks to the shale revolution and decades of market-driven investment. The Euros deliberately made energy expensive and unreliable in pursuit of green ideology. Doh. Europe’s response to its productivity crisis? Grandiose public projects and top-down industrial policy—ruinously expensive high-speed rail lines that nobody rides, “national champions” propped up by subsidies. To be sure, Washington politicians would love to play that game, but the American system – thanks to the Founders – curbs their ability to do so. Japan is perhaps the cautionary tale everyone should study. In 1995 Japan was richer per capita than the average American state. Today, if Japan were a U.S. state, it would rank alongside West Virginia. Thirty years of near-zero productivity growth turned the world’s former growth miracle into a middle-income country. What should our leaders do to ensure we keep growing our output per person? Here’s a simple ‘to do’ list: 1. Keep taxes and regulations light 2. Keep energy costs low 3. Protect flexible labor markets 4. Invest in essential infrastructure – but discerningly 5. Ensure public universities and colleges keep producing capable people 6. Don’t be like Europe. Have a wonderful weekend! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

| Peter,

Our critical end-of-year fundraising deadline is coming up fast, [_**so I’m respectfully asking you to contribute just $5 today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120728416/587172967/1259050720?refcode=BLU_EM_ABAG_2025-12-06_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTg2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2VmZjJkZC1hYmQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2ja0vBHyMPD2cB9g_TdPYQVIHAQ8ZWpwx-xlBJuyqzE=)

Here’s everything you need to know NOW:

→ Mark Kelly condemned Trump and Pete Hegseth’s illegal military orders.

→ Trump has called for an investigation and even IMPRISONMENT of Mark Kelly, **solely for disagreeing with him.**

→ _What happens to Senator Kelly could seal our country’s fate as an authoritarian DICTATORSHIP._ So we need to act fast.

[**Don’t sit idly by while Trump tries to SILENCE his political enemies. Add your name to our petition to STAND WITH MARK KELLY as he fights back against Trump’s threats »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-kelly/?source=VPP_20251206_EMPET_E1_T0_SB&t=8&akid=22133%2E878179%2EZN2QRr)

name: VoteVets
subject: Those were war crimes, and there have to be consequences
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
If the reports from members of the Intelligence and Armed Services Committees are true, there is absolutely no doubt that crimes have been committed under Hegseth’s command.
#
Peter — in any normal, sane world, Hegseth would’ve been out of the job years ago. He never would’ve made it this far.
In this wildly insane timeline, he is the Secretary of Defense.
And if the reports from members of the Intelligence and Armed Services Committees are true, there is absolutely no doubt that crimes have been committed under Hegseth’s command.
The buck stops there, and with his order to leave no survivors.
At war, this “double-tap” would’ve been a war crime. Congress hasn’t authorized a war, though — which would make this murder.
Peter, these people are only as powerful as we let them be. If we sit back and accept that there’s nothing we can do about Hegseth and his litany of f*ck ups, nothing is going to happen.
If we want him out, we have to force him out. That starts here, and it starts now.
[**Add your name alongside thousands of others and demand that Hegseth resign or be forced out of his job. We have to make a hell of a lot of noise to get this done, but we can do it if we work together.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/251203_vv_em_hegseth/?source=em251206-1-160&akid=34804%2E3013755%2EKHTWyD)

I wanted to reach out to you one last time before my campaign’s fundraising deadline at midnight, because the work ahead is too important to leave anything on the table.

[_**This is your last chance to become an Official Campaign Kickoff Donor to my reelection campaign – can I count on you to chip in right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120737659/587203113/186742633?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Relaunch3_251206_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzI4MGNhNC1hZmQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7bDrS4NOXWdZ-z7WLJpzhhbjC3GQNW59iYhevkCAZ7k=)

I decided to run for reelection because the challenges we're facing right now demand real leadership. Prices keep rising and the job market is shifting beneath our feet. Americans are facing a never-before-seen health care crisis.

Yet our president hasn’t done a damn thing about it. He’s more focused on handing out tax breaks to the ultra wealthy and vanity projects to the White House than the cost-of-living crisis facing too many Americans. Now more than ever, we need leaders with big ideas and a willingness to bring people together and get stuff done so we can chart a new path forward – that’s the fight I’m leading right now.

name: Team Walz
subject: How you can help keep Minnesota blue
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/195?refcode=em20251206-242&t=1&akid=242%2E34582%2E997M7o)
Peter, with right-wing attacks on Tim Walz ramping up and more Republicans jumping into this race, we need your help to make sure we’re in a winning position come Election Day.
We’re going to explain why a donation of $5 would go a long way to ensure we keep Minnesota blue, but **[if you’re ready to chip in now, click here.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251206.JnIKzk&amount=5&refcode=em20251206-242&t=2&akid=242%2E34582%2E997M7o)**
$5 would help Tim travel every corner of the state, meet with Minnesotans, and hear about what issues are impacting them most today.
$5 makes sure we can keep up with each candidate who jumps into this race. Republicans are desperate to flip Minnesota red, and we need to be ready to let people know why each of them is wrong for our state.
$5 means Tim can continue to focus on protecting Minnesotans from the Trump administration, no matter what ugly attacks they throw our way.
**[So what do you say, Peter: can we count on you to chip in $5 to our campaign today?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251206.JnIKzk&amount=5&refcode=em20251206-242&t=3&akid=242%2E34582%2E997M7o)**

Thank you,
Team Walz

body:

name: Team Marsha Blackburn
subject: I am starting to get concerned, Peter…
body:
I've been trying to reach you for weeks!

| | | | Peter,
I've been trying to reach you for weeks, and I'm starting to get concerned...
As part of the Team Marsha GOP HQ team, it's my job to collect one million responses to our Support Audit, yet I’m STILL missing your response!
[Your zip code is one of the most critical areas in the country, and right now, we're falling behind. We really need your input to complete our research and make key decisions that will impact the future of our party.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTIwNl9QQi1TUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3Njc0NzYtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEyMDZfUEItU1IuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzY3NDc2LTEwNDMifQ/kgk3zpCdCe1wevvl6SI42Q)[GOP HQ SUPPORT AUDIT](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTIwNl9QQi1TUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3Njc0NzYtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEyMDZfUEItU1IuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzY3NDc2LTEwNDMifQ/2yI4W2MPvsn3Equ90az8KA)RESPONSE = OVER DUESupporter: PeterEmail: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTIwNl9QQi1TUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3Njc0NzYtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEyMDZfUEItU1IuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzY3NDc2LTEwNDMifQ/PqpkH46anQqZmSseemEOHQ)[RESPOND NOW >>
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTIwNl9QQi1TUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3Njc0NzYtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEyMDZfUEItU1IuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzY3NDc2LTEwNDMifQ/XQ6QFf84mmhphQaeQCqP6g)The survey is just 4 questions, and it will take you less than a minute to complete. Allison, Team Marsha| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120739350/587209467/1438484806?refcode=EM_F_251206ballroom_N_TSB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTViOTQyMy1iMmQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s8p7gYgzXRosiCgOj7HPXc6pPnk7z1iqWGoXH224_vE=) Americans are struggling to keep up with Trump and House Republicans' cruel health care cuts and rising costs. **Prices are skyrocketing, and the GOP couldn’t care less.**

Meanwhile, Trump is moving at record speed to build his billion-dollar ballroom, now planned to be 4 TIMES as large as his Mar-a-Lago version.

To make matters worse, Peter, it’s reported that Trump thinks he’s above all laws regarding permitting, zoning, and code requirements. In his own words, he has claimed he’s been told, **_“You’re the president of the United States, you can do anything you want.”_**

**Unfortunately, that’s been his mantra throughout his presidency, and the people are paying the price.**

[**If Trump paid half as much attention to addressing the healthcare crisis as he does to his ballroom, we might be able to do some good. Yet, Republicans don’t even want to show up to work. It’s disgusting. name: Grassroots Protection Team via Our Revolution
subject: Fox News Radio just called us “Bernie Sanders’ Gestapo"

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1011&refcode=email-20251206_v&akid=9942%2E5885482%2EPhW6Sa ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

The far right has put a target on Our Revolution’s back – and as Trump
doubles down on his war on the “radical left”, the stakes have never been
higher.

This month alone, we’ve seen a huge uptick in attention from MAGA outlets
like Fox News and Breitbart — Fox News Radio just called us “Bernie
Sanders’ Gestapo”! The message is clear: we’re making a difference, and
that’s why they’re coming after us. But the scary truth is this is
happening as Trump and his cronies look for any way possible to crackdown
on their political opponents.

We are marshaling our resources to secure our organization as best we can
– upgrading our software and tech defenses and investing in our legal team
on standby.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251206nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9942%2E5885482%2EPhW6Sa ]Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help Our Revolution
protect our activists, upgrade our security, and protect our movement from
the far right’s attacks?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251206nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9942%2E5885482%2EPhW6Sa ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251206nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9942%2E5885482%2EPhW6Sa ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34052?source=email-20251206&t=1060&akid=9942%2E5885482%2EPhW6Sa ]Graphic highlighting the right-wing media that has been targeting Our
Revolution

The threats are no longer theoretical. Senator Ted Cruz doubled down on
his dangerous crusade to crush the peaceful “No Kings” protest movement.
He went on national TV, smeared nonviolent protests as “riots,” and
demanded Congress pass his so-called “Stop FUNDERs Act” – a bill designed
to threaten, prosecute, and silence those who support protest actions like
“No Kings.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34052?source=email-20251206&t=1061&akid=9942%2E5885482%2EPhW6Sa ]Headline: Ted Cruz says his bill will allow DOJ to 'prosecute' those
who fund No Kings protests, which have been overwhelmingly peaceful

Earlier this year, Donald Trump quietly signed a new terrifying National
Security directive – NSPM-7, which singles out left-wing activists,
launching a national strategy to “investigate and disrupt” organizations
like ours. And even scarier, it authorizes a 4,000-strong enforcement arm
of the FBI to ‘prevent’ crimes that haven’t even happened.

The intimidation is real – but we refuse to back down. Which is why we are
urgently upgrading our cyber security, growing our legal defense fund, and
training our volunteers on how to stay safe – no matter what Cruz, Trump,
or the extreme right throws at us. But we need resources, fast.

Every dollar we spend defending ourselves is one less dollar we can use
for grassroots organizing, phone banking, or supporting working-class
candidates running against the far right. We never wanted to devote
precious time and money to defense instead of mobilization. But when the
President of the United States declares all political opponents his
enemies, we have no choice.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20251206nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9942%2E5885482%2EPhW6Sa ]We need 500 people to step up today to meet our emergency defense fund
goal to be ready to take on the threats coming at us from the far right.
Can you be one of them?

Our Revolution has always played David against Goliath. Each time
billionaires or politicians try to shut us down, we build back stronger
because grassroots supporters like you have our backs.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

And while New York Democrats enable these brutal crimes with their sanctuary policies, they’re busy weaponizing the legal system to try and imprison a president who fights for those very Americans they’ve abandoned. subject: [HBM UPDATE]: This Tennessee man had a notably small…😏

body:
You probably heard us screaming the name “AFTYN BEHN” from the rooftops. While things didn’t exactly... | | |
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120740437/587214007/-1133336361?refcode=EM_F_251206TN_N_DB_NO_10_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiOTA0YjNlLWI0ZDItZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U--SiLlIjZbQ7GsMdTENM1Hy5lK0KCdt10KwNbdTiPU=)
---
Hi Peter,

**We have bad news and good news.**

❌ The bad news is that our powerhouse candidate, Aftyn Behn, lost her special election on Tuesday.

This is especially painful because TN ranks among the bottom in the nation for maternal health outcomes, and women in TN are living under a near-total abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest.

This district will soon be represented by Matt Van Epps, a Trump-endorsed Republican who said he would “100% have the President’s back” if elected to Congress. Just what we need. 🙄

✅ The good news is that this Republican victory in a historically **deep red** district was won by a **notably small margin.** 😏

Voters in the deepest red pockets of America are making their voices heard. They are excited about a pro-choice champion, a pro-WOMAN warrior, and a fearless critic of the old boys’ club in Southern states.

**Here’s the deal: At Her Bold Move, we are proud to take a chance on incredible candidates, even when they are running in red states against well-funded, Trump-endorsed, anti-choice, and often independently wealthy men. We stand by the classic underdogs – and it’s paying off!

In 2025, our win rate was 98%. The year before that? 44% of our WINS came out of RED STATES.**

We design our programs to support women candidates running in the toughest races in the country. And even though we’re often the only national organization investing in those races, we couldn’t be prouder. We believe that ALL women, regardless of WHERE they live, deserve real and true representation.

[**While it didn’t go the way we’d hoped, Her Bold Move helped move the needle in this historically red Tennessee district that has never before been represented by a woman – and we are going to continue to fight to elect women in red and blue states alike in 2026. Help support our work to continue cracking away at glass ceilings by pitching in $20.26 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120740439/587214017/-1133336361?refcode=EM_F_251206TN_N_DB_NO_10_NG_N_L1&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiOTA0YjNlLWI0ZDItZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U--SiLlIjZbQ7GsMdTENM1Hy5lK0KCdt10KwNbdTiPU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.26 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120740449/587214021/-1133336361?refcode=EM_F_251206TN_N_DB_NO_10_NG_N_EB20.26&express_lane=true&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiOTA0YjNlLWI0ZDItZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U--SiLlIjZbQ7GsMdTENM1Hy5lK0KCdt10KwNbdTiPU=)

clean_body: You probably heard us screaming the name “AFTYN BEHN” from the rooftops. While things didn’t exactly... | | | | | = Hi Peter, We have bad news and good news. ❌ The bad news is that our powerhouse candidate, Aftyn Behn, lost her special election on Tuesday. This is especially painful because TN ranks among the bottom in the nation for maternal health outcomes, and women in TN are living under a near-total abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest. This district will soon be represented by Matt Van Epps, a Trump-endorsed Republican who said he would “100% have the President’s back” if elected to Congress. Just what we need. 🙄 ✅ The good news is that this Republican victory in a historically deep red district was won by a notably small margin. 😏 Voters in the deepest red pockets of America are making their voices heard. They are excited about a pro-choice champion, a pro-WOMAN warrior, and a fearless critic of the old boys’ club in Southern states. Here’s the deal: At Her Bold Move, we are proud to take a chance on incredible candidates, even when they are running in red states against well-funded, Trump-endorsed, anti-choice, and often independently wealthy men. We stand by the classic underdogs – and it’s paying off! In 2025, our win rate was 98%. The year before that? 44% of our WINS came out of RED STATES. We design our programs to support women candidates running in the toughest races in the country. And even though we’re often the only national organization investing in those races, we couldn’t be prouder. We believe that ALL women, regardless of WHERE they live, deserve real and true representation. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Together, Diana Bula Political Manager Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. name: Massachusetts Democratic Party
subject: Florida is Next on Trump’s Redistricting List
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/MDP%20Standard%20DarkBlueWhite%20%28PDF%29.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/FDP%20Logo.png]
Peter,
What’s happening in Florida right now should alarm every one of us.
At Donald Trump’s direction, Florida Republicans are rushing to redraw congressional district lines years before the next census in a blatant attempt to rig the rules and steal seats ahead of the 2026 midterms.
They’ve already tried it in Texas and North Carolina. If they succeed in Florida, more Republican-led states will follow.
CHIP IN NOW TO STAND WITH FLORIDA DEMOCRATS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-fdp-split?refcode=120725]
Florida Democrats are preparing an unprecedented legal and organizing fight to protect fair representation and defend the right to vote, but they can’t do it alone.
Here in Massachusetts, we’re stepping up to help, because a threat to democracy anywhere is a threat to voters everywhere.
Grassroots supporters like you are the key to stopping this dangerous power grab. If you contribute through this email, your donation will be split between the Massachusetts Democratic Party and the Florida Democratic Party to fund this fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mdp-fdp-split?refcode=120725]
In solidarity,
Massachusetts Democratic Party

name: Wes Moore
subject: This matters.
body:
I’ve said it before.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1026%2E1086043%2E2uRFKT)
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/444?c0=wes-em-20251206-1.6degK5&refcode=em-20251206-1&t=2&akid=1026%2E1086043%2E2uRFKT)
I’ve said this before, and I mean it deeply: Service is not selfish. _Service is selfless._
For people willing to give of themselves for somebody they might never ever meet — that’s public service. And right now, it matters more than ever.
The challenges coming out of Washington are real, and they’re directly impacting families in Maryland. Cuts to federal programs, rising costs, and threats to essential services are creating real strain across our state.
We turned our values into action: standing with federal workers, expanding resources for students and teachers, strengthening community safety efforts, and building protections that help shield Maryland families from the chaos coming out of Washington.
But the only way we keep doing this work — and keep doing it at the scale this moment demands — **is with a strong grassroots team behind us.**
**[Every donation helps us organize faster, respond stronger, and make sure no one gets left behind. If you can, consider chipping in $5 to our campaign today.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/444?c0=wes-em-20251206-1.6degK5&refcode=em-20251206-1&t=3&akid=1026%2E1086043%2E2uRFKT)**
Together, we can continue this record of excellence in public service. But I already have multiple Republican opponents, and we can’t waste any time. Winning reelection will be a tough fight.
Your contribution today will directly fund our work, and have a real impact on the path Maryland takes in the future. So I have to ask again:
**[Peter, will you join our movement by chipping in $5 — or any amount — today?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/444?c0=wes-em-20251206-1.6degK5&refcode=em-20251206-1&t=4&akid=1026%2E1086043%2E2uRFKT)**
Thank you.
— Gov. Wes Moore

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251206-1&t=5&refcode2=1026_1086043_2uRFKT&akid=1026%2E1086043%2E2uRFKT)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=1026%2E1086043%2E2uRFKT)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1026%2E1086043%2E2uRFKT)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Lauren Toncich, Turning Point USA
subject: I've never written one of these to you
body:
Only days left...| | |
---
| | Hi Fellow Patriot,

My name is Lauren Toncich -- and for the past seven years, I've helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event.

Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable.

I've never emailed you directly before.

But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room...

Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3cfe16bfa9c24b34b6868888e6969524&_e=DEWC3atYTpgmCpMa5bN2HOXO-uXRFlooJZLDEQcnioWaRa-74PYHtG_-7PWeGqlYY6DBVvkhecTAhpGJeJ0BR-pSKbBU7qFa0V-pXG80iy4nLsOsXoBOE8IQ4HT6bGOEuJlV2cnsnCSEJ7UOMKesmKiYFhaFi6wxIZVaFKN1YZGulFVo1w3ezQ5lg3AU3eFW_FFpoV7aeKr1tJE4fukH2aycTeOuwjH1GdMZOj-kWw_tZNeDCdA4bpgmukaQ8p9xrLbcKtZHyN_-LkOw5mdtKjnV_Z2OM6DPbpTdr7plmCSO_RoKXdnBqVzX1joBmVtyT6b19_2edEgE2NmUgrXjcpsvOvLqnGijbJQVsVwzD70f_Du0FTmJkWJITQnw53mbcxTnMgY_j0FzM805hgH3sbzHldmsbxSiIQT_5QEUco-xIsa4tlpnO-l95igqLM_K0g8mIxIvC0_C5nwToeTm5zJmXrrT_0ElI5BeRtyHniucSxTXvxcvss5lG-2g7hWjB0TsfedH2ihuBgX-_uV7xbIoZuGDekXqWES_DMvhZtx6UlZHkonO9BF-6Fkv12JFJV6-Hg_a-2_LeSlH9FEbhQ6xAyet2QHXXIhlt7Ui26Rn1swcBgWjhTSEtSQSrda0-ZAkSnUy2OASAekUGKQJ4jJVRMihXz6AuvTUmpO-rrDuJeoK3p8b9RPZOtKwqBPz)
---
_Above: That 's me with Charlie, backstage at last year's AmFest making sure every detail was perfect before showtime. _
---
At the heart of every single Turning Point event is this one truth: _Young Americans deserve a stage worthy of the fight they 're in. _

**And AmericaFest -- especially this year -- is our most important stage of all. **

**This December 18 -21 in Phoenix, thousands of students will walk into the most powerful conservative gathering in America. **

It will be our first AmFest without Charlie.

This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards.

Charlie poured everything into these events, because he believed students deserved more than beige ballrooms and lazy lectures.

He believed they needed to _FEEL_ the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world.

Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: _" Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" _

Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash...

But because he knew energy moves people. Environments shape conviction.

_And atmosphere matters when you 're calling students into the fight of their lives. _
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3cfe16bfa9c24b34b6868888e6969524&_e=DEWC3atYTpgmCpMa5bN2HOXO-uXRFlooJZLDEQcnioWaRa-74PYHtG_-7PWeGqlYY6DBVvkhecTAhpGJeJ0BR-pSKbBU7qFa0V-pXG80iy4nLsOsXoBOE8IQ4HT6bGOEuJlV2cnsnCSEJ7UOMKesmKiYFhaFi6wxIZVaFKN1YZGulFVo1w3ezQ5lg3AU3eFW_FFpoV7aeKr1tJE4fukH2aycTeOuwjH1GdMZOj-kWw--1DenXjxtlGdawMv7VPdYVLatbSn_NW1kfu5FRPaWDRKie6E66U_HIILAb6QN4OPNxFqjPLsOqp-jBXSgunNjz3_2G_62x2uMxQOalDbPgDsWhdBKqQ5b2yHW67QNo9asNvt2yYa6lExHH-tpQjtohfoEpUz5cHhALYBEU3pI0h25KFZY9b7KszbIynnosz78FTDtccu7DFQkg5X0hdSR-D9V48f1_077hlkTG90d_JoF1p4MG2frVc0JNdYgfI9HtILkIL1eVxLy3hDdhdA5xaUjOvvfqU9yU9m1WNTgvgpgC8AWb07wWxF_YX9fz1HCeCBAHdj8jQlImFfpm4Rr7h1MuRJtUrlivhTwa1TfCh2dAlUvhNTgRK-VS0jyns8qOEN-7KnEKHNv0rYE5dEsCxF4FkdaPGKZDQxTVoM18SV9huA342KNDt239n8sQDlm0ek6Z0GNzEinpibpaEyt)
---
This year's AmFest?

_I 've never seen more students eager to be part of it. _

**Nearly 6,000 are registered. Another 2,200 are on the waitlist. **

**And we only have a few days left to get them in. **

Fellow Patriot, these students aren't looking for entertainment...

They're looking for courage, purpose, and a movement to belong to.

They're stepping onto hostile campuses. They're getting flak from Leftist professors.

Many are leading Turning Point chapters in places where they're told to sit down, shut up -- or worse.

**They want to stand for America... _They just need a chance to stand with others who will, too. _**

And when they get to AmFest, it's not just the main stage that changes their lives.

Behind the lights and cameras, they sit in smaller breakout rooms -- face-to-face with staff and speakers who show them exactly how to lead.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3cfe16bfa9c24b34b6868888e6969524&_e=DEWC3atYTpgmCpMa5bN2HOXO-uXRFlooJZLDEQcnioWaRa-74PYHtG_-7PWeGqlYY6DBVvkhecTAhpGJeJ0BR-pSKbBU7qFa0V-pXG80iy4nLsOsXoBOE8IQ4HT6bGOEuJlV2cnsnCSEJ7UOMKesmKiYFhaFi6wxIZVaFKN1YZGulFVo1w3ezQ5lg3AU3eFW_FFpoV7aeKr1tJE4fukH2aycTeOuwjH1GdMZOj-kWw_M-w6girjxqlLxVXbKoIFG4R7X_PmVxFV1ANrxWPFzw4cN8ifq_1T_r3DdnTlo1kCG8iJ-kAhA1pDdX4m65Rv10IZjDNRjea70HxEkyuCTPSmLOixGm_3418xjbeVChjCxR0nCI3bQJy08mca13MBiEPzkuT1qeZIV7f94LSKscZuX2RJd0VxF4Dg5XaC80pJdKshRZ0gLa_47_i3sAplefkjizZyq_DWln5GZcrgZLouu85psIdXjkOwpgXhQyvjCisSnKOhxz86ExdXI8d-cyvtvKzANpn77Ueh8ZV95zifaiiqRkCABLcMXyXYtoWWadueBoBfWJPNQkItlVDPdNqpU06wu7FPqXgX3PgNozXncLlutQcD-1ijT1kHSlPJEOWPL4tvw20Z19L8AjdF44BYzBvz7qYySUdG8jcW3Id11r7KUNrpPsOFPguvxwKD5o_DenQ520eoS1_Lvg4HU)
---
They learn how to organize. How to launch and grow chapters. How to push back against the Left -- strategically and fearlessly.

They're trained to fight -- and win.

Because inspiration is just the beginning. We want every student walking out of AmFest equipped for the battlefield they're stepping into.

**Fellow Patriot, that 's where you can make a difference. **

**Every $50 you give today helps sponsor a student to attend AmericaFest. And today, your gift will be MATCHED -- dollar-for-dollar. **

That means:

🔥 $50 sends TWO students
🔥 $100 sends FOUR
🔥 $250 sends EIGHT, and more.

**[You can be the reason a future leader walks into AmFest this December — instead of staying home wondering if they’re alone in this fight.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3cfe16bfa9c24b34b6868888e6969524&_e=DEWC3atYTpgmCpMa5bN2HOXO-uXRFlooJZLDEQcnioWaRa-74PYHtG_-7PWeGqlYY6DBVvkhecTAhpGJeJ0BR-pSKbBU7qFa0V-pXG80iy4nLsOsXoBOE8IQ4HT6bGOEuJlV2cnsnCSEJ7UOMKesmKiYFhaFi6wxIZVaFKN1YZGulFVo1w3ezQ5lg3AU3eFW_FFpoV7aeKr1tJE4fukH2aycTeOuwjH1GdMZOj-kWw9X1rABEJ4Hb4_BG51mMPxnLtwV-1pzbz-MIPKa6g6JUCw9oMqUFuTUED5cBgBW4w_FoVh8MyCAwes6g2GPy9VX3xvpCuIrND4GWMQvfZUBjwU2CP3wWYra5JDGCzvRJqrLvQhN1We2w61_ivEoAgkeJfVy8CjHutguYSOE2LAANKFZCVzUhMkHymkpBm2IS7WxWOpoWUr22RsVuEzS7CJTB707gQCQGxOYdep0ONbRgDVAd-TF2RZSJ2RmUWdNHzmbZM5mLpf8lGagoAX07aGSzoSWHqUhjdr5efJ03rB9JuI1zWZWuqJ3yLXGMpF9eLD50lwayuIInRxzqZdUGp66q8Ks2yaCC-hDIPqnRWGqegYj-CpUNnKc8YVZrrj2UL_dxT6DZfyMLsF0xjGgBGfTmPJK_MeLnZqDThVrQim1qLG-vQgzX6UAtdSDg0R156o8ZFvjoDxYqWpkeMkzSv2X)**
---
[ **Sponsor a Student for AmFest
****& Double Your Impact**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3cfe16bfa9c24b34b6868888e6969524&_e=DEWC3atYTpgmCpMa5bN2HOXO-uXRFlooJZLDEQcnioWaRa-74PYHtG_-7PWeGqlYY6DBVvkhecTAhpGJeJ0BR-pSKbBU7qFa0V-pXG80iy4nLsOsXoBOE8IQ4HT6bGOEuJlV2cnsnCSEJ7UOMKesmKiYFhaFi6wxIZVaFKN1YZGulFVo1w3ezQ5lg3AU3eFW_FFpoV7aeKr1tJE4fukH2aycTeOuwjH1GdMZOj-kWw9lQkwwX3pA2mmvMhpdePUFBeAJrcr5QcI-Ua0bUVeG1VPrZThT-GYrbPRvkzp6C7da5RvIXYwgMBEI5RnaFpIty8E2IzOPUwoP4M4bbWLPU3tnPCFy9_elrg2aUCmDRch6WgD9jc1e3YTLuppxBFICxoxMnLEV9roR5IZ0c9cmAdyGBM9o8m0tIP632R1l_DPJYkGj9f8E-UcSXrRyjmtZN6tA8yNLLtFCgA5xr-wdb6d1sm_qhMioZ4ZHtecUR1nv4wSVBD3YYQi48i4fKD2WLUfURfMWYzd0OfKFlJKgkRV9Mw1AS44DKUOGhgzLceIvsURr95x8ex0p0J9KcygiuTiTHmD1BG832TFVug7yRejKhBKY27n-G6bX4Xljfof4kFxseDfWOJXAApJJQLdDVTwm74xaP4xO8cCsrN9Lss7ZloNPWDalpAelQP95bNB5__JhgIJNnmxTCwPjjzOi)
---
Every year, I see it firsthand:

Students walk in with doubts, with fears, with barely enough money to afford the flight.

They walk out with confidence, connection, and a new sense of calling.

I've seen them go home and start chapters. I've seen them run for office.

Many tell me -- even years later, that this one event changed everything.

_So no -- I'm not just asking you to sponsor an "event." _

**I 'm asking you to help change the trajectory of a young patriot. **

[**A young patriot who could be the next leader, the next fighter, the next firebrand that helps save this country.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3cfe16bfa9c24b34b6868888e6969524&_e=DEWC3atYTpgmCpMa5bN2HOXO-uXRFlooJZLDEQcnioWaRa-74PYHtG_-7PWeGqlYY6DBVvkhecTAhpGJeJ0BR-pSKbBU7qFa0V-pXG80iy4nLsOsXoBOE8IQ4HT6bGOEuJlV2cnsnCSEJ7UOMKesmKiYFhaFi6wxIZVaFKN1YZGulFVo1w3ezQ5lg3AU3eFW_FFpoV7aeKr1tJE4fukH2aycTeOuwjH1GdMZOj-kWw-p_dhPiBFyAXd86bQpHBNrhYhqPBJ80OK5HTHtlCgTmBIvk8MN236mUkZzq0B3Og6eTIFC8R8CwO0FXdDbdQs_-f3VF4Bl0dOnveoqsrNiJJOkt7oLeya5DrcJ3Yo0IUD6Hr4I_sRaDVrv0nqy5E1xULTspbbqxsq07PAr0GHQO5c_JEu2EGXKVWBDIQq1SKJQ27AqpgXhHA6pIeVBGeJ00wskDGfv-RrHueZ3e0I8DCYtViJm4im53156CYuxR4pAzy8SUVno21eV3yol6hpUdHaU_unZlxkskLn40ur4_-pFVqD_9sCfkvlEN9FOmv-bnA5H8mxxDYcKECuXZwttmNkMtVOFjMK56pugwWl2KcE2UT91wwBHt4IzvO_3aFU2W9zG4a7Q0QCnnLdzwdo8mUqGBKvfiPV4jnc-ho6bbA5pngz8XgcOYETzdzfj2k5Qe2ArzNoQ9Cipd_pFRxHG)
---
[ **Sponsor a Student for AmFest
****& Double Your Impact**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3cfe16bfa9c24b34b6868888e6969524&_e=DEWC3atYTpgmCpMa5bN2HOXO-uXRFlooJZLDEQcnioWaRa-74PYHtG_-7PWeGqlYY6DBVvkhecTAhpGJeJ0BR-pSKbBU7qFa0V-pXG80iy4nLsOsXoBOE8IQ4HT6bGOEuJlV2cnsnCSEJ7UOMKesmKiYFhaFi6wxIZVaFKN1YZGulFVo1w3ezQ5lg3AU3eFW_FFpoV7aeKr1tJE4fukH2aycTeOuwjH1GdMZOj-kWw9TlwTrMM2asGOtFF_yezRa-xXMTtXbqLkBl4wXuvnRVio2fkkDEKnhTNDSnwSUH66j5YZpNAQaBitSmD_0oKThO6qrjSlUnTrcmEVU2GnmcXJeiJpNTepbXGb7NkiW1nD0Bp4gpSLSncOJR8MTEzxsG-w_g7TNCt_Sx3y7qlVHGVda9jrv-njAjtxdq6JWItlZBxwPNFInxl-2UYcsnfKGXFCBJWrMpz1fzfDZYueDBFahOEmRn0wW5Jqw5ufpsIhqWwl7ekKL7HLa9ILYFJ7m6XnXFnITQCEw44OaojmBiUj5sXG2u4kky4Khi3T7zsJS8aGLdzmVHWBKtmvPCqdVBvX7GSGxsM5PNfM36Or-gEziF2zLuYWAW3gU1VzhXCEoNJ-NQBU4QahQ1M3hacawePzxfx8T2CmmnUNHFyB_1TrJpxnYCND09li_3vBM_0VjILHaOp6XjGrNt_6Xuec7)
---
Fellow Patriot, I know what Charlie would want right now.

He'd want every seat filled. He'd want AmFest to echo with boldness and fire.

He'd want us to fight like he's still backstage -- still calling for more sparks.

Most of all, he'd want every student who made the trip to believe they were part of something bigger than themselves.

To walk in searching for purpose -- and leave filled with it. .

Let's make sure every young patriot who wants to fight for this country gets their chance -- and gets to Phoenix this December.
---
| | **For Charlie, **

**Lauren Toncich **
Vice President of Events
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3cfe16bfa9c24b34b6868888e6969524&_e=DEWC3atYTpgmCpMa5bN2HOXO-uXRFlooJZLDEQcnioWaRa-74PYHtG_-7PWeGqlYY6DBVvkhecTAhpGJeJ0BR-pSKbBU7qFa0V-pXG80iy4nLsOsXoBOE8IQ4HT6bGOEuJlV2cnsnCSEJ7UOMKesmKiYFhaFi6wxIZVaFKN1YZGulFVo1w3ezQ5lg3AU3eFW_FFpoV7aeKr1tJE4fukH2aycTeOuwjH1GdMZOj-kWw9e7mX8wX2OX6g80WiJcXpcBJ7eTt9h3ByCrgUZswd9_E-m4bitlIAgQpmWtawWzimlzdtO47Ku-V-i_epXVm_N7D-rrH4GRL9dYkB3GH63l0CI5hcYNVYzs9Hs8YepYKf4hxUBib_hcn8gCcvMKTHM6bmuBmhnGLgSdpkz29-F2nTIsY9sM0IwCk7aI4F1Vwt_TqUxPJBqaQLMcndaOs676u6EHQBUAN3qDDEv_vBEmHRDQqFaYR1hHyZraB316zodwmOmPdA_2N94H2ISIOOSK2PqSUZsdOGh9TDfmYupyouLJJvd0PIQ4KeNzUgHDjfulIHmkFhM6HjafJLUcyovgvitaDoKd01CB7u9JDEOLkbBV5x7bWsGFKpRlLaquhgcW6-SBpO8zNxeiGnkh39TFIT-Ih5V371YpyXQ2mLugLn26mIHw7aLd4cfsL-p3dlN8fsmsIaUdqxbuto1IsOc)

But it will be the most important one we've ever hosted.

Help us fill the room he loved -- with students ready to carry his mission forward.

clean_body: Only days left...| | | | | Hi Fellow Patriot, My name is Lauren Toncich -- and for the past seven years, I've helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event. Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable. I've never emailed you directly before. But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room... Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team. Above: That 's me with Charlie, backstage at last year's AmFest making sure every detail was perfect before showtime. At the heart of every single Turning Point event is this one truth: Young Americans deserve a stage worthy of the fight they 're in. And AmericaFest -- especially this year -- is our most important stage of all. This December 18 -21 in Phoenix, thousands of students will walk into the most powerful conservative gathering in America. It will be our first AmFest without Charlie. This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards. Charlie poured everything into these events, because he believed students deserved more than beige ballrooms and lazy lectures. He believed they needed to FEEL the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world. Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: " Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash... But because he knew energy moves people. Environments shape conviction. And atmosphere matters when you 're calling students into the fight of their lives. This year's AmFest? I 've never seen more students eager to be part of it. Nearly 6,000 are registered. Another 2,200 are on the waitlist. And we only have a few days left to get them in. Fellow Patriot, these students aren't looking for entertainment... They're looking for courage, purpose, and a movement to belong to. They're stepping onto hostile campuses. They're getting flak from Leftist professors. Many are leading Turning Point chapters in places where they're told to sit down, shut up -- or worse. They want to stand for America... They just need a chance to stand with others who will, too. And when they get to AmFest, it's not just the main stage that changes their lives. Behind the lights and cameras, they sit in smaller breakout rooms -- face-to-face with staff and speakers who show them exactly how to lead. They learn how to organize. How to launch and grow chapters. How to push back against the Left -- strategically and fearlessly. They're trained to fight -- and win. Because inspiration is just the beginning. We want every student walking out of AmFest equipped for the battlefield they're stepping into. Fellow Patriot, that 's where you can make a difference. Every $50 you give today helps sponsor a student to attend AmericaFest. And today, your gift will be MATCHED -- dollar-for-dollar. That means: 🔥 $50 sends TWO students 🔥 $100 sends FOUR 🔥 $250 sends EIGHT, and more. Every year, I see it firsthand: Students walk in with doubts, with fears, with barely enough money to afford the flight. They walk out with confidence, connection, and a new sense of calling. I've seen them go home and start chapters. I've seen them run for office. Many tell me -- even years later, that this one event changed everything. So no -- I'm not just asking you to sponsor an "event." I 'm asking you to help change the trajectory of a young patriot. Fellow Patriot, I know what Charlie would want right now. He'd want every seat filled. He'd want AmFest to echo with boldness and fire. He'd want us to fight like he's still backstage -- still calling for more sparks. Most of all, he'd want every student who made the trip to believe they were part of something bigger than themselves. To walk in searching for purpose -- and leave filled with it. . Let's make sure every young patriot who wants to fight for this country gets their chance -- and gets to Phoenix this December. | | For Charlie, Lauren Toncich Vice President of Events Turning Point USA P.S. This is our first AmericaFest without Charlie. But it will be the most important one we've ever hosted. Help us fill the room he loved -- with students ready to carry his mission forward. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
This was a tough week.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1984%2E791427%2Et-Uw-n)
Friend, Ilhan here. I want to say **thank you.**
This was a tough week. Trump and the extremist far-right decided to go all-in on racism, hatred, and cruelty.
They have singled out Somali-Americans, called my friends and me “garbage”, targeted us with ICE, and rallied their MAGA troops to spread hate across the country.
But this movement came together in an incredible way to support our campaign and enable us to keep up the all-important fight to defeat this fascist administration.
We have seen an outpouring of support from people like Robac, a truck driver from Minneapolis who donated $50 this week.
People like Suzanne, an engineer from St Louis Park who donated $5 yesterday. Or Luul, a teacher from Minneapolis who chipped in $20.
And the list goes on — thousands and thousands of people who stand with this movement and believe in what we’re fighting for.
So again: Thank you. Thank you, thank you, thank you. Grassroots donations are what make everything we do possible, from organizing our neighbors here in Minneapolis to building a winning campaign for our progressive values.
And if you haven’t made a donation to our campaign this week — or if you’re ready to add one more today — this is your opportunity to stand with us as we take on Trump head-first:
**[Make a contribution to power our work and stand with Minneapolis today. $5, $10 — the amount doesn’t matter as long as you chip in whatever you can afford and help us show that we have an unstoppable team on our side.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251206-1-180&t=2&akid=1984%2E791427%2Et-Uw-n)

This is a grassroots movement, which means our strength is in our numbers. We can defeat Trump. We can defeat the extremists. We can pass an agenda that puts people first and recognizes the dignity of every single American. I’m not giving up.

Washington D.C., 20033
clean_body: This was a tough week. Friend, Ilhan here. I want to say thank you. This was a tough week. Trump and the extremist far-right decided to go all-in on racism, hatred, and cruelty. They have singled out Somali-Americans, called my friends and me “garbage”, targeted us with ICE, and rallied their MAGA troops to spread hate across the country. But this movement came together in an incredible way to support our campaign and enable us to keep up the all-important fight to defeat this fascist administration. We have seen an outpouring of support from people like Robac, a truck driver from Minneapolis who donated $50 this week. People like Suzanne, an engineer from St Louis Park who donated $5 yesterday. Or Luul, a teacher from Minneapolis who chipped in $20. And the list goes on — thousands and thousands of people who stand with this movement and believe in what we’re fighting for. So again: Thank you. Thank you, thank you, thank you. Grassroots donations are what make everything we do possible, from organizing our neighbors here in Minneapolis to building a winning campaign for our progressive values. And if you haven’t made a donation to our campaign this week — or if you’re ready to add one more today — this is your opportunity to stand with us as we take on Trump head-first: If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | This is a grassroots movement, which means our strength is in our numbers. We can defeat Trump. We can defeat the extremists. We can pass an agenda that puts people first and recognizes the dignity of every single American. I’m not giving up. In solidarity, — Ilhan PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Jack Schlossberg
subject: I'm running for Congress!!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=120625_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=120625_1]
It's official...
I'm running to represent NY-12 in Congress! This is the district where I was born and raised, and the place that five generations of my family have called home.
Hi Peter, I'm Jack Schlossberg, and my grandfather, President Kennedy, is my hero.
In high school, I spent hours watching his speeches. He taught us all that politics isn't about serving yourself — it's about serving others. And that's exactly why I'm running for Congress.
This isn't going to be your average campaign — we’re at the forefront of a movement backed by real people who are ready for a new generation of leadership. I won't be bought or intimidated. Instead, I'll be relying on folks like you. So, if you're willing to be one of the first donors to my campaign, will you split a donation between myself and Real Texas PAC right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=120625_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jack Schlossberg and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=120625_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=120625_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=120625_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=120625_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=120625_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=120625_1&amount=25]
I've always been passionate about politics — you can probably gather as much if you've seen any of my social media posts :) I pride myself on my hot (correct!) takes. But public service has always been my driving force. I come from a long legacy of public service, from my great-great-grandparents to my mother, Caroline Kennedy.
I have big shoes to fill. I've known it all my life. But this is even bigger than living up to my family name. This is about serving the people of New York — the city that shaped me into the person I am today.
Right now, our country is in crisis. Donald Trump and his buddies (my cousin RFK Jr. — to name just one) are tanking the economy, attacking free speech, and sowing distrust in decades of scientific research.
We need to revive empathy and effort. I want to be excited and feel hopeful about our future, and I want my fellow New Yorkers to feel the same way. I believe in a politics that works for the people it was intended to serve, and I'm ready to fight for it.
And Peter, I happen to think caring is cool.
None of this will be easy. But in the words of my grandfather, I'm doing this "Not because it is easy but because it is hard."
Together, we can build a new Congress and a New York City that works for everyone. Will you join our movement today by splitting a donation of any amount between my campaign and Real Texas PAC ? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=120625_1]
Talk soon,
Jack
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-adelita?refcode=120625_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-adelita?refcode=120625_1]

1150 N Loop 1604 W

Fellow American,

Let's cut to the chase — **Democrats just used the courts to try to rewrite Texas's elections.**

A panel of federal judges blocked our congressional map. Not because it's unlawful. Not because it's unconstitutional. But because it threatens the Democratic Party's grip on power.

This is not about "protecting voters." This is about **protecting Democrats**.

And they're hoping Texans just roll over.

**Here's my response:**

**I'm _STILL_ running in Texas' 35th Congressional District.**

**I'm _STILL_ fighting.**

**And I'm _STILL_ going to win this race.**

[**RUSH A DONATION TO DEFEND TX-35**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b15707a3e07d4d6a82fa24513e17b42e&_e=F05Ho6VXhbvv61JFbkEOXJGOJmD-Ty0bxh24ySNWmxLGxEkH-o09kfE6vYuaTgpkSwevHMWKW4dfWmfrxXu3f4Th6HTxe-JrAN__TH0bjY-7j3ymGtABrvdWJux5R7ZKqKEZ616rS6p7dUOD20vJm_T4w34gFhrmv0-4F4H2jQ6SPqwb0fBXwoEhZz_5eT2_g_dQJ7zVELd5XwDPpUjWNSbRrVZNV1YHV0W8JpVv_7usVDK11pkjpQDweWRkwxAVmHSB-wuL0rBkXojqxtHMdz7myxNJ0WjsusQY7SsOFaHh78EFj4ANDVMHfyVzPXs4bYSdvAC4-s4LfNYmjqXAcZLMHT9iSGvWfJBK8Zpgq4a2m7btcdFWcATIIJOIiJVz0bdt3yNWjvVE8t9ZCzcg7FtP2wVmmxgWprDaNr4KzWR7oKFwUSt5rStVLERFfU5iihUoZdjV8MJOUdf6qbcU64-QD5O7cppt5N4xDx5pzZYb01GyjgKkK66hHowfWSXViUqa40vaFcUq095qM4YvwH6EEwYVk7is6920gxP3BI_1SC6Km0PSpiRi5qVejlCdMVdi19cVpguZ8MT_DTlyskHdmxSY3FD4JbPXj2vuNKgn8XoRunzgK_teeekWG82TzeL90gWTA1vfOJHH1SLpGnHCrhTfSfI1I2lGai7aWY5m7NRPevSXBoRMFJgzZZfbRw3LrKbC5_ms63GhLQ5e-e7kRngwEbpmIMyjl3Pwo595109l0yIhIXjGXDjrfeKbMf2pRuPaASz1nBKYdCS6CkuIn04VXojL3NUI5CglxFU%3D)
This ruling is a blatant attempt to interfere with our election — to slice up real communities and force Washington's will on Texas. The Legislature passed a fair map. It finally reflects the people who actually live, work, and raise families here.

But Democrats can't win TX-35 on the issues. So they're trying to win it with lawfare.

_Not a chance._

If they think this ruling is going to scare us out of this race, they're dead wrong. All it does is light a fire under our campaign — and make this fight even bigger.

[**But to show we're not backing down for one single second, I need reinforcements right now.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b15707a3e07d4d6a82fa24513e17b42e&_e=F05Ho6VXhbvv61JFbkEOXJGOJmD-Ty0bxh24ySNWmxLGxEkH-o09kfE6vYuaTgpkSwevHMWKW4dfWmfrxXu3f4Th6HTxe-JrAN__TH0bjY-7j3ymGtABrvdWJux5R7ZKqKEZ616rS6p7dUOD20vJm_T4w34gFhrmv0-4F4H2jQ6SPqwb0fBXwoEhZz_5eT2_g_dQJ7zVELd5XwDPpUjWNSbRrVZNV1YHV0W8JpVv_7usVDK11pkjpQDweWRkwxAVmHSB-wuL0rBkXojqxtHMdz7myxNJ0WjsusQY7SsOFaE-L71EzAySX9y3c6i7q0gdXR44BynqchBPoWQ9Zt9yp1-py2vDjMfWd8G3nwLiwe3pliB98XWuhs9J5NOGTiVyBS_pOAekkflANgMtVvyigHxcvpW9hxij9ZcR24jR4VZ2H7lMEgm7gh8ryHPGxPpHz4i5boj5kRryOptSS7i7i_IOXJfsf5OSyrTlgi7uXM9p6q5UVQbE1IQdcLNJKN_H9cXQnY85DlInOBgWNoZX7dlvxaRfdNMU3J_uhqs-78-gJZYVKBq1FyO2ftKUNZsCUO428DWAl_G4la7UZzIrIIp9m62MY-E5UnUwdm6ZX690tbyegMe61dIJrIh8iT-jiKv-h8AEaaugCQbbMZWHQhPDFCcA7MXyaLOgq1HdZVSMAFl-pm7nPXT1-xB40uASpH9dDzRDKSAKKDpGI6CVrfLijpPy4FFBFzlp_HhbrE0mUfiRD11PT-3JJ5Y6YeF4ltvL8oXo1tnr8LmoYCn05a_dMfWiVDgm1d0xYPEkvuk%3D)

clean_body: Did you see the breaking news? | Fellow American, great news coming from the Supreme Court. Democrats failed. But Fellow American, they aren't going to back down. They are going to throw whatever they can to defeat us, including flooding Texas with liberal dollars. I need your help. Thanks, Josh Cortez \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Josh Cortez Date: Wed, Nov 19, 2025 at 5:17 PM Subject: They're Trying to Erase TX-35 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Fellow American, Let's cut to the chase — Democrats just used the courts to try to rewrite Texas's elections. A panel of federal judges blocked our congressional map. Not because it's unlawful. Not because it's unconstitutional. But because it threatens the Democratic Party's grip on power. This is not about "protecting voters." This is about protecting Democrats. And they're hoping Texans just roll over. Here's my response: I'm STILL running in Texas' 35th Congressional District. I'm STILL fighting. And I'm STILL going to win this race. This ruling is a blatant attempt to interfere with our election — to slice up real communities and force Washington's will on Texas. The Legislature passed a fair map. It finally reflects the people who actually live, work, and raise families here. But Democrats can't win TX-35 on the issues. So they're trying to win it with lawfare. Not a chance. If they think this ruling is going to scare us out of this race, they're dead wrong. All it does is light a fire under our campaign — and make this fight even bigger. The Left is already fundraising off this ruling. Texans — NOT unelected judges — will decide who represents this district. Josh Cortez Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-35 | | Paid for by Josh Cortez for Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

subject: President Trump Coming to NEPA

body:
Request a Ticket Here!

| | | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| |

Good Morning,
As you may have already heard, **President Donald Trump** will be making a visit to Northeastern Pennsylvania, and we’re excited to share the details with you. The President is scheduled to appear at **Mount Airy Casino** in Monroe County on **Tuesday, December 9th, at 6:00 PM** for what promises to be an energizing and memorable event. We wanted to make sure you had the opportunity to attend and be part of this special moment. If you’re interested in joining us, click the link below to request your ticket directly from the White House. We hope you’ll take advantage of this chance to hear from the President and connect with friends and neighbors from across the region. We look forward to seeing you in the beautiful Poconos for an evening you won’t want to miss!Best Regards,Team Rob
