name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’d like to explain why I have to keep asking.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Do you have a minute to hear me out?
| | |
---
**Derek, I’m sure you know already that I have to ask for your support for our campaign. I don’t like to bother you with so many of these requests, but failing to meet our fundraising goals could sink our campaign, so I have to keep asking. Here’s why:**
We already know that this could be the most competitive U.S. Senate election of 2026, and the polls are getting closer and closer. Winning won’t be easy, but we have a blueprint to succeed. _You see, we’ve done it before._
Both of my elections for Governor of North Carolina were close, and both of those victories came in years that Donald Trump carried the state in the presidential election. We won by connecting with folks from all kinds of communities and making it clear that people are my priority. Not a political party, not personal power — just making things better for folks right here in North Carolina. This is what we’ll do again.
**But I also know that this race for the U.S. Senate is unlike anything we’ve faced yet.**
To win, we will have to enact an ambitious campaign of voter outreach, meeting with folks in Raleigh and Charlotte and Asheville, but also in the most rural, hardest-to-reach corners of the state, just as we did before. That doesn’t come cheap. And we will also have to go toe-to-toe with the GOP’s massive campaign of spending against me.
The path to the U.S. Senate majority runs through North Carolina, so national Republicans are uniting around my GOP-insider opponent. PACs tied to Senate GOP leadership are already running ads attacking me, and we expect GOP groups will spend hundreds of millions more before this campaign ends.
**We have to meet them dollar for dollar in spending** — on TV, online, in the mail, and wherever else we can reach NC voters. In a race this close, every vote — and every cent — will count.
**[I’m asking you to split a donation between our campaign and John Fetterman's now so we don’t fall behind. I’m relying on you to give anything that fits in your budget right away.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52383?t=1&akid=10461%2E434096%2EEcd8U1)**
| | [Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52383?t=2&akid=10461%2E434096%2EEcd8U1)
---
Thanks so much,

Roy Cooper
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk344-bu-fl-footer&t=3&refcode2=10461_434096_Ecd8U1&akid=10461%2E434096%2EEcd8U1)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://X.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
clean_body: Do you have a minute to hear me out? | | | Derek, I’m sure you know already that I have to ask for your support for our campaign. I don’t like to bother you with so many of these requests, but failing to meet our fundraising goals could sink our campaign, so I have to keep asking. Here’s why: We already know that this could be the most competitive U.S. Senate election of 2026, and the polls are getting closer and closer. Winning won’t be easy, but we have a blueprint to succeed. You see, we’ve done it before. Both of my elections for Governor of North Carolina were close, and both of those victories came in years that Donald Trump carried the state in the presidential election. We won by connecting with folks from all kinds of communities and making it clear that people are my priority. Not a political party, not personal power — just making things better for folks right here in North Carolina. This is what we’ll do again. But I also know that this race for the U.S. Senate is unlike anything we’ve faced yet. To win, we will have to enact an ambitious campaign of voter outreach, meeting with folks in Raleigh and Charlotte and Asheville, but also in the most rural, hardest-to-reach corners of the state, just as we did before. That doesn’t come cheap. And we will also have to go toe-to-toe with the GOP’s massive campaign of spending against me. The path to the U.S. Senate majority runs through North Carolina, so national Republicans are uniting around my GOP-insider opponent. PACs tied to Senate GOP leadership are already running ads attacking me, and we expect GOP groups will spend hundreds of millions more before this campaign ends. We have to meet them dollar for dollar in spending — on TV, online, in the mail, and wherever else we can reach NC voters. In a race this close, every vote — and every cent — will count. | | Thanks so much, Roy Cooper | | | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

They’re wrong.

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I just spoke with President Trump…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor
body:
What I’m about to share is that important.
What I’m about to share is that important.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9534431/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvMnE1dFd2YlhtRg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMDY/LbmNsbnpCU0s3cQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNiZ0JTYUUzZjVLMFdscw/gaTRmJg/scod0ac3acb)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Friend,
---
What I’m about to tell you is of grave importance – _in fact, it’s so vital that I just spoke to President Trump _directly_ about it_ – so I hope you’ll read every word.
---
After sweeping Republican victories last November, most Americans _expected_ that the corrupt Deep State that weaponized our government to target President Trump and his allies would be dismantled forever.
---
**_But unfortunately, the Deep State is still alive and well in America!_**
---
**That’s why Deep State operatives colluded with House Democrats – led by Trump impeachment architect Jamie Raskin – to try to BLOCK my provision to prevent the FBI from secretly conducting investigations against federal candidates in order to interfere in elections!**
---
However, I refused to back down – and after speaking to President Trump, he gave my provision his full support, ensuring that it will officially become the law of the land!
---
_Why am I making such a big deal about this?_
---
Under Barack Obama, the FBI was weaponized by James Comey to conduct an illegal, partisan witch hunt against President Trump in an attempt to interfere in the 2016 presidential election and strip _YOU_ of your right to elect the candidate of your choice.
---
Under Joe Biden, the FBI was once again weaponized by Democrats and the Deep State to SPY on Republican members of Congress as part of the sweeping Arctic Frost wiretapping scandal!
---
**Stopping any future weaponization of the FBI needed to be a priority for our House GOP majority – and my provision will ensure the FBI is NEVER secretly weaponized by the Deep State against Republicans ever again.**
---
That’s why Democrats and the Deep State were so determined to stop it at any cost!
---
At the end of the day, this would be a significant legislative win delivered against the illegal weaponization of the Deep State — but of course, there’s much more work to do.
---
You can rest assured, Friend...
---
_I won’t rest until we’ve delivered _FULL_ accountability and multiple legislative fixes to arguably the biggest illegal corruption and government weaponization issue of all time. _
---
There’s no excuse for not getting this done, Friend.
---
**__The Deep State must be FULLY dismantled if America is to survive!__**
---
I’ve been leading the battle against the Deep State for years now.
---
**Through tough questioning in a March 2017 intelligence hearing, I was the first to expose the illegal cover-up by Comey and the Deep State of their political weaponization of intelligence agencies in our elections.**
---
That forced Comey to admit _under oath_ that he ignored proper protocol regarding the notification of Congress when he launched his illegal witch hunt targeting President Trump.
---
Ever since that day, I’ve been taking the offensive against these Leftist tyrants to ensure such a despicable abuse of power _NEVER_ happens again.
---
_**I may be running for Governor of New York, but I’m still a member of Congress – and as long as I’m here, I’m going to take my job, and _my oath to the people_ , seriously.**_
---
If that makes headlines or creates enemies, I don’t care: I will **ALWAYS** do everything in my power to take the fight to the Deep State and put America First!
---
But to win this battle and return power to the American people once and for all, I’m counting on support from generous America First conservatives like _YOU_.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help me continue fighting to DISMANTLE the Deep State and END the weaponization of government in both New York and Washington D.C. – _and help unlock a 600% MATCH_.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25 >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $75 >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Thank you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rep. Elise Stefanik
Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership

My day with Detroit's small businesses

| |
---|---|---

# [Mocktails, hustle, and heart ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=180841551&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwODQxNTUxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjUwNDI0MzMsImV4cCI6MTc2NzYzNDQzMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.sjEmTPg590qBG7kp_eIrhCJivZrUh5R5GMO4CypZ9zw)
### My day with Detroit's small businesses
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Dec 6
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..e7_b71Frkc3ZhMleWm8-mXoq2yiN09t4rKtMNlJ92rY?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/mocktails-hustle-and-heart?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Michigan was built by entrepreneurial grit. And Detroit's small businesses do it as well as anybody.
This Small Business Saturday, I spent the day walking the historic Avenue of Fashion in Detroit, visiting shops, greeting employees, and listening to the stories of people who make our local economy run.
Let me tell you what I saw: passion, creativity, hustle - _and a whole lot of Michigan heart._ From new pop-ups to neighborhood staples, the energy on Saturday was palpable.
One stop I especially loved: **[Mockery Zero Proof](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4a0830de-231e-45e0-8ca2-8e961b4d095d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , Detroit's first non-alcoholic bottle shop, now coming up on its first anniversary. It's a woman-owned, Black-owned business that perfectly embodies the spirit of innovation and resilience that defines our state. _(When you 're done reading this, click the link above to check out their website!)_
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7f2c878e-28a8-4b8e-a13f-03070ffb3b2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The women at Mockery aren't just selling non-alcoholic drinks - they're building community, reimagining retail, and creating space for joy and connection.
I love seeing places like Mockery thrive, because I know what it takes to build something from scratch. My parents owned a small landscaping company, and let me tell you - it took serious Michigan grit.
My dad was often climbing into a truck to plow snow at 4 a.m while my mom would spend the day helping customers, and they both might be handling paperwork at night. They worked hard. They built something. **And they taught me what perseverance, community, and rolling up your sleeves looks like.**
I thought about them as I walked the Avenue on Saturday. I thought about how critical small businesses are to Michigan - how Mockery's success is Detroit's success, and Detroit's success is all of ours.
That's why, in Congress, I'm fighting to increase access to capital for minority-owned businesses, boost federal support for local entrepreneurs, ensure pop-ups can grow into permanent storefronts, and use federal money to help businesses get off the ground.
Small businesses create jobs, build wealth, and turn neighborhoods into destinations. **They deserve more than just one Saturday of support - they deserve smart policies that help them grow, year-round.**
To every small business owner out there: _Thank you._ Your work matters. Your voices are heard. Your dreams are worth fighting for.
Let's keep showing up for each other. Let's keep building. Together.
More soon,
💙 Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f6c37c8d-b765-49a8-aadd-c32ffe5559ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

---
| | | [Restack](https://substack..e7_b71Frkc3ZhMleWm8-mXoq2yiN09t4rKtMNlJ92rY?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

(C) 2025 Haley for MI
33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009
[Unsubscribe](https://substack.._QWA3Wbg3ryWlQF_kgKsqa8QH9wH4KbF9K6mFX9vjqg?)

name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: Reaching millions of Wisconsinites takes time, people power, and real resources
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251206-887&t=1&akid=889%2E294397%2Ecl_kuu)
More than _2,300,000_ people voted in the last Wisconsin Supreme Court race — the highest turnout ever for a nonpartisan spring election.
And because of far-right billionaires like Elon Musk getting involved, it became the most expensive judicial election in American history.
This is what we’re heading into again.
**Once again, Elon Musk is teasing that he’s going to get back into politics, and the stakes of this election are sky-high.**
If we want to ensure the Wisconsin Supreme Court is impartial and fair, and that our constitutional rights are protected, we have to take action now.
Reaching millions of Wisconsinites takes time, people power, and real resources. And unlike the right-wing special interests backing our extreme opponent, Maria Lazar, we’re building this campaign the Wisconsin way — from the ground up.
That’s why we’re asking: [**Can you chip in $10 today to help us reach voters across the state and power Judge Chris Taylor’s campaign?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251206_1_ak.pVJ8hG&amount=10&refcode=em20251206-887&t=3&akid=889%2E294397%2Ecl_kuu)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251206_1_ak.pVJ8hG&amount=10&refcode=em20251206-887&t=22&akid=889%2E294397%2Ecl_kuu)**
Thank you,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251206-887&t=23&refcode2=889_294397_cl_kuu&akid=889%2E294397%2Ecl_kuu)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=889%2E294397%2Ecl_kuu)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=889%2E294397%2Ecl_kuu)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)

PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701

name: Josh Harder
subject: This corruption has to stop
body:
The truth about money in Washington. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120757164/587267326/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2IzYWI4ZTQtY2RkMi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=74wMtpjTta7JVbSGlr0XNgs7a9Gqdt8rRo7s5AtNhK8=) | Peter, The salary for a member of Congress is $174,000. So how come it seems like so many become millionaires overnight? _The answer is simple: corruption is running rampant in Washington._ [_**It has to stop. Add your name to support my new anti-corruption bill today!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120757165/587267333/-1971896287?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2IzYWI4ZTQtY2RkMi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=74wMtpjTta7JVbSGlr0XNgs7a9Gqdt8rRo7s5AtNhK8=&emci=8b9ef2dd-cdd2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=cb3ab8e4-cdd2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=6455652) [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120757166/587267338/-1971896287?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2IzYWI4ZTQtY2RkMi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=74wMtpjTta7JVbSGlr0XNgs7a9Gqdt8rRo7s5AtNhK8=&emci=8b9ef2dd-cdd2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=cb3ab8e4-cdd2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=6455652) This is all happening in plain sight. The President is cashing in on everything from celebrity dinners to Qatar jets to meme coins, and no one is stepping in to stop it. Meanwhile, lobbyists and special interests are paying to curry favor with members of Congress as they make millions from the stock market, and it’s not a coincidence that their portfolios are outperforming the average American when they are the ones writing the laws. **That’s why I introduced a new anti-corruption bill that will prevent politicians from making money off their positions and ban Congressional stock trading once and for all.** [_**This is something every American can get behind! But I need your help to show the momentum behind this new legislation. clean_body: The truth about money in Washington. | = | Peter, The salary for a member of Congress is $174,000. So how come it seems like so many become millionaires overnight? The answer is simple: corruption is running rampant in Washington. This is all happening in plain sight. The President is cashing in on everything from celebrity dinners to Qatar jets to meme coins, and no one is stepping in to stop it. Meanwhile, lobbyists and special interests are paying to curry favor with members of Congress as they make millions from the stock market, and it’s not a coincidence that their portfolios are outperforming the average American when they are the ones writing the laws. That’s why I introduced a new anti-corruption bill that will prevent politicians from making money off their positions and ban Congressional stock trading once and for all. Thanks for your support! – Josh *

name: Crow HQ
subject: Jason refuses to be silenced

body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
FIRST: Jason Crow and his fellow Democratic veterans in Congress released a video standing with our service members and reminding them of their duty to refuse illegal orders.

THEN: Donald Trump called for Jason to be arrested and executed. Trump even directed the FBI to target Jason to try and harass him. The President is using legal harassment as a way to silence his political opponents.

NOW: House Republicans are falling in line with Trump. They just introduced a resolution to condemn Jason on the House floor. The attacks from Trump and his lackeys keep rolling in, but Jason refuses to be intimidated — and we're counting on this team to have his back.

Will you rush a donation now to help Jason fight back against Trump’s attacks and his unlawful use of our military? Whether it’s $5, $10, or more, your donation will send a message that we won’t back down. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-dec25]

name: Graham Platner
subject: Nothing pisses me off more than getting a fundraising email from Democrats talking about how they’re fighting fascism
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=120625_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=120625_2]
Peter,
Nothing pisses me off more than getting a fundraising text from Democrats talking about how they’re fighting fascism... Because it’s such B.S. We’re not idiots. Everyone knows most of them aren’t doing jack right now to fight back.
People are being kidnapped into unmarked vans by masked police. There is a genocide happening in Palestine. Literal billionaires have taken over our government. And all Democratic leadership can do is send us another fundraising text?
My name is Graham Platner, and I’m the Marine Corps veteran and Democrat running for U.S. Senate against Susan Collins here in Maine. I’m not going to speak in platitudes or shy away from what I believe. There is a war going on in this country, and the oligarchy and the fascists are winning right now.
Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Republican senator in the country. We have an opportunity to replace her with a working-class Democrat – one who won’t take money from corporations or AIPAC.
But I’m not a wealthy guy, and we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win. If I’m going to be able to defeat Susan Collins and flip this Senate seat blue, I need folks like you to chip in now to my campaign.
Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC to help me defeat Susan Collins, flip Maine blue, and take back the Senate with a Democrat who will actually fight to defend our democracy like Democrats oughta be? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=120625_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Graham Platner and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=120625_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=120625_2&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=120625_2&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=120625_2&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=120625_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=120625_2&amount=25]
In the history of this nation, power has never been just willingly handed to the people. Another mealy-mouthed Democrat isn’t going to fix things or protect our constitution.
I’m ready to go to the United States Senate and fight – but I need your help today to get there. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=120625_2]
In solidarity,
Graham Platner

Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

subject: The House is in chaos, and Mike Johnson is to blame.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120757705/587269017/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Q0ZWM1Mi1kMGQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c8zJxT7mVXKowdWhBG4uDQYsjQ5AOzCfapUwjNhtLzo=&emci=f09bb0bd-f6d1-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=83d4ec52-d0d2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=15820338)
---
If you've been watching what's happening in the House right now, you already know: **Mike Johnson has completely lost control, Peter.**

His party is fighting itself. Members are forcing chaotic floor votes, pushing personal agendas, and turning every disagreement into a political spectacle. Even Republicans are admitting the House is in "chaos" and filled with _"knuckleheads."_

This isn't what governing should look like. It's not what the American people deserve or what anyone signed up for. Democrats are trying to bring us back to a Congress that **actually** works—where constituents' priorities lead the way, not partisan stunts or self-serving power plays.

But as long as Mike Johnson is Speaker, and as long as the GOP controls the House, dysfunction is going to be the new normal. The chaos, the spectacle, the infighting—it's all getting in the way of actual progress for Americans who are counting on us to do our jobs. One thing is crystal clear: _**It's time to kick Mike Johnson to the curb.**_

Kim is doing her part every day to take back the House for Democrats, including doing everything to hold her seat right here in WA-08. clean_body: If you've been watching what's happening in the House right now, you already know: Mike Johnson has completely lost control, Peter. His party is fighting itself. Members are forcing chaotic floor votes, pushing personal agendas, and turning every disagreement into a political spectacle. Even Republicans are admitting the House is in "chaos" and filled with "knuckleheads." This isn't what governing should look like. It's not what the American people deserve or what anyone signed up for. Democrats are trying to bring us back to a Congress that actually works—where constituents' priorities lead the way, not partisan stunts or self-serving power plays. But as long as Mike Johnson is Speaker, and as long as the GOP controls the House, dysfunction is going to be the new normal. The chaos, the spectacle, the infighting—it's all getting in the way of actual progress for Americans who are counting on us to do our jobs. One thing is crystal clear: It's time to kick Mike Johnson to the curb. Kim is doing her part every day to take back the House for Democrats, including doing everything to hold her seat right here in WA-08. She's stepping up for Washington families and fighting back against the extremism that's taken over the House floor. But she can't flip the House on her own. fnddgqact_TSettx&utmmedium=email&refcode2=83d4ec52-d0d2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Q0ZWM1Mi1kMGQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c8zJxT7mVXKowdWhBG4uDQYsjQ5AOzCfapUwjNhtLzo= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. # [Cancel Trump's Ridiculous White House Ballroom](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9edd9f22-747f-4544-b958-bebc03a04f0b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30c9ffbc-281d-49ff-9d9e-2d4f978cc7da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(After you take this action, come see others on on[our new Substack page](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70d63670-4015-4ae1-871e-2b7b21266779/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)! Thanks to the [20,000+](https://default.salsalabs.org/T01cbfa1f-3e81-4fd9-af2f-43524f3b2728/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) there!)_ Inflation is rising, job creation has plummeted, and the deficit is at an all-time high. America is on the wrong track, but the solution is clear: **Ballroom! Amirite? ** Trump's 90,000 foot, gold-gilded monstrosity (seriously, it looks like the goose that lays golden eggs had explosive diarrhea) has been a disaster since it started, and it's time to end the stupidity. And now Trump has fired the architect, and gotten a new one, who will probably be succeeded by a dozen others, none of whome will actually get paid. We don't need a White House ballroom twice the size of the White House itself. It's DC, and there are about eleventy million event spaces of every size across the city that could be used. And if you really want to expand the space at the White House itself, fine, but add what you need, not enough to have Earth over for dinner. [**Take action, and end this now: "Cancel Trump's Ridiculous White House Ballroom"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2622e009-ff86-4ebb-8cdd-375490b4487f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: Americans can’t afford to “wait this out”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=VIv3Mo43jQTqgdViK8SFc2yj28w%2BR%2BoSJxPPq5wdct0kKDraDUDVAgRot8xCG%2B8xWDsjhXgDL06MCVMjbi2G%2FEZcXk6nSPIYMPzLghxu1BnT8Hn4n9QJeF5G66xE5eF5MY6Y9oHfeyMPvaU6KfpFgrhLJ4wY2U%2F5HlMfW1ALHCvZKdQz2Gu3wMtCr8Mg31EzGboT%2FCc7%2BXMVr6sf5NUS9fiPDdHw1JXy6WF5Z87biC1Dpde3zfgF0976uVwR7GXLqtjwbZEfjl3UGZs0aKE%2BRrBM2aYcvleNJ2D3Jbo8yjlN%2F0j4R9N1OzRc2A3NgXMVMlTHE6uOXKAljlISBgaZfVUkanuuTm2Htn4UUXdBLBK9ObXGh62%2FlNpQIlLHlJRHN8Be2mjUQpkolcRsRSUdjeGWDFNdsrzGo3SGaHEsi7ZTbCYW9vipS8vVy8AzrfTo)

Peter,

Last month, when asked about the state of our country’s economy and the constantly rising prices, J.D. Vance said that **_“Americans need patience.”_**

**Let’s be clear:** patience won’t pay for groceries, cover rising health care premiums, or keep the lights on.

Families are already doing everything they can to stretch each dollar. The last thing they need is more of the same failed leadership that got us here, while Trump’s tariffs drive up prices, our economy continues to fail working people, and inaction makes it worse.

**People cannot afford to wait this out.**

I’m fighting every day to lower costs, end these tariffs, and deliver real relief for Rhode Islanders. But to actually fix this, we need a Democratic majority in the House. We can’t lose this seat to another MAGA rubber stamp.

**_[If you agree it’s time for action and _not excuses_ , will you chip in $10 or whatever you can today to help us keep up this fight and take back the House next year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120758021/587270199/140362489?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20251206_FR_Patience_0_3MO_Seth_NA_NA_Vance&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODhhNTVkOC1kMmQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uo7U0XeGPSJ8zcUNzCi0cW-Pz9rHtKD8DHaKhs2Fbck=)_** | | **[Chip in →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120758024/587270202/140362489?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20251206_FR_Patience_0_3MO_Seth_NA_NA_Vance&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODhhNTVkOC1kMmQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uo7U0XeGPSJ8zcUNzCi0cW-Pz9rHtKD8DHaKhs2Fbck=)**

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Working for a better Oregon
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Donate now to support me and Andrea Salinas

Team, I want you to be the first to know: I’m running for re-election as Governor of Oregon. [_**Will you donate $10 to Andrea Salinas and myself to send a strong message as we kick off our campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120758214/587270831/1357732916?amount=10&refcode=email_120625_kotek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2Q2NzcxNC1kNWQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bZ4WZN-d2m1d_LORtppmQ3PIL40JEtzZppxRfBfmwlY=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120758215/587270832/1357732916?amount=10&refcode=email_120625_kotek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2Q2NzcxNC1kNWQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bZ4WZN-d2m1d_LORtppmQ3PIL40JEtzZppxRfBfmwlY=)
---
While the past few months have been unlike anything we’ve seen before — in our state and in our country — the way we came together made me so proud to be an Oregonian.
When President Trump tried to use our own military against us, we showed the power of peaceful resistance.
When President Trump created a food emergency by withholding SNAP funds, Oregon stepped up to help feed our neighbors.
I’ve never been prouder to work for you — but the fight isn’t over. I’m running for Governor again because Oregon values are on the line.
The choice is between a governor who will stand up for Oregon and protect what we believe in, or a governor who will let President Trump do whatever he wants.
And with everything going on, we still have to keep building on the progress we’ve made, to make sure people can afford to call Oregon home.
We expanded the number of shelter beds, began building more homes people can afford, funded summer learning, and found ways to ease the rising cost of living.
**It’s a start, but we need to do more. Especially with everything coming at us from Washington, D.C.**
As Governor, I’ve visited all thirty-six counties across Oregon, and I’ve seen firsthand the strength and resilience that makes our state such a special place.
That’s why I’m so optimistic about our future.
**It’s why I’m excited to officially announce my re-election campaign for Governor of our great state.**
**[If you’re ready to help us make more progress, will you make a contribution today to Andrea Salinas and my campaign to become a kickoff donor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120758216/587270833/1357732916?refcode=email_120625_kotek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2Q2NzcxNC1kNWQyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bZ4WZN-d2m1d_LORtppmQ3PIL40JEtzZppxRfBfmwlY=)**

clean_body: Donate now to support me and Andrea Salinas Team, I want you to be the first to know: I’m running for re-election as Governor of Oregon. = | | = While the past few months have been unlike anything we’ve seen before — in our state and in our country — the way we came together made me so proud to be an Oregonian. When President Trump tried to use our own military against us, we showed the power of peaceful resistance. When President Trump created a food emergency by withholding SNAP funds, Oregon stepped up to help feed our neighbors. I’ve never been prouder to work for you — but the fight isn’t over. I’m running for Governor again because Oregon values are on the line. The choice is between a governor who will stand up for Oregon and protect what we believe in, or a governor who will let President Trump do whatever he wants. And with everything going on, we still have to keep building on the progress we’ve made, to make sure people can afford to call Oregon home. We expanded the number of shelter beds, began building more homes people can afford, funded summer learning, and found ways to ease the rising cost of living. It’s a start, but we need to do more. Especially with everything coming at us from Washington, D.C. As Governor, I’ve visited all thirty-six counties across Oregon, and I’ve seen firsthand the strength and resilience that makes our state such a special place. That’s why I’m so optimistic about our future. It’s why I’m excited to officially announce my re-election campaign for Governor of our great state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you. Let’s do this together. — Tina | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. # [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120758523/587272002/1733485174?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTdiZTQ3ZTItZDVkMi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0rZ6LKQsbLHBwMv9ZHHszXW4ts6UUqlbgONiXCMGBTw=)

name: Tim Walz
subject: Trump just attacked me again
body:
I refuse to be intimidated or distracted by a bully.
#
[](https://act.leftnet.org/go/21450?c0=leftnet_em_20251206_em.D4IA2J&refcode=em20251206-1391&amount=5&t=1&akid=1391%2E2118727%2EbCQ5WD)
Team, it’s Tim.
The President of the United States just can’t seem to keep my name out of his mouth.
Earlier, he attacked me again from the Oval Office.
**Look, I don’t give a damn what bullies like Donald Trump call me on television.** My singular focus is on defending families from the chaos and cruelty currently being inflicted by this administration.
I refuse to be intimidated or distracted by Trump’s name-calling. There’s just too much at stake. And I’m more committed than ever to defending the progress we’ve won together — and continuing to do what I’ve always done: serve the people and care for our neighbors.
**[If you’ve got my back, I’m personally asking you to show it today by making a contribution to my campaign. As Trump attacks me and threatens our state, I need you by my side, team.](https://act.leftnet.org/go/21450?c0=leftnet_em_20251206_em.D4IA2J&refcode=em20251206-1391&amount=5&t=2&akid=1391%2E2118727%2EbCQ5WD)**
**[DONATE $5 ››](https://act.leftnet.org/go/21450?c0=leftnet_em_20251206_em.D4IA2J&refcode=em20251206-1391&amount=5&t=3&akid=1391%2E2118727%2EbCQ5WD)**
I’m grateful,
Tim Walz

**LeftNet is an online political network fighting for progressive causes and candidates focused on social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.**
---

Email us: [team@leftnet.org](mailto:team@leftnet.org)

name: Nellie Pou
subject: The pasta aisle tells the whole story
body:
It’s a serious matter

| |
---
Hi friend, I never thought I would see the day when even the pasta aisle became a symbol of how out of touch Washington has become. Yet here we are. Because of Trump’s tariffs, pasta prices have skyrocketed. Here in New Jersey, pasta is no laughing matter. It’s not just a food so many of us love, it’s also a product that reflects the cost of living crisis hitting home in the most ordinary moments of our day. It is the extra dollars at the grocery store. It is the tough choices families are forced to make. **It is the feeling that no one in power — not the White House, nor the House leadership — understands what the checkout line really feels like.** That’s why I’m working with a bipartisan congressional delegation to make sure the White House pulls back on its tariffs on Italian food products. I know how hard it is for families right now. And I also know that pretending these problems will fix themselves is not an option. I am fighting every day to make living in New Jersey more affordable, to bring down costs, and to hold accountable the politicians who would rather score points on cable news than protect your wallet. **[If you can, I hope you will chip in today. clean_body: It’s a serious matter | | Hi friend, I never thought I would see the day when even the pasta aisle became a symbol of how out of touch Washington has become. Yet here we are. Because of Trump’s tariffs, pasta prices have skyrocketed. Here in New Jersey, pasta is no laughing matter. It’s not just a food so many of us love, it’s also a product that reflects the cost of living crisis hitting home in the most ordinary moments of our day. It is the extra dollars at the grocery store. It is the tough choices families are forced to make. It is the feeling that no one in power — not the White House, nor the House leadership — understands what the checkout line really feels like. That’s why I’m working with a bipartisan congressional delegation to make sure the White House pulls back on its tariffs on Italian food products. I know how hard it is for families right now. And I also know that pretending these problems will fix themselves is not an option. I am fighting every day to make living in New Jersey more affordable, to bring down costs, and to hold accountable the politicians who would rather score points on cable news than protect your wallet. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you for being part of this fight. In solidarity, Nellie | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. #### [The suicidal empathy of the Liberal "Karen"](https://substack.com/redirect/f3357a2e-1cbf-4b32-af6d-62142ba24c71?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

and **[two](https://substack.com/redirect/bdef2c02-4cfb-4f48-aef7-2d6dfc541ce8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** ,
[](https://substack.com/redirect/bdef2c02-4cfb-4f48-aef7-2d6dfc541ce8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | |
#### [The tyranny of the "non-essential" personnel](https://substack.com/redirect/bdef2c02-4cfb-4f48-aef7-2d6dfc541ce8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| Nov 23
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/bdef2c02-4cfb-4f48-aef7-2d6dfc541ce8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
as the opinions I share are better understood within the larger context.
In a quick summary: Karens and liberals are the death of American greatness, and the factories which produce them must be destroyed for our survival. The first factory: big government where a bureaucrat flunkey whose personal emotional weakness of inner fears "climate change gives me anxiety" leads him to use his position to ban gas stoves as is already **[the case in California](https://substack.com/redirect/84682e4a-bae5-4f34-9ab4-d8917c0f9a2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. And not just gas stoves but gas hot water heaters, leaf blowers, generators, furnaces, weedwackers. Important to note Californians never voted to have their property deemed illegal. It was decided, unilaterally, by the government machine where liberals see their authority as a vehicle to push agenda and rule over you without your input. For democracy, or something.
The next pernicious liberalism factory we'll discuss is higher education. Really all education, as innumerous examples of children as young as kindergarten being told by so-called teachers that their gender is a choice and the abortion is healthcare... but I will limit my advocacy for education scorched earth to higher ed: colleges and universities (C's & U's).
The goal of the American university system is no longer to educate but to manufacture angry, activist, voting liberals.
* * *
* * *
**[Together with Ifrah Law](https://substack.com/redirect/bba11a79-7e76-4aad-9580-be1ff0672df2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/bba11a79-7e76-4aad-9580-be1ff0672df2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bba11a79-7e76-4aad-9580-be1ff0672df2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/bba11a79-7e76-4aad-9580-be1ff0672df2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
Almost a decade ago a Yale professor had the nerve to tell students at Halloween to **[accept costumes](https://substack.com/redirect/fff43745-5702-4aa3-af51-764a878d93c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** even if deemed "offensive". At the time, I remember laughing at the overblown and insane response of students who were "literally shaking" at the mere idea someone might dress as Pocahontas.
That was a prelude to where we are now. Today, personal offense is license for justifiable violence, and the schools will say nothing. Yesterday's crying Yale student is today's dangerous Columbia student where recently "Free Palestine" activists **[attacked a janitor](https://substack.com/redirect/2645dbc7-983d-47ad-ab18-84d817fdb558?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for the crime of cleaning the building where Jewish students had gathered.
One of the agitators, Mahmoud Khalil, became a household name when the Trump Administration begin the process of his deportation. 1800 professors have boycotted Columbia University for not protecting Khalil.
No such boycott for the cause of the janitor...
Higher education insanity is not new. Berkley was an activist mess starting in the late 1960's... but the insanity is deeply intensifying. When **[Riley Gains](https://substack.com/redirect/c952be29-0e3b-4357-b033-6da5af560b09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** tried to speak at San Francisco University, she was not just heckled or protested, she was assaulted and forced to take shelter in a locked classroom. Her crime: believing that men should not compete against women in sports.
Kids make mistakes, even smart kids at smart universities, so let us give them an enormous measure of grace saying their protest "got out of hand" but then it behooves the university administrators to set things straight, right? Right?
The administration **[stood with](https://substack.com/redirect/2ed6f4ab-3c10-4bce-82ea-d63559b7d46d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the students.
No one was expelled or even disciplined. You dare to come on our campus and say men who castrate themselves cannot get pregnant? You deserve the violence you get. Put simply: make me stop hitting you.
And that proves my point: C's & U's are not about education but factories for turning out liberals. Ms. Gains brought an ideology which threatens it, and that threat had to be eliminated.
The greatest threat to C's & U's was Charlie Kirk, and he was successfully eliminated. Look at the response from the left. "I condemn violence, but Charlie Kirk..." deserved it. If you didn't want to die you wouldn't have spoken these words on our campus.
Charlie knew C's & U's were a problem. It's why he set up his organization and focused on them. It's why he pitched his tent on their quads. It's why he called it "Turning Point" because young people were being steered into the abyss, and he was desperate to share with them another direction which points towards freedom.
It is perfectly fitting that Charlie was killed on a college campus. That is the battleground.
The left dominates C's & U's by eliminating choice. It's a common tactic of the left. If we don't allow a Christmas display, then eventually people will stop celebrating the Christian season. If we prohibit conservative thought, then eventually people will think liberalism is the only acceptable way to think.
The left even does it to their own kind. Look at Kamala: eliminate the ability for others to run and you get their version of unity.
To maintain the purity of liberalism, every course, every discipline, becomes aligned to goal of inculcating and solidifying liberalism. Jordan Peterson began his meteoric rise as an international thought leader because he refused to align his work as a clinical psychologist to the university's wokeness agenda.
There is no less wiggle room in the hard sciences, either.
A University of Pittsburgh Anthropology professor **[claims](https://substack.com/redirect/41dc9fdc-b22a-48aa-873b-c3bcb2af7a05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** there is no difference in male and female skeletons defying both basic biology and... anthropology.
A University of Wisconsin Dean **[declares](https://substack.com/redirect/b6ec25e2-3539-415c-91fd-96b9d71f2567?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that math is violence against blacks. No one knows what that even means.
Such professors do not want to teach Anthropology or Math. They want to teach liberalism. And they keep such stupidity afloat with "purity." Upwards of 95% of university faculty and personnel are liberal. They create a culture which only allows liberalism, denying any alternative to liberalism, for the sole purpose of churning out liberals. Who cares if they are dumb or their degrees are useless (last year more than **[15,000 people graduated](https://substack.com/redirect/370c2c7e-50e3-47f9-a70f-783ddab0a041?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with a degree in gender studies) they are liberal and more importantly the graduates will vote liberal.
In America, 28% of the population identifies as "liberal". At C's & U's, it's 50%. At post-grad levels, it's 75%. The factories produce them very successfully en masse.
This is how we get statistics like "**[97% of scientists](https://substack.com/redirect/49b0b411-399c-4502-8dc7-1a0c65ac1fd0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** agree" that climate change is a threat. It is how we got medical professionals pushing mask mandates and social distancing even when science (and common sense) demonstrated their futility to the layman. Who needs science when you have a cause?
And the cause is liberalism.
We cannot shut down Harvard. We cannot prevent people from attending Brown. But we sure as hell can stop giving them tax dollars.
And you can stop sending your kid there. Yes, it sounds impressive when you say "my son is at Yale" but what is the value of 18 years of raising him on your values and beliefs only to have all your work undone in four years. Even worse, you are paying for it. Stop paying people to turn your kid into a liberal.
President Trump has rightfully targeted higher education since Day One, and that is a key front in the culture war no republican would ever, ever, have the courage to launch. We have reverence for teachers and hold academia in high regard. I once did, too.
3.3 million people will graduate college in 2026, and the majority will become a thorn in your side, scolding you for misgendering or chastising you for your views on Palestine. They will vote for more taxes, open borders, and reparations. They will speak of stolen land and carbon footprints. They will find a Christmas tree offensive but celebrate a burqa. Millions more liberals, poisoned brained liberal pains in the ass that we must absorb into society, churned out by C's & U's to dilute our righteous patriotism.
We will not win this war unless the factories pumping out the enemy combatants are destroyed.
**Honor and courage.**
* * *

body:
Fight Back Against the A-List Assault on 2026 | Peter,

You want to know how desperate the Left is to claw their way back into power?

**HOLLYWOOD just launched a full-blown rescue mission for Sherrod Brown.**

I'm talking: studio bosses, mega-agents, movie producers - the whole woke A-list - tripping over themselves to cut $10,000 checks so they can BUY another Senate seat.

These people don't give a damn about Ohio.
They don't care about workers.
They sure as hell don't care about America.

_They want power.
They want control.
And they want Republicans OUT of the Senate in 2026._

This is the Left's game plan - flood red states with coastal cash and hope you're too busy living real life to notice.

Well, we noticed.

clean_body: Fight Back Against the A-List Assault on 2026 | Peter, You want to know how desperate the Left is to claw their way back into power? HOLLYWOOD just launched a full-blown rescue mission for Sherrod Brown. I'm talking: studio bosses, mega-agents, movie producers - the whole woke A-list - tripping over themselves to cut $10,000 checks so they can BUY another Senate seat. These people don't give a damn about Ohio. They don't care about workers. They sure as hell don't care about America. They want power. They want control. And they want Republicans OUT of the Senate in 2026. This is the Left's game plan - flood red states with coastal cash and hope you're too busy living real life to notice. Well, we noticed. My father needs a filibuster-proof majority in the Senate. I need you in this fight with me: Let's show these Hollywood elites that REAL America still decides elections - not a handful of bored celebrities in Beverly Hills. Let's crush this. subject: James x Pod Save

body:
#
James was on Pod Save America recently. We encourage you to listen if you have some time.
He talked about Trump, JD Vance, and Christian nationalism; how growing up in the church, his time as a public school teacher, and a public official led him to this Senate campaign; how we're going into the lion's den and that it will require some risk-taking from all of us in order to win this Senate race.
As someone who cares about this race, and about James' campaign -- [**you should give it a watch.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-psa-video.49yfRj&refcode=em251206-1-ak&t=1&akid=299%2E1347274%2ESRjWbm)

Thank you for all your support.
Team Talarico

👋 An important request before you scroll away...
The most important FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign is coming up fast and James needs your help. When this deadline ends, we're legally required to report what we've raised and everyone will be watching.

I'm working to build a more affordable future for Wisconsin – one where working hard and playing by the rules can open the door to a middle class life again. But that can only happen with your support today.
**[If you are able, will you chip in $10, $25, or any amount that is meaningful to you right now?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=SBD_MB_EM_FR_120625_Poll_Tier1_D1_S1&t=9&akid=5697%2E196590%2EuvbMDH)**

name: Air Force One Alert
subject: Mid-flight, the President sounded the alarm
body:
This is truly a first...
| Peter,
---
The _UNTHINKABLE_ just happened...
---
First, Obama crept out of his “retirement” as the midterm elections grow near.
---
And now, he’s gone NUCLEAR against President Trump!
---

Friend, This is a full-blown escalation. **The Trump administration has just sued Delaware, Maryland, New Mexico, Rhode Island, Vermont, and Washington, all in an effort to seize their voter registration rolls.** We’re talking about driver’s license numbers, Social Security numbers, full names, and home addresses for every registered voter. We must stand with the Secretaries of State who are fighting back. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | =** Thank you, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . # **Trump defends ballroom as "bigger and more beautiful" than planned**
President Donald Trump **[issued a vigorous defense of the $300 million White House ballroom](https://substack.com/redirect/db517296-fa94-4725-8520-a1ec12282d6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Saturday, posting on Truth Social that it will be "double the size" with "quality of finishes and interiors brought to the highest level," while claiming the 90,000-square-foot columned building to be built on and beyond the demolished East Wing site is "actually under budget and ahead of schedule."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/db517296-fa94-4725-8520-a1ec12282d6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **President tears into CNN 's Kaitlan Collins as "nasty":** Trump attacked CNN White House correspondent Kaitlan Collins (misspelling her name as "Caitlin Collin's") for questioning why the ballroom was "costing more money than originally thought," calling her "always Stupid and Nasty" from "Fake News CNN," after she mentioned the construction zone and "giant crane" on her Friday night show "The Source with Kaitlan Collins."
* **Architect replaced as costs balloon, donors include tech giants:** The comments come after architect James McCrery II departed from the project after costs ballooned to $300 million, with new architect Shalom Baranes taking over, while Trump insisted "there are no taxpayer dollars involved" despite a donor list disclosed in October including Amazon, Meta, and Apple--companies with government business.

* * *
**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/64e5684d-39f3-40b8-878d-f2477e5df05b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# _WATCH:_ Trump nominee makes Elissa Slotkin look like a FOOL when he refuses to play her silly games
Trump nominee for the Department of War Earl Matthews makes Elissa Slotkin of the "Seditious Six" lose her mind by refusing to fall into her trap.

* * *
# **Elon Musk calls for EU abolition after $140M X fine**
Elon Musk and Trump administration officials **[delivered blistering criticism of the European Union](https://substack.com/redirect/feb9ff75-0e86-4906-a4f6-7ccddabc522d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after its executive branch fined X $140 million for "non-compliance with transparency obligations" under the Digital Services Act, with Musk writing "The EU should be abolished and sovereignty returned to individual countries" and declaring the fine was imposed "not just on X, but also on me personally."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/feb9ff75-0e86-4906-a4f6-7ccddabc522d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump officials decry fine as attack on American tech and free speech:** Secretary of State Marco Rubio called the fine "an attack on all American tech platforms and the American people by foreign governments," while Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick said "The Digital Services Act is designed to stifle free speech and American tech companies," and Vice President JD Vance stated "The EU should be supporting free speech not attacking American companies over garbage."
* **EU cites "deceptive" blue checkmark and transparency failures:** The European Commission said it was holding X accountable for the "deceptive" design of its "blue checkmark" verification system where "anyone can pay to obtain the 'verified' status without the company meaningfully verifying who is behind the account," a "lack of transparency of its advertising repository," and "failure to provide access to public data for researchers," though it insisted the decision "has nothing to do with content moderation."

* * *

name: Katie Porter
subject: Balancing being a mom and running for office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40536%2E3422442%2EApib8i)
Peter,
Being a single mom running for governor can be difficult. I have to juggle priorities every day that many other candidates never have to think about.
But I do it because I believe California needs a fighter for working families in Sacramento—not a corporate sell out. I’ll tell you more, but first: **[can you chip in $5 to my campaign today?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251206_1_ak.rIg4rq&refcode=em20251206-40536&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40536%2E3422442%2EApib8i)**
While one of my kids is in college, my two younger ones are in middle and high school. That means the everyday realities of parenting are baked into my campaign schedule.
Between campaign strategy meetings and visiting with voters, I’m making runs to the grocery store, helping with homework, or rushing out to buy school supplies.
While other candidates can spend extra time calling their big dollar donors, I’m doing what so many other California parents do—cook dinner, keep the household running, and ensure my kids (and our pets) get the quality time they need.
I’m running for governor because I understand the challenges Californians are struggling with. I face many of them too—stretched budgets, rising costs, unaffordable health care, or unforeseen repairs on my old minivan. But to win and be the fighter working class Californians need, I need your support.
**[Can you chip in $5 or more to our campaign today to make sure I can stay competitive with our billionaire opponent and corporate-backed candidates in this race?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251206_1_ak.rIg4rq&refcode=em20251206-40536&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40536%2E3422442%2EApib8i)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251206_1_ak.rIg4rq&refcode=em20251206-40536&t=23&akid=40536%2E3422442%2EApib8i)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251206-40536&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40536_3422442_Apib8i&akid=40536%2E3422442%2EApib8i)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40536&t=25&akid=40536%2E3422442%2EApib8i)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40536)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40536&t=26&akid=40536%2E3422442%2EApib8i)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: Trump Showdown
subject: Extraordinary Courage. Extraordinary Comeback.
body:
unsubscribe
https://trk.trumpshowdown.org/?xul=1bu7fz54lr1j98yesu9fcwqoabper6owd7ugflbvtcjh1niyied1i8u6wfettls0qb8ppgf4np1g9u3or84exluao0nhzv41kxzjv6&__stmp=t6v5t5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please read the message below from our sponsor.

“I did everything I could for him ...”

https://trk.trumpshowdown.org/?xtl=y4s8gb9i0t4ie4vo4juyih2oaezysu1yl0p39zuqjo9vew8nkjm7q9wyjdrz4dvcz6z2w6j0b1w192ow25cxshrra0anm2jruogaytbzxekg2sti0bwg05a068nu4pwxnxtk09bz2pl40x5u2n6gqrd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t6v5t5&__onlt=t

https://trk.trumpshowdown.org/?xtl=y4s8gb9i0t4ie4vo4juyih2oaezysu1yl0p39zuqjo9vew8nkjm7q9wyjdrz4dvcz6z2w6j0b1w192ow25cxshrra0anm2jruogaytbzxekg2sti0bwg05a068nu4pwxnxtk09bz2pl40x5u2n6gqrd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t6v5t5&__onlt=t

Not long ago, Dr. Shafir Botner, director of MAGEN DAVID ADOM’s paramedic school and a Medevac helicopter paramedic, was treating injured civilians at the scene of a rocket strike in Be’er Sheva, Israel, when he looked up and recognized a familiar face. There, working alongside the MAGEN DAVID ADOM team to assist the injured civilians was Chief Inspector Or Yosef of the Israel Police.

The last time Dr. Botner had seen him, Inspector Yosef was fighting for his life after being critically wounded by an RPG while helping civilians during the Nova Music Festival massacre on October 7, 2023.

A MAGEN DAVID ADOM paramedic was treating the inspector when he realized Yosef would not survive long enough to make it to the hospital in his ambulance. So, he immediately called for a helicopter.

When Dr. Botner and his crew landed, they quickly loaded Inspector Yosef into the helicopter.
They knew every second mattered
https://trk.trumpshowdown.org/?xtl=y4s8gb9i0t4ie4vo4juyih2oaezysu1yl0p39zuqjo9vew8nkjm7q9wyjdrz4dvcz6z2w6j0b1w192ow25cxshrra0anm2jruogaytbzxekg2sti0bwg05a068nu4pwxnxtk09bz2pl40x5u2n6gqrd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t6v5t5&__onlt=t
.

“He was in very serious condition and had lost a massive amount of blood.

I did everything I could for him.”

But now, this patient who so nearly died on October 7 was not only still alive, he was also outside helping others. Seeing Inspector Yosef up on his feet and back on the job filled Dr. Botner with emotion.

“Or Yosef is truly an inspiration. To return to the field after such a devastating injury and help others injured in a missile attack — that’s extraordinary.”

I wish you could go with me sometime when I visit the MAGEN DAVID ADOM National Dispatch Center just outside Tel Aviv or one of the 206 MAGEN DAVID ADOM emergency medical stations located across Israel. There you will encounter some of the most extraordinary men and women you may ever meet.

There is something about the determination and compassion I see in their faces that always moves me. They are there to save lives.

HELP SAVE LIVES IN ISRAEL ►
https://trk.trumpshowdown.org/?xtl=y4s8gb9i0t4ie4vo4juyih2oaezysu1yl0p39zuqjo9vew8nkjm7q9wyjdrz4dvcz6z2w6j0b1w192ow25cxshrra0anm2jruogaytbzxekg2sti0bwg05a068nu4pwxnxtk09bz2pl40x5u2n6gqrd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t6v5t5&__onlt=t

It takes grit and guts to do what they do every day. When a call comes in, they respond without hesitation — missiles may be falling, active shooters may be on the scene, buildings may be burning, but they are committed to going above and beyond to save as many lives as possible, even if it means putting their own lives on the line.

Again and again, these paramedics, EMTs, and first responders rise above fear, push beyond limits, and stand in the gap. Their bravery, their sacrifice, their relentless dedication — it’s nothing less than extraordinary.

May I ask you today to
give to support these exceptional women and men
https://trk.trumpshowdown.org/?xtl=y4s8gb9i0t4ie4vo4juyih2oaezysu1yl0p39zuqjo9vew8nkjm7q9wyjdrz4dvcz6z2w6j0b1w192ow25cxshrra0anm2jruogaytbzxekg2sti0bwg05a068nu4pwxnxtk09bz2pl40x5u2n6gqrd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t6v5t5&__onlt=t
?

MAGEN DAVID ADOM relies almost entirely upon private donations and not government funding — which means the people of Israel are counting on the faithful financial support of generous friends like you so that help is able to come in moments of dire need.

Your gift
https://trk.trumpshowdown.org/?xtl=y4s8gb9i0t4ie4vo4juyih2oaezysu1yl0p39zuqjo9vew8nkjm7q9wyjdrz4dvcz6z2w6j0b1w192ow25cxshrra0anm2jruogaytbzxekg2sti0bwg05a068nu4pwxnxtk09bz2pl40x5u2n6gqrd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t6v5t5&__onlt=t
will provide the medical supplies and equipment, blood reserves, and emergency vehicles that these extraordinary modern-day heroes must have to save every man, woman, and child possible.

God bless you,

Catherine Reed

Chief Executive Officer

GIVE TO SAVE LIVES ►
https://trk.trumpshowdown.org/?xtl=y4s8gb9i0t4ie4vo4juyih2oaezysu1yl0p39zuqjo9vew8nkjm7q9wyjdrz4dvcz6z2w6j0b1w192ow25cxshrra0anm2jruogaytbzxekg2sti0bwg05a068nu4pwxnxtk09bz2pl40x5u2n6gqrd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t6v5t5&__onlt=t

MAGEN DAVID ADOM is Israel’s emergency services system, providing critical medical care and ambulance services for victims of terror, natural disasters, automobile accidents, and all other emergencies in Israel. It is also responsible for Israel’s national blood supply. MAGEN DAVID ADOM saves lives in Israel every day. Become a
Lifeline Partner
https://trk.trumpshowdown.org/?xtl=27csyiyrpvt7g7mrcu6o8vjqwcml52xoedqfr0h1abe3ealgoft83s62lfzwyl8qzx2mw1p7bz48a7efjikasaghssbensrifgxf8ee7vxce3uy6krojesmlgska0cjo9upj564b80ay18hsblo&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t6v5t5&__onlt=t
now.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Asking for your help today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Is there any amount you can give?
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98479?refcode=em20251206-9806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9806%2E614464%2EK7Qa8E)
Peter, I know better than anyone how difficult it is to win as a Democrat in North Carolina, and how hard we’ll have to work to succeed in this toss-up U.S. Senate race.
I also know that _early investment goes further._ That’s one rule of campaigning that never seems to change.
**With my opponent gaining in the polls, it’s more important than ever that we can stay competitive.** The earlier funds come in, the earlier we can plan our campaign expenses for the months ahead. That makes our efforts all the more effective, so I’m asking for your help today, so please don’t put it off.
**[Any contribution you could split between our campaign and State Democrats Committee would go a long way to meeting our fundraising goal. Just click here to give.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98479?refcode=em20251206-9806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9806%2E614464%2EK7Qa8E)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98480?refcode=em20251206-9806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=9806%2E614464%2EK7Qa8E) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98480?refcode=em20251206-9806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=9806%2E614464%2EK7Qa8E) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98479?refcode=em20251206-9806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9806%2E614464%2EK7Qa8E)
---
It’s no secret that national Republicans see me as the greatest threat to their control in Washington, plus that GOP lawmakers in Raleigh have taken steps to make it harder for Democrats to win here.
We can overcome far-right radicalism. We’ve done it before. And to secure this nation’s future, we have to do it again. But every day and every single cent will count in an election this competitive.
Right now, my MAGA opponent is attracting major investment from far-right donors. Experts even think this could become the first Senate race in history to cost more than a _billion_ dollars. We have to increase our grassroots fundraising efforts to stay competitive, and the earlier your donation comes in, the more effectively we can put it to use.
**[Winning this toss-up race won’t be easy, but I know that we can do it — especially if we’re able to make the most of these early days. If you’re able to split a contribution between our campaign and State Democrats Committee, I would deeply appreciate it. Any amount will help.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98479?refcode=em20251206-9806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=9806%2E614464%2EK7Qa8E)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98480?refcode=em20251206-9806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=7&akid=9806%2E614464%2EK7Qa8E) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98480?refcode=em20251206-9806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=8&akid=9806%2E614464%2EK7Qa8E) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98479?refcode=em20251206-9806&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9806%2E614464%2EK7Qa8E)
---
Thank you,
Roy Cooper

We have to increase our grassroots fundraising efforts to stay competitive, and the earlier your donation comes in, the more effectively we can put it to use. name: AOTL
subject: What’s happening in South Carolina
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Map manipulators are attempting to silence the voices of communities of color to hold onto their power at all costs.
|
---

Peter,
As you read this, map manipulators who have thrown the country into a redistricting crisis are now setting their sights on South Carolina. They’re hoping to force through a gerrymandered map that would help Republicans gain an extra seat in Congress.
And the strategy they’re deploying is not subtle. They’re going after Rep. Jim Clyburn’s district — which is 46% Black — which could result in a map where voters of color have less of a say in who gets to represent their interests in Washington.
**We must call this what it is: A blatant attempt to silence voters of color and sideline Black leaders in the halls of power. **
**All On The Line is preparing for fights like these in states across the country, which we expect to shift into high gear in the weeks ahead.[You can ensure we’re prepared for each and every one of these fights by making a donation to fund our work in states like Florida, Indiana, New Hampshire, and wherever map manipulators go next.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120760360/587278829/798345718?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_SouthCarolina_email_20251206-AOTL-Tier1-SouthCarolina_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251206-AOTL-Tier1-SouthCarolina_&utm_campaign=SouthCarolina&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5M2Q4YTcwLWRlZDItZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1gLGTSmlv9lKMkr4UFdPRvix5R738h6b08ojNhHX-pI=)**

These cynical strategies have been used by map manipulators for years in an attempt to drown out the voices of voters of color.
In particular, politicians will try to “crack and pack” majority-minority districts: splitting Black and Brown communities among multiple districts, making it harder for these communities to select representatives of their choosing.
Take Missouri, for example — another state where map manipulators forced through a mid-decade gerrymander that carved up Kansas City into three separate districts. This new map used the same street, Troost Avenue, that was used to segregate white and Black communities during Jim Crow.
**It’s not hyperbole to say that this gerrymandering fight is our generation’s test of whether we will stand up and defend civil rights in America. And that’s exactly what All On The Line is doing in states across the country, wherever anti-democracy politicians are trying to silence communities of color.**
[**Will you join our generation’s fight for civil rights? Your donation will help us push back against attempts to rig maps that suppress the will of the people — no matter their race or their ZIP code.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120760367/587278836/798345718?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_SouthCarolina_email_20251206-AOTL-Tier1-SouthCarolina_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251206-AOTL-Tier1-SouthCarolina_&utm_campaign=SouthCarolina&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5M2Q4YTcwLWRlZDItZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1gLGTSmlv9lKMkr4UFdPRvix5R738h6b08ojNhHX-pI=)
