name: Voter Action Project
subject: Need to highlight this case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
While the media has been hyper-focused on the redistricting fights, this case has seemingly flown under the radar -- even though its impact on voting and representation would be a larger swing than all the current redistricting efforts combined.
This decision could knock the last leg out from the Voting Rights Act (VRA), functionally ending a historic piece of legislation and setting our fight for fair representation back decades.
RUSH $25 or more right now to help protect what the VRA stands for and defend our fundamental right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120625_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
@ariberman.bsky.social: SCOTUS decision killing what’s left of Voting Rights Act could cost Dems 19 House seats, eliminate every majority-minority district in South, eviscerate 14th/15th Amendments & fulfill John Roberts 40-year crusade against country’s most important civil rights law [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120625_1&amount=25]
The impact shows how partisan this all is, Team. A complete dismantling of the Voting Rights Act -- a key civil rights law -- would only harm one political party and return parts of the country to a suppressive era we left behind sixty years ago.
During the oral arguments in Louisiana v. Callais , at least five conservative justices seemed ready to handicap the VRA so that it will no longer stop white majorities from locking racial minorities out of elected office through racial gerrymandering.
The consequences are simple to understand and grave for voter participation. The harder we make it to vote, the more politicians make voter participation feel worthless, the less people actually take part. Needless to say, the less people who participate, the less our democracy and our government looks like the people it's supposed to represent.
Team: We have to spread the word about this case and the consequences of dismantling the Voting Rights Act. Step up with $25 or whatever you can today and help us defend the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120625_1&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=120625_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=120625_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=120625_1&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=120625_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=120625_1&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120625_1&amount=35]
At issue in the case is Section 2 of the VRA, which requires that racial minorities have an equal opportunity to meaningfully participate in the electoral process. This provision has been used to strike down districting schemes and maps that prevented Black voters and other racial minorities from electing their preferred representatives. Since 1965, Section 2 has given people of color a seat at the table, from school boards to the halls of Congress. It appears this 60-year era is coming to an end.
We've said it before and will say it again, but it's been clear long before the MAGA movement that Chief Justice Roberts has seen the removal of the VRA as one of his top goals for his time on the Court. It appears he may be on the cusp of succeeding.
Striking down the last remnants of the Voting Rights Act is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year. Gutting Section 2 would take us backwards in time and allow racial gerrymandering to be a standard practice, silencing more voters. Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity.
We simply can't afford to go backwards like this. Will you chip in with $25 or more to help us fight back against these partisan efforts to silence voters? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120625_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120625_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120625_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=RcjSEDomHxb%2BP%2BFcQaLNFrZclIc1chyioTvltbmdYPfNS3abp3vtO7BS1MIxtu4KHOhmpFCTYXnJe40ZgRWhjX3ijBGeXwr7HXiRNccbJeqF1CQVMqt%2BfFhEUgPTIKum1cOwCEQbx0EHPxE%2BtxGzm6AIR2O1g14XYq3bdXhVbrtd23JOoO%2BLMbQQDNQ%2FsaTiefkZtQ9FgBJCJcpdl0TmEWYT4sqYWfKNtytjIN2R5DGpy9u21wyLGisA0gRE8tFYlnhCPj6TclQCGhozxxPdhNFbrcNls%2FxxUG%2FZb%2FbHtA3j4Or%2BPqyZK9wFP9Dj0DeQpIDc%2BVsRlLRjWK%2FZPJmCRg8apj3nTb9f18l7iyH2FpxSeplUQdDCbzAj3hHrFpZ0btfvfpYttEyUwEEHW4eVvbFfecGEirtx0QQC8y4U6%2B8%3D .

body:
Starting with Off the Sidelines |
Friend, I founded the Democracy Defense Fund on a simple, urgent principle: **to serve as a bulwark against authoritarianism by investing in key races across the country, from the U.S. Senate down to state legislative seats.** In an age where billionaires like Elon Musk are ready to stuff millions of dollars into Republican candidates’ coffers, our work ensures that strong candidates who _actually_ represent working Americans can not only keep up with mind-boggling amounts of dark money spending, but _prevail against it._ We coordinate _directly_ with organizations like Off the Sidelines and help them offset campaign costs, like running ads or sending campaign literature, while amplifying their campaign to a national audience. **We know that when Democrats work together and support one another, we win. That’s why I’m reaching out today:** **[_With next year’s midterms just around the corner, we’re fighting to get candidates like Off the Sidelines the support they need to win their races and get us one step closer to taking back Washington. If you’re with us, can you split a contribution between our organization and Off the Sidelines today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120762574/587286577/-206174188?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.06_OTS-Mary-Trump-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjI0MzYxYi1mM2QyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HQBqtQPmP36J3ZBVJr99vIafadKqT5gZGYmwD6RjmQs=)** | | **[DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120762575/587286578/-206174188?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.06_OTS-Mary-Trump-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjI0MzYxYi1mM2QyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HQBqtQPmP36J3ZBVJr99vIafadKqT5gZGYmwD6RjmQs=) **

clean_body: Starting with Off the Sidelines | Friend, I founded the Democracy Defense Fund on a simple, urgent principle: to serve as a bulwark against authoritarianism by investing in key races across the country, from the U.S. Senate down to state legislative seats. In an age where billionaires like Elon Musk are ready to stuff millions of dollars into Republican candidates’ coffers, our work ensures that strong candidates who actually represent working Americans can not only keep up with mind-boggling amounts of dark money spending, but prevail against it. We coordinate directly with organizations like Off the Sidelines and help them offset campaign costs, like running ads or sending campaign literature, while amplifying their campaign to a national audience. We know that when Democrats work together and support one another, we win. That’s why I’m reaching out today: = | | = | = | = | = | = We know that the political world moves fast, and next November will be here before we know it. That’s why in addition to securing our anti-Trump regime bulwark in state legislatures across the country, we’re building our war chest so that we can be ready to support organizations like Off the Sidelines the second they need help. = | = Thanks for helping us make a national impact, friend. Dr. Mary L. Trump Founder, Democracy Defense Fund = © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

null, Trump’s Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is facing increased criticism from both sides of the aisle – and for good reason:
* A Pentagon watchdog says Hegseth may have **endangered U.S. troops** by leaking classified military strike plans via a messaging app.

* Hegseth ordered a strike that killed 9 people at sea, and then a second strike **killed unarmed survivors** clinging to the wreckage – potentially committing a serious war crime.

* **Hegseth kicked journalists out of the Pentagon** and replaced them with MAGA influencers. Now, _The New York Times_ is suing him over unconstitutional media restrictions.

Some Republicans in Congress are questioning whether Hegseth can stay in his role.

**Now, we need grassroots supporters like you to weigh in. We're looking for 100 responses from 18326 before midnight, null.**_[Tell us where you stand:](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/10120?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1578%2E49239%2EKLxLe0)_

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Donald Trump’s FBI is targeting me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
While Trump goes after us, I need your help to show that we are not backing down — that people across this country are standing with those defending our Constitution, not those trying to break it.
Peter,
Last week, I got word that the FBI’s Counterterrorism Division appeared to open an inquiry into me and five of my colleagues—all because we made a video stressing the power of the oath to the Constitution and that service members can never be forced to follow illegal orders.
**To be honest, the President's reaction—calling for our arrest and death, the FBI being deployed against us—tells me exactly who he is and how little he respects the Constitution.**
The FBI is being used as a tool to try and intimidate and harass members of Congress.
He is wielding the power of government to punish dissent. That’s authoritarianism—plain and simple.
But here’s the truth: No amount of harassment, threats, or abuse of power will stop us from doing our jobs or honoring our oath.
We swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States. That oath lasts a lifetime, and we intend to keep it. We will not be bullied. We will never give up the ship.
**While Trump goes after us, I need your help to show that we are not backing down — that people across this country are standing with those defending our Constitution, not those trying to break it.**
**[So Peter, will you step up and stand with me? Make a split donation today between Heartland Patriots and me to help us fight back against Trump’s harassment and misuse of government power →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98371?refcode=em20251206-9802&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9802%2E614464%2EM0ypUa)**

subject: Sing it with us, Peter
body:
Let’s take a look:
| [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2252?t=6&akid=125%2E124072%2EMftOwi) | It’s here, Peter:
Your official Roy Cooper Supporter Record Wrapped
---
**You haven’t given yet in 2025!** **Next Track ⏩**
_[Hit play on our fight with your first donation now ▶️](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2252?t=8&akid=125%2E124072%2EMftOwi)_ ***Does the information above look right for you? (If you’ve donated in the last few days or with a different email address, your contribution might not be reflected here, but we’re singing our praises for your support!)***
If we had to come up with this campaign’s top five songs for 2025, the greatest hits would be:
1. Health Care We Can Afford
2. Defend It (Abortion Care)
3. Public School Proud
4. Energy (Clean Version)
5. Billion-Dollar Race (feat. NC Supporter Choir)

And if we had to guess, our opponent Michael Whatley’s top five songs would probably be these:
1. (You) Don’t Need a Doctor
2. GROCERY BILL$$$
3. Slippery Like Big Oil
4. Presidential Puppet (feat. Donald Trump)
5. Big Bucks From Billionaire Buddies

No matter your favorite genre or top track for this year, our #1 artist for the year is YOU — voters. **_And to win this race against the MAGA Republican fundraising machine, we need you in harmony with us 365 days a year._**
**[The _bass line_ is this: Can you give what you can right now? Anything helps us meet our goal — and avoid any _treble_ fighting back against Washington Republicans.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2252?t=9&akid=125%2E124072%2EMftOwi)**
**[GIVE NOW](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2252?t=10&akid=125%2E124072%2EMftOwi)**
---
Thanks for being part of our favorite playlist,
– Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=1&akid=125%2E124072%2EMftOwi)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=125%2E124072%2EMftOwi)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=3&akid=125%2E124072%2EMftOwi)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=4&akid=125%2E124072%2EMftOwi)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=125%2E124072%2EMftOwi)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=125%2E124072%2EMftOwi)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=11&akid=125%2E124072%2EMftOwi)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Epstein Files Update!
body:
[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES DOJ FOR EPSTEIN RECORDS SUBPOENAED BY HOUSE
COMMITTEE

[IMAGE]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=36636&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL25ldy1xdWVzdGlvbnMtYWJvdXQtZmJpLWphbnVhcnktNi1waXBlLWJvbWItaW52ZXN0aWdhdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=45d41fffd72ee716ff908f281799654be3b92ea04edcb28e03d2ae155bc564b8]

The U.S. Department of Justice is sitting on information about Jeffrey
Epstein that the public should have.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=36620&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWhvdXNlLWVwc3RlaW4tc3VicG9lbmFzLWNvbXBsYWludC0wNDEyMy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=6651124b5d984e64f7c03880608de7bebfcfd55e09c4a91c1af6b02ad711517a]
against the Justice Department for records subpoenaed by the U.S.
House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform regarding Epstein,
the accused sex trafficker (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of
Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=36620&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWhvdXNlLWVwc3RlaW4tc3VicG9lbmFzLWNvbXBsYWludC0wNDEyMy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=6651124b5d984e64f7c03880608de7bebfcfd55e09c4a91c1af6b02ad711517a]
(No. 1:25-cv-04123 )).

The Justice Department should immediately release this information.
Americans deserve the truth. It’s time to end the leaks and the
guessing games.

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the Justice Department failed to respond to an August 22, 2025, FOIA
request for:

*
All records provided to the House Committee on Oversight and
Government Reform or any member thereof in response to the subpoena
transmitted to Attorney General Bondi on or about August 5, 2025.

*
All records relied upon during the preparation of any response to the
House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform subpoena
transmitted to Attorney General Bondi on or about August 5, 2025.

*
All records of communication between Attorney General Bondi or Deputy
Attorney General Blanche and any other individual or entity regarding
the Department’s response to the House Committee on Oversight and
Government Reform subpoena transmitted to Attorney General Bondi on or
about August 5, 2025.

In August 2025, James Comer (R-KY), chairman of the House Oversight
Committee, issued deposition subpoenas
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=36621&F=T&&hash=f779afdf8246567593c4fa3454a4697e7dde0ecc923bf590dd8cae66d2c7b3c6]
to former high-level officials including Bill and Hillary Clinton;
former U.S. Attorneys General William Barr, Alberto Gonzales, Jeff
Sessions, Loretta Lynch, Eric Holder and Merrick Garland; and former
FBI Directors Robert Mueller and James Comey — seeking testimony and
documents related to the investigation of Epstein. Additionally, a
subpoena was issued to the Justice Department for records related to
Epstein. For example, the subpoena cover letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=36622&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9vdmVyc2lnaHQuaG91c2UuZ292L3dwLWNvbnRlbnQvdXBsb2Fkcy8yMDI1LzA4LzIwMjUuMDguMDUtU3VicG9lbmEtQ292ZXItTGV0dGVycy5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=8b17aa2acdc8602c6db774253311751741d7010b1f680e50cd668904014ec3bf]
to Gonzales states:

On July 23, 2025, the Subcommittee on Federal Law Enforcement of the
Committee on Oversight and Government Reform (“Committee”)
unanimously voted to approve a motion directing the Committee to
authorize and issue a subpoena to you for a deposition. Your tenure as
U.S. Attorney General, from 2005 to late 2007, coincided with a time
period when the FBI investigated Jeffrey Epstein for sex crimes, an
Assistant U.S. Attorney in the Southern District of Florida prepared a
draft 60-count indictment of Mr. Epstein, and the U.S. Attorney’s
Office for the Southern District of Florida offered a plea bargain to
Mr. Epstein, leading to the signing of Mr. Epstein’s non-prosecution
agreement only one week after you left office. Pursuant to this
direction, please see the attached subpoena for you to appear at a
deposition on August 26, 2025.

On July 6, 2019, federal authorities arrested Mr. Jeffrey Epstein and
two days later an indictment was unsealed in the U.S. District Court
for the Southern District for New York charging him with sex
trafficking of minors and conspiracy to engage in sex trafficking of
minors. According to the indictment, Mr. Epstein sexually exploited
and abused dozens of minor girls at his homes in Manhattan, Palm
Beach, and other locations. Among other things, the indictment alleged
that Mr. Epstein enticed girls as young as 14 years old to engage in
sex acts with him in exchange for money. This was not the first time
that Mr. Epstein had been investigated for committing sex crimes. In
2008, he pled guilty in Florida state court to two prostitution
offenses, and, in exchange, he and his co-conspirators received
immunity from federal prosecution through a non-prosecution agreement
that was negotiated during your time as Attorney General.

We have been actively pursuing details of the Epstein case.

In October, we filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=36623&F=T&&hash=1f160495f40580e62107f36b8a6f5191d820a8a07818f2f5f209f644354b2466]
against the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) for records involving
any role Epstein might have played in connection with the agency, his
business dealings, travel, victim or witness information, and records
concerning his death.

In September, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=36089&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9qLWNvbW11bmljYXRpb25zLXdpdGgtYXhpb3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2aa6ae8546034db5938f9b71ca8b7c3b2292a55b711c36adfdda744baf68f84d]
the
Justice Department for communication the department had with the media
outlet Axios regarding the outlet’s “exclusives” on the release
of audio of then-President Joe Biden’s August 2023 interview with
then-Special Counsel Robert Hur regarding Biden’s handling of secret
documents and the July 2025 memo that states there is no Jeffrey
Epstein “client list.”

In a Judicial Watch FOIA lawsuit, a “joint status report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=36624&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZXBzdGVpbi1yZWNvcmRzLXBvc3NpYmxlLXJlbGVhc2UvXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=06f8be2d2be0735f1937774103edf4f52960cd31d1a122db3108b16088190e89
filed on July 7 in federal court reported that the Justice Department
and the FBI were continuing to search for and review records in
response to our FOIA lawsuit for records regarding Epstein. The
lawsuit requests any records on the identities of clients or
associates of Epstein. The Justice Department’s disclosure is at
odds with the leaked, unsigned and undated Justice Department/FBI memo
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=35616&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL21lZGlhLzE0MDcwMDEvZGw/aW5saW5lJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=805564b89b9de3b63a7154eca9cf68f7c0d73088102489da1dec1cdd26b511c3]
that suggests no
more Epstein records would be disclosed to the American public. The
memo was first disclosed late on July 6
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=35617&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXhpb3MuY29tLzIwMjUvMDcvMDcvamVmZnJleS1lcHN0ZWluLXN1aWNpZGUtY2xpZW50LWxpc3QtdHJ1bXAtYWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpb24/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=fa9f7a016f7f0247272d9c58a424005a28d4a5323460d8a8305c69add0c501ac].

Also in July, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=35639&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmJpLXJlY29yZHMtdmlyZ2luaWEtZ2l1ZmZyZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=2702ac15046638302743f991975b42a7d89c189d26cbb74323ab097de96d1351]
the
Justice Department for all interviews and other records provided to
the FBI by Epstein victim Virginia Louise Giuffre, who reportedly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=35625&F=T&&hash=3443bfa78b61f2c329ced639a3d16f3480dab4ccd197c059fc6d44c94f2a086c]
committed suicide on April 25, 2025.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR JACK SMITH’S EMAILS TARGETING DONALD TRUMP

We are working to find the communications between former Special
Counsel Jack Smith and the state and federal actors who took part in
the lawfare against President Donald Trump. The American people
deserve transparency about the about the abuses committed against
Trump and other Americans.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=36625&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWphY2stc21pdGgtZW1haWxzLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMzg0OS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e0c1b6540075a7ac8884db5912be78c315ab3db0c2ed744f5924a8c3ea67b3e8]
against the U.S. Department of Justice for Smith’s emails with
officials in Georgia, New York, and the White House, plus
congressional and law enforcement offices regarding his investigation
into then President-elect Donald Trump (Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S.
Department of Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=36625&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWphY2stc21pdGgtZW1haWxzLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMzg0OS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e0c1b6540075a7ac8884db5912be78c315ab3db0c2ed744f5924a8c3ea67b3e8]
(No. 1:25-cv-03849)).

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the Justice Department failed to respond to two FOIA requests. The
first, on November 13, 2024, asks for:

*
All emails of Special Counsel Jack Smith between November 5, 2024, and
November 13, 2024.

On November 21, 2024, we requested:

*
All communications of any current or former member of the Smith’s
office since November 1, 2022, regarding investigation into
President-elect Trump, including those with:

*
Any New York State governmental or law enforcement office

*
Fulton County District Attorney’s office or Georgia secretary of
State’s office

*
White House, Congressional or Senate office

*
Any federal law enforcement or government office

Smith reportedly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=36626&F=T&&hash=d8256c1a62f7a0b987c8ea559d874cfb673989ceed661424eead0a5e23d0ee10]
coordinated prosecutions of Trump with Manhattan District Attorney
Alvin Bragg, New York Attorney General Letitia James, and Fulton
County, Georgia, District Attorney Fani Willis. The House Judiciary
Committee recently subpoenaed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=36627&F=T&&hash=10e874831ee9222e70c81c0eecf0b46465604cdec4f36b986b09bd2c62832507]
Smith for a deposition about the federal prosecutions he brought
against Trump during the Biden administration.

We are a national leader in exposing the lawfare and abuse targeting
Trump and other American citizens.

In June 2025, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=35570&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29sbHVzaW9uLWRvY3MtamFjay1zbWl0aC1vcGVyYXRpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=67a47db75f1dc0c8c81a7c8bf7ab587ae8e4a5f6f20cc0f3c62837320fa7dc56]
Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes for her communications with Smith
(Judicial Watch v. Kristin Mayes and Arizona Department of Law
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=35555&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbWF5ZXMtc21pdGgtdHJ1bXAtY29tcGxhaW50LTAyMDY3NC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=21e9a3ac51b9cb50e69e91f003ca09d966b488bc15dda1b879c99f201983ff6a]
(CV 2025-020674).

In March 2025, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=34878&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWlzY29uZHVjdC1ieS1qYWNrLXNtaXRoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9c0f8e65071737ec6468eb1b53dd0de4c4bbb372bb0e9bae77f911ad41485721]
the Justice
Department for details of any investigations, inquiries, or referrals
concerning potential misconduct of any person working for Smith
(Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=34869&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWphY2stc21pdGhzLXRlYW0tY29tcGxhaW50LTAwODAxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=0974c21646e954394a1dab2db013a795537fa3d9abe230d6b3fce9b73f596e83]
(No. 1:25-cv-00801)).

Also in March, Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis was ordered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=34767&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYW50aS10cnVtcC1jb2xsdXNpb24tcmVjb3Jkcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=7775b31bdd527fd4a3ed272c2df8968e6febe2f5c00f8e5a753b9431d67c4bad]
to turn
over 212 pages of records to a state court judge. The court also
ordered Willis to detail how the records were found and the reason for
withholding them from the public. The records were belatedly found in
response to a Judicial Watch request and lawsuit for communications
with Smith and the House January 6 Committee (Judicial Watch Inc. v.
Fani Willis et al.
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=31606&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtd2lsbGlzLWphY2stc21pdGgtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwMjgwNS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=688508329e21ad3fd5d66d7b6b7b16c9328876a6b96289c9cabbaa143cb6d8eb]
(No. 24-CV-002805)).

NEW AIR MARSHAL ASSISTANT DIRECTOR HAS A QUESTIONABLE PAST

If you’re a frequent traveler you won’t be comforted by personnel
moves in the Federal Air Marshall Service, as our Corruption
Chronicles blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=36619&F=T&&hash=c29ceaeb38f2745a1e889cccb803b0f8611e693a026e440cf99c6865ab4263e9].

In the latest controversy to rock the Federal Air Marshal Service
(FAMS), an agency veteran, who created a wasteful VIP Congressional
Concierge and oversaw a surveillance program that put
Americans—including Director of National Intelligence Tulsi
Gabbard—with opposing political views on a terror watchlist, has
been promoted to assistant director. His name is Serge V. Potapov, and
he has risen through the ranks at FAMS despite playing a key role in
highly questionable programs and a documented history of misconduct
that put him at the center of various investigations over the years,
according to agency documents reviewed by Judicial Watch. Now Potapov,
a former U.S. Marine who recently served as a counselor to Homeland
Security Secretary Kristi Noem, is second in command at FAMS which
operates under the Transportation Security Administration (TSA),
created after 9/11 to prevent another terrorist attack. Both agencies
function under the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) and have been
plagued by controversy and mismanagement that has left the nation
vulnerable from a security standpoint, say multiple DHS sources
interviewed by Judicial Watch over the years.

FAMS in particular has experienced tremendous instability with four
different directors
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=30097&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGhzLXJlcGxhY2VzLWFpci1tYXJzaGFsLWRpcmVjdG9yLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=89247dcacef2bf6efafc36dc5a257a1c658fce4437178d1543528cc10d2fb5f3]
in
around as many years and flagrant mismanagement that includes
controversial deployments of the uniquely skilled law enforcement
officers to the Mexican border to perform duties unrelated to
transportation, such as welfare checks, hospital watch and
chauffeuring illegal immigrants. TSA has admitted it does not know the
operational impact
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=36628&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHNhLW1leGljYW4tYm9yZGVyLWFpci1tYXJzaGFsL110aGF0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3036982ad3d40f5c1c74b3c5e19f38c6725c1f1fc51993bdc0a830e671e285bd
the air marshal border deployments had on aviation security. During
the chaos last year FAMS named a deputy director, Pauline (Polly)
Hanson, with a shady history that includes being investigated for
fraud and conflict of interest as chief of the Amtrak Police, a
federal law enforcement agency of about 500 charged with protecting
the nation’s railroad system. Hanson’s appointment rattled many
inside FAMS and raised questions about the criteria to qualify for the
top-secret clearance required for the position. Hanson stepped down
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=33005&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcG9saWNlLWNoaWVmLWludmVzdGlnYXRlZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b584dd83863fff5e7645017bf9c5ae0bd261f93a6cf6110caf8ae9fd776b5eac]
after a few
weeks on the job because Judicial Watch exposed her record, which was
brought to our attention by the Air Marshal National Council, the
union that represents thousands of agents nationwide and has uncovered
a multitude of problems at the agency in recent years.

Now, the union is battling against another highly questionable figure
quietly elevated to assistant director at the ailing agency. As of
this week Potapov is Assistant Administrator at FAMS despite a lengthy
history of wrongdoing. His misconduct began at the Federal Air Marshal
Training Center in New Jersey where he simulated shooting a female
instructor in the head, kicked her during training, pulled her hair
and told women “You don’t belong here,” according to documents
provided to Judicial Watch by the Air Marshal National Council.
Potapov was suspended and involuntarily transferred to the
Philadelphia Field Office before being promoted to help lead the
Insider Threat Unit, which got blasted in a DHS audit for its many
failures during his leadership. An agency insider told Judicial Watch
Potapov helped build a unit later condemned as structurally broken.
Yet in 2020 he was promoted to Assistant Special Agent in Charge in
Washington D.C. where he helped create a special VIP Congressional
Concierge
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=28364&F=T&&hash=315323fa3594e4eafb004f5c768f1b1c47a1ca1e68055e874f596f554a84d211]
that pulled air marshals off high-risk flights so members of Congress
could get extra protection on flights that did not meet the threat
criteria, usually determined by the FBI, for air marshals. In 2021
Judicial Watch exposed the program, reporting that FAMS were yanked
from a high-risk flight so California Congresswoman Maxine Waters
could have extra security during a trip to Minnesota though she was
already covered by a four-man detail consisting of two Capitol Police
officers and two Secret Service agents. The story led to the
program’s elimination, DHS sources confirmed.

After launching the outrageous VIP Congressional Concierge, Potapov
was promoted to executive director of flight operations, which oversaw
another scandal-plagued program called Quiet Skies that secretly
surveilled Americans on flights in the name of preventing terrorism.
Hundreds of Americans, including then Hawaii Congresswoman Gabbard,
were put on a watchlist and deemed threats to national security for
holding political views against the Biden administration. In fact,
Gabbard was added to the Quiet Skies program on July 23, 2024, one day
after she criticized the Biden administration in an interview. The
Trump administration ended the Quiet Skies program over the summer and
in the fall a Senate Homeland Security committee
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78158&L=36629&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaHNnYWMuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi93cC1jb250ZW50L3VwbG9hZHMvT3BlbmluZy1TdGF0ZW1lbnQtUGF1bC0yMDI1LTA5LTMwLnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=72f99163f4ad70287654ce8ccb30ef9d7d622a426c80cc920f4e6b0493d21e1d]
confirmed the Biden administration weaponized the watch list against
everyday Americans, deeming them threats to national security simply
for holding opposing political views. As Executive Director of Flight
Operations in 2023, Potapov oversaw Quiet Skies and all global FAMS
deployments, making him a strange choice to help lead the agency.

In an internal memo announcing Potapov as his number two guy, FAMS
Director Brian C. Belcher fails to mention his sordid past, instead
promoting him as a 23-year FAMS veteran who has demonstrated
“exceptional leadership and dedication to our mission of
safeguarding the nation’s transportation system.” Belcher also
praises Potapov’s expertise and commitment to operational excellence
that make him uniquely qualified to serve in this leadership position.
The reality is much different, says David Londo, president of the Air
Marshal National Council, who says many inside the agency are
outraged. “His career provides a clear example of systemic
breakdowns in federal accountability, leadership vetting, and taxpayer
stewardship,” Londo said, pointing to Potapov’s court-confirmed
misconduct, failures documented in federal audits, warnings from a
congressional investigative unit and widespread internal concerns.

Until next week,

clean_body: [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH SUES DOJ FOR EPSTEIN RECORDS SUBPOENAED BY HOUSE COMMITTEE [IMAGE] [] The U.S. Department of Justice is sitting on information about Jeffrey Epstein that the public should have. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the Justice Department for records subpoenaed by the U.S. House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform regarding Epstein, the accused sex trafficker (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:25-cv-04123 )). The Justice Department should immediately release this information. Americans deserve the truth. It’s time to end the leaks and the guessing games. We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Justice Department failed to respond to an August 22, 2025, FOIA request for: All records provided to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform or any member thereof in response to the subpoena transmitted to Attorney General Bondi on or about August 5, 2025. All records relied upon during the preparation of any response to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform subpoena transmitted to Attorney General Bondi on or about August 5, 2025. All records of communication between Attorney General Bondi or Deputy Attorney General Blanche and any other individual or entity regarding the Department’s response to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform subpoena transmitted to Attorney General Bondi on or about August 5, 2025. In August 2025, James Comer (R-KY), chairman of the House Oversight Committee, issued deposition subpoenas [] to former high-level officials including Bill and Hillary Clinton; former U.S. Attorneys General William Barr, Alberto Gonzales, Jeff Sessions, Loretta Lynch, Eric Holder and Merrick Garland; and former FBI Directors Robert Mueller and James Comey — seeking testimony and documents related to the investigation of Epstein. Additionally, a subpoena was issued to the Justice Department for records related to Epstein. For example, the subpoena cover letter [] to Gonzales states: On July 23, 2025, the Subcommittee on Federal Law Enforcement of the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform (“Committee”) unanimously voted to approve a motion directing the Committee to authorize and issue a subpoena to you for a deposition. Your tenure as U.S. Attorney General, from 2005 to late 2007, coincided with a time period when the FBI investigated Jeffrey Epstein for sex crimes, an Assistant U.S. Attorney in the Southern District of Florida prepared a draft 60-count indictment of Mr. Epstein, and the U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Southern District of Florida offered a plea bargain to Mr. Epstein, leading to the signing of Mr. Epstein’s non-prosecution agreement only one week after you left office. Pursuant to this direction, please see the attached subpoena for you to appear at a deposition on August 26, 2025. On July 6, 2019, federal authorities arrested Mr. Jeffrey Epstein and two days later an indictment was unsealed in the U.S. District Court for the Southern District for New York charging him with sex trafficking of minors and conspiracy to engage in sex trafficking of minors. According to the indictment, Mr. Epstein sexually exploited and abused dozens of minor girls at his homes in Manhattan, Palm Beach, and other locations. Among other things, the indictment alleged that Mr. Epstein enticed girls as young as 14 years old to engage in sex acts with him in exchange for money. This was not the first time that Mr. Epstein had been investigated for committing sex crimes. In 2008, he pled guilty in Florida state court to two prostitution offenses, and, in exchange, he and his co-conspirators received immunity from federal prosecution through a non-prosecution agreement that was negotiated during your time as Attorney General. We have been actively pursuing details of the Epstein case. In October, we filed a FOIA lawsuit [] against the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) for records involving any role Epstein might have played in connection with the agency, his business dealings, travel, victim or witness information, and records concerning his death. In September, we sued [] the Justice Department for communication the department had with the media outlet Axios regarding the outlet’s “exclusives” on the release of audio of then-President Joe Biden’s August 2023 interview with then-Special Counsel Robert Hur regarding Biden’s handling of secret documents and the July 2025 memo that states there is no Jeffrey Epstein “client list.” In a Judicial Watch FOIA lawsuit, a “joint status report [ filed on July 7 in federal court reported that the Justice Department and the FBI were continuing to search for and review records in response to our FOIA lawsuit for records regarding Epstein. The lawsuit requests any records on the identities of clients or associates of Epstein. The Justice Department’s disclosure is at odds with the leaked, unsigned and undated Justice Department/FBI memo [] that suggests no more Epstein records would be disclosed to the American public. The memo was first disclosed late on July 6 []. Also in July, we sued [] the Justice Department for all interviews and other records provided to the FBI by Epstein victim Virginia Louise Giuffre, who reportedly [] committed suicide on April 25, 2025. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR JACK SMITH’S EMAILS TARGETING DONALD TRUMP We are working to find the communications between former Special Counsel Jack Smith and the state and federal actors who took part in the lawfare against President Donald Trump. The American people deserve transparency about the about the abuses committed against Trump and other Americans. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Justice for Smith’s emails with officials in Georgia, New York, and the White House, plus congressional and law enforcement offices regarding his investigation into then President-elect Donald Trump (Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:25-cv-03849)). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Justice Department failed to respond to two FOIA requests. The first, on November 13, 2024, asks for: All emails of Special Counsel Jack Smith between November 5, 2024, and November 13, 2024. On November 21, 2024, we requested: All communications of any current or former member of the Smith’s office since November 1, 2022, regarding investigation into President-elect Trump, including those with: Any New York State governmental or law enforcement office Fulton County District Attorney’s office or Georgia secretary of State’s office White House, Congressional or Senate office * Any federal law enforcement or government office Smith reportedly [] coordinated prosecutions of Trump with Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg, New York Attorney General Letitia James, and Fulton County, Georgia, District Attorney Fani Willis. The House Judiciary Committee recently subpoenaed [] Smith for a deposition about the federal prosecutions he brought against Trump during the Biden administration. We are a national leader in exposing the lawfare and abuse targeting Trump and other American citizens. In June 2025, we sued [] Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes for her communications with Smith (Judicial Watch v. Kristin Mayes and Arizona Department of Law [] (CV 2025-020674). In March 2025, we sued [] the Justice Department for details of any investigations, inquiries, or referrals concerning potential misconduct of any person working for Smith (Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:25-cv-00801)). Also in March, Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis was ordered [] to turn over 212 pages of records to a state court judge. The court also ordered Willis to detail how the records were found and the reason for withholding them from the public. The records were belatedly found in response to a Judicial Watch request and lawsuit for communications with Smith and the House January 6 Committee (Judicial Watch Inc. v. Fani Willis et al. [] (No. 24-CV-002805)). NEW AIR MARSHAL ASSISTANT DIRECTOR HAS A QUESTIONABLE PAST If you’re a frequent traveler you won’t be comforted by personnel moves in the Federal Air Marshall Service, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. In the latest controversy to rock the Federal Air Marshal Service (FAMS), an agency veteran, who created a wasteful VIP Congressional Concierge and oversaw a surveillance program that put Americans—including Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard—with opposing political views on a terror watchlist, has been promoted to assistant director. His name is Serge V. Potapov, and he has risen through the ranks at FAMS despite playing a key role in highly questionable programs and a documented history of misconduct that put him at the center of various investigations over the years, according to agency documents reviewed by Judicial Watch. Now Potapov, a former U.S. Marine who recently served as a counselor to Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem, is second in command at FAMS which operates under the Transportation Security Administration (TSA), created after 9/11 to prevent another terrorist attack. Both agencies function under the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) and have been plagued by controversy and mismanagement that has left the nation vulnerable from a security standpoint, say multiple DHS sources interviewed by Judicial Watch over the years. FAMS in particular has experienced tremendous instability with four different directors [] in around as many years and flagrant mismanagement that includes controversial deployments of the uniquely skilled law enforcement officers to the Mexican border to perform duties unrelated to transportation, such as welfare checks, hospital watch and chauffeuring illegal immigrants. TSA has admitted it does not know the operational impact [ the air marshal border deployments had on aviation security. During the chaos last year FAMS named a deputy director, Pauline (Polly) Hanson, with a shady history that includes being investigated for fraud and conflict of interest as chief of the Amtrak Police, a federal law enforcement agency of about 500 charged with protecting the nation’s railroad system. Hanson’s appointment rattled many inside FAMS and raised questions about the criteria to qualify for the top-secret clearance required for the position. Hanson stepped down [] after a few weeks on the job because Judicial Watch exposed her record, which was brought to our attention by the Air Marshal National Council, the union that represents thousands of agents nationwide and has uncovered a multitude of problems at the agency in recent years. Now, the union is battling against another highly questionable figure quietly elevated to assistant director at the ailing agency. As of this week Potapov is Assistant Administrator at FAMS despite a lengthy history of wrongdoing. His misconduct began at the Federal Air Marshal Training Center in New Jersey where he simulated shooting a female instructor in the head, kicked her during training, pulled her hair and told women “You don’t belong here,” according to documents provided to Judicial Watch by the Air Marshal National Council. Potapov was suspended and involuntarily transferred to the Philadelphia Field Office before being promoted to help lead the Insider Threat Unit, which got blasted in a DHS audit for its many failures during his leadership. An agency insider told Judicial Watch Potapov helped build a unit later condemned as structurally broken. Yet in 2020 he was promoted to Assistant Special Agent in Charge in Washington D.C. where he helped create a special VIP Congressional Concierge [] that pulled air marshals off high-risk flights so members of Congress could get extra protection on flights that did not meet the threat criteria, usually determined by the FBI, for air marshals. In 2021 Judicial Watch exposed the program, reporting that FAMS were yanked from a high-risk flight so California Congresswoman Maxine Waters could have extra security during a trip to Minnesota though she was already covered by a four-man detail consisting of two Capitol Police officers and two Secret Service agents. The story led to the program’s elimination, DHS sources confirmed. After launching the outrageous VIP Congressional Concierge, Potapov was promoted to executive director of flight operations, which oversaw another scandal-plagued program called Quiet Skies that secretly surveilled Americans on flights in the name of preventing terrorism. Hundreds of Americans, including then Hawaii Congresswoman Gabbard, were put on a watchlist and deemed threats to national security for holding political views against the Biden administration. In fact, Gabbard was added to the Quiet Skies program on July 23, 2024, one day after she criticized the Biden administration in an interview. The Trump administration ended the Quiet Skies program over the summer and in the fall a Senate Homeland Security committee [] confirmed the Biden administration weaponized the watch list against everyday Americans, deeming them threats to national security simply for holding opposing political views. As Executive Director of Flight Operations in 2023, Potapov oversaw Quiet Skies and all global FAMS deployments, making him a strange choice to help lead the agency. In an internal memo announcing Potapov as his number two guy, FAMS Director Brian C. Belcher fails to mention his sordid past, instead promoting him as a 23-year FAMS veteran who has demonstrated “exceptional leadership and dedication to our mission of safeguarding the nation’s transportation system.” Belcher also praises Potapov’s expertise and commitment to operational excellence that make him uniquely qualified to serve in this leadership position. The reality is much different, says David Londo, president of the Air Marshal National Council, who says many inside the agency are outraged. “His career provides a clear example of systemic breakdowns in federal accountability, leadership vetting, and taxpayer stewardship,” Londo said, pointing to Potapov’s court-confirmed misconduct, failures documented in federal audits, warnings from a congressional investigative unit and widespread internal concerns. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

name: Dem Redistricting
subject: Trump doesn’t think we have the guts to punch him in the nose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado
body:
They are beating the living hell out of us and MAGA is betting that we won’t fight back.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XLlc6ed2gSMoom_DR290WDGZMdEpmbwy3Ar-AX_CHeUmtlDvlS-waLU7fmfNC6OLZU9JjPTEP-8sn2AHIoJ_9HvwhMHUUe872YIFqKL-rN0ECWNieR8S7fg-CMxDuaYPf04wAGW2PWhWueL7LcR2pkzy5gIPZpKx_ytBsA9g4P4QKVoSQTJHCcL6vgGaFWWA9Uuz6hT97JuMuuUA2flvqS15ONrXyR3A&c=owHCHndsj6pM8Z379x-G9MKKyoerJ4heR5NQiqb8fJzmhhzzMpn9lA==&ch=FfRz8pPhH0Jt9Xeor_OD4-3nb45B69rIZJTbu4O2i0lgeaFeA-SjxA==)
---
Peter,
The last year of the Trump presidency has been nothing short of a full blown assault.
MAGA has thrown out the rule book and is beating the living hell out of us.
The nation is turning on them but they don't care, they aren't worried about public opinion. Rather than face the music at the polls next November they will circumvent the voters, redistrict, and enshrine one party rule.
We could stop them but so far we haven't.
There are more congressional seats in blue states than there are in red states. If Republicans redistricted every state they control (which they are in the process of doing) and we redistricted every one of our states - their plan would backfire.
But Trump is betting that we won't have the guts to fight back and punch him in the nose.
California and Virginia showed him otherwise with their redistricts. Now Colorado is joining them with the announcement of Fair Fight Colorado's redistricting ballot measure that will turn Colorado bluer and we're ready to throw a knockout punch.
[Can you please make a contribution to our ballot measure committee to help Fair Fight Colorado get new maps on the ballot? Our average donation is around $30. Many give more. Some give less. The amount doesn't matter; just donate what you can because it all adds up.](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XLlc6ed2gSMoom_DR290WDGZMdEpmbwy3Ar-AX_CHeUmtlDvlS-waLU7fmfNC6OLv6zQM0syMcENOJ6PiHY9e2k2sH7VUetkavirW56yc9tmNVfHxz84nWN4AH6JOnbIGsyGMbQSQK7UlAUeaRzZ8vuAvmSf33zW1_gusoLRIvvzWqX0Bo0AiJhhquMD48FeCYKF_AinP3zT-W40nsenK3qbHssj5_wKqw16N0Os17o=&c=owHCHndsj6pM8Z379x-G9MKKyoerJ4heR5NQiqb8fJzmhhzzMpn9lA==&ch=FfRz8pPhH0Jt9Xeor_OD4-3nb45B69rIZJTbu4O2i0lgeaFeA-SjxA==)

clean_body: They are beating the living hell out of us and MAGA is betting that we won’t fight back. | | | | | == Peter, The last year of the Trump presidency has been nothing short of a full blown assault. MAGA has thrown out the rule book and is beating the living hell out of us. The nation is turning on them but they don't care, they aren't worried about public opinion. Rather than face the music at the polls next November they will circumvent the voters, redistrict, and enshrine one party rule. We could stop them but so far we haven't. There are more congressional seats in blue states than there are in red states. If Republicans redistricted every state they control (which they are in the process of doing) and we redistricted every one of our states - their plan would backfire. But Trump is betting that we won't have the guts to fight back and punch him in the nose. California and Virginia showed him otherwise with their redistricts. Now Colorado is joining them with the announcement of Fair Fight Colorado's redistricting ballot measure that will turn Colorado bluer and we're ready to throw a knockout punch. == If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == We are going to make Trump regret ever picking this fight. -- Fair Fight Colorado | | | | == | | == | Donate by mail: Fair Fight Colorado == == | Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado. I wanted to share a quick personal note before you log off tonight. **I come from a family that knows the promise of this country firsthand – where an immigrant family like mine can work hard to achieve the American Dream.** Growing up, every night at the dinner table, my father would tell me: “Think of the greatness of this country. Whatever you do, make sure this country is there for the next families who need it.” That message has defined my life. So, as we see constant cruelty and chaos coming out of Donald Trump’s White House, I couldn't sit quietly by. With millions of Americans set to lose essential food benefits thanks to Trump’s cruel policies, _I introduced the legislation to repeal the Republican SNAP cuts._ And when Trump sent ICE to round up immigrant families and trample on our Constitution, _I took the fight directly to them, even getting the police called on me for trying to conduct basic oversight of an ICE facility. _ **Meanwhile, Senate Republicans are cheering on Trump’s cruelty and chaos – and doing _nothing_ to defend working families and our basic Constitutional rights. ** [**_So, I’m running to take back the Senate and put an end to Trump’s unchecked power in DC. I’m ready to win this fight, but I need you with me. clean_body: = These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer, you can . = Hi Peter, it’s Raja Krishnamoorthi. I wanted to share a quick personal note before you log off tonight. I come from a family that knows the promise of this country firsthand – where an immigrant family like mine can work hard to achieve the American Dream. Growing up, every night at the dinner table, my father would tell me: “Think of the greatness of this country. Whatever you do, make sure this country is there for the next families who need it.” That message has defined my life. So, as we see constant cruelty and chaos coming out of Donald Trump’s White House, I couldn't sit quietly by. With millions of Americans set to lose essential food benefits thanks to Trump’s cruel policies, I introduced the legislation to repeal the Republican SNAP cuts. And when Trump sent ICE to round up immigrant families and trample on our Constitution, I took the fight directly to them, even getting the police called on me for trying to conduct basic oversight of an ICE facility. Meanwhile, Senate Republicans are cheering on Trump’s cruelty and chaos – and doing nothing to defend working families and our basic Constitutional rights. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Peter. Raja | Democrat Raja Krishnamoorthi is running for Senate in Illinois to fight back against Donald Trump and the far-right MAGA movement, protect critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, and rebuild the middle class. But Republicans will spend MILLIONS to flip this seat red. We need every single person reading this email to do their part to fight back against Trump and Flip the Senate Majority BLUE. = | | = | = These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, click here. If you'd prefer, you can . If you'd like to donate, =. subject: I just spoke with President Trump…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor
body:
What I’m about to share is that important.
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=05e9d50e481b4adf87625a312207afd6&_e=p4ZJoni41uKlj8Tm7f4N0UWEda1Cn9SIhjElpvonrl7G8xtkUo9ZAhLo1BTz9DijVGbTFSeni2y9vZZQvqhonnQsHxRxYzPu_Z7b_beODZcF12nI5wx1PNbG3b58ZE-8wMlTPERm20d01YkP1QEKZxk7H1qcp4XtgAgKZahrnbvEG4ptnMGym7xvn-qDwT52XaC58reH_h1-IPtTvhzEQ_6n7I_J-4RThUYQImQ9XL2h-EtLo_wJzg6F8V5Eumk7N22R0Rhqvy12s8TIcRQ-GtYVrusNxemLvtZgDDef7cUxtmNTquOOiznI47mX0ZaoEz5BENljPQLXfd1PMYA92kEo3Slj44W-Dp3Yfrd6lvnBsiW7AdCO-JUX8iKDugJHGHyRPaEKm9spc1p4ZkYpp2cpjtjSsW2zAlFjCa4vJszMP6hNjndiDsD_Lo947AWvMz2oydNjkvqJ2DR8sfzolHCsm80ombbdqQ4HenhX-9IQQfFwJxWm990H862svVORxBYSUdMimlykMKQqz2DYXjzxAHwXCi6paxwj3Ep7i3zpvatVWyWG-EyZZ1CVyjvzaym_iSFToBjhI3o3VYDp94YgTSa8TjlNExdrL96E73_wYDBqipkXr4azMDyKulT8)

Friend,
---
What I’m about to tell you is of grave importance – _in fact, it’s so vital that I just spoke to President Trump _directly_ about it_ – so I hope you’ll read every word.
---
After sweeping Republican victories last November, most Americans _expected_ that the corrupt Deep State that weaponized our government to target President Trump and his allies would be dismantled forever.
---
**_But unfortunately, the Deep State is still alive and well in America!_**
---
**That’s why Deep State operatives colluded with House Democrats – led by Trump impeachment architect Jamie Raskin – to try to BLOCK my provision to prevent the FBI from secretly conducting investigations against federal candidates in order to interfere in elections!**
---
However, I refused to back down – and after speaking to President Trump, he gave my provision his full support, ensuring that it will officially become the law of the land!
---
_Why am I making such a big deal about this?_
---
Under Barack Obama, the FBI was weaponized by James Comey to conduct an illegal, partisan witch hunt against President Trump in an attempt to interfere in the 2016 presidential election and strip _YOU_ of your right to elect the candidate of your choice.
---
Under Joe Biden, the FBI was once again weaponized by Democrats and the Deep State to SPY on Republican members of Congress as part of the sweeping Arctic Frost wiretapping scandal!
---
**Stopping any future weaponization of the FBI needed to be a priority for our House GOP majority – and my provision will ensure the FBI is NEVER secretly weaponized by the Deep State against Republicans ever again.**
---
That’s why Democrats and the Deep State were so determined to stop it at any cost!
---
At the end of the day, this would be a significant legislative win delivered against the illegal weaponization of the Deep State — but of course, there’s much more work to do.
---
You can rest assured, Friend...
---
_I won’t rest until we’ve delivered _FULL_ accountability and multiple legislative fixes to arguably the biggest illegal corruption and government weaponization issue of all time. _
---
There’s no excuse for not getting this done, Friend.
---
**__The Deep State must be FULLY dismantled if America is to survive!__**
---
I’ve been leading the battle against the Deep State for years now.
---
**Through tough questioning in a March 2017 intelligence hearing, I was the first to expose the illegal cover-up by Comey and the Deep State of their political weaponization of intelligence agencies in our elections.**
---
That forced Comey to admit _under oath_ that he ignored proper protocol regarding the notification of Congress when he launched his illegal witch hunt targeting President Trump.
---
Ever since that day, I’ve been taking the offensive against these Leftist tyrants to ensure such a despicable abuse of power _NEVER_ happens again.
---
_**I may be running for Governor of New York, but I’m still a member of Congress – and as long as I’m here, I’m going to take my job, and _my oath to the people_ , seriously.**_
---
If that makes headlines or creates enemies, I don’t care: I will **ALWAYS** do everything in my power to take the fight to the Deep State and put America First!
---
But to win this battle and return power to the American people once and for all, I’m counting on support from generous America First conservatives like _YOU_.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help me continue fighting to DISMANTLE the Deep State and END the weaponization of government in both New York and Washington D.C. – _and help unlock a 600% MATCH_.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=05e9d50e481b4adf87625a312207afd6&_e=p4ZJoni41uKlj8Tm7f4N0UWEda1Cn9SIhjElpvonrl7G8xtkUo9ZAhLo1BTz9DijVGbTFSeni2y9vZZQvqhonnQsHxRxYzPu_Z7b_beODZcF12nI5wx1PNbG3b58ZE-8wMlTPERm20d01YkP1QEKZxk7H1qcp4XtgAgKZahrnbvEG4ptnMGym7xvn-qDwT52XaC58reH_h1-IPtTvhzEQ0wF-XRZAgN6vrI4XMTngWCmoHgT2kUKWTTw0UsRMUgurdLCg9X2gYEzh3megknS3uwH4yDan69h97ofslZDjL5nAcKY0pbAJjccQq0ybkxqkdArNgkxKXzLGDbmt47beaNiFRCbN21NqapMDwoy8EU0KG0_U6QQexTtYPfrBbsaszWmyQrmss9COUpTx9Pc6QrJ-JCqCBSG0IJyjDSI2vV2DxSviPgQ67YkfEdNoa7kbyEcZ2dOUvHCJ9RLzXHC_6BjF2vwrnnwlMHXgw3xRrVx7mB690GCTOPaYsj2BsA_4NC9Hzl7jvGrTrykSg4wToe3SKtKX-M371l-knaFwEeyiT99PnScGAiUWgORCBo-tvX-Ks7aEzfla1CSSOljMTEwtXq-qngdUKC-nRHnasc_tNWmhBgfpx8RvT5y74pF)

clean_body: What I’m about to share is that important. | Friend, What I’m about to tell you is of grave importance – in fact, it’s so vital that I just spoke to President Trump directly about it – so I hope you’ll read every word. After sweeping Republican victories last November, most Americans expected that the corrupt Deep State that weaponized our government to target President Trump and his allies would be dismantled forever. But unfortunately, the Deep State is still alive and well in America! That’s why Deep State operatives colluded with House Democrats – led by Trump impeachment architect Jamie Raskin – to try to BLOCK my provision to prevent the FBI from secretly conducting investigations against federal candidates in order to interfere in elections! However, I refused to back down – and after speaking to President Trump, he gave my provision his full support, ensuring that it will officially become the law of the land! Why am I making such a big deal about this? Under Barack Obama, the FBI was weaponized by James Comey to conduct an illegal, partisan witch hunt against President Trump in an attempt to interfere in the 2016 presidential election and strip YOU of your right to elect the candidate of your choice. Under Joe Biden, the FBI was once again weaponized by Democrats and the Deep State to SPY on Republican members of Congress as part of the sweeping Arctic Frost wiretapping scandal! Stopping any future weaponization of the FBI needed to be a priority for our House GOP majority – and my provision will ensure the FBI is NEVER secretly weaponized by the Deep State against Republicans ever again. That’s why Democrats and the Deep State were so determined to stop it at any cost! At the end of the day, this would be a significant legislative win delivered against the illegal weaponization of the Deep State — but of course, there’s much more work to do. You can rest assured, Friend... I won’t rest until we’ve delivered FULL accountability and multiple legislative fixes to arguably the biggest illegal corruption and government weaponization issue of all time. There’s no excuse for not getting this done, Friend. The Deep State must be FULLY dismantled if America is to survive! I’ve been leading the battle against the Deep State for years now. Through tough questioning in a March 2017 intelligence hearing, I was the first to expose the illegal cover-up by Comey and the Deep State of their political weaponization of intelligence agencies in our elections. That forced Comey to admit under oath that he ignored proper protocol regarding the notification of Congress when he launched his illegal witch hunt targeting President Trump. Ever since that day, I’ve been taking the offensive against these Leftist tyrants to ensure such a despicable abuse of power NEVER happens again. I may be running for Governor of New York, but I’m still a member of Congress – and as long as I’m here, I’m going to take my job, and my oath to the people , seriously. If that makes headlines or creates enemies, I don’t care: I will ALWAYS do everything in my power to take the fight to the Deep State and put America First! But to win this battle and return power to the American people once and for all, I’m counting on support from generous America First conservatives like YOU. Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

Patriot,

The family is under attack in America. Especially fatherhood.

And it’s about to get a lot worse.

**1 in 4 kids are growing up without a father.** We replaced fathers with Big Government, and the consequences are destroying the family and degrading our culture.
* Between **70% and 85% of the prison population** grew up without dads.
* **71% of pregnant teenagers** come from fatherless homes.
* **85% of children with behavioral disorders** are from fatherless homes.

Fatherlessness is an urgent and dire threat to America.

How did we get here?

The radical left is deliberately undermining the family because it’s the final safeguard that stands in the way of Marxism. If you don’t believe me, think about this: the Democratic Socialists of America–who rejoice over extremists like the incoming Mayor of New York City–explicitly say they want the abolition of the traditional family.

And check out these headlines from the legacy media:
_"Are Fathers Necessary?" asks The Atlantic magazine._

_"#EndFathersDay" demands the Los Angeles Times._

_"Moms might have penises. Dads might wear dresses." opines CNN._ _When the family is gone, the only thing left is the state_.

Here’s the good news:

The mainstream media is dying. Alternative outlets are on the rise. And it may be our greatest hope to win back our culture. **This is how you can help us fight for dads across America and instill our American values:**

**I am emailing you with an urgent request to support Dad Saves America.**

Dad Saves America is a movement of dads and could-be dads who embrace our heroic calling to raise a new generation ready to thrive in a free society and be champions of Western Civilization. As a project of Emergent Order Foundation, a pro-liberty nonprofit organization, your support is tax-deductible.

[Can you help me raise $24,000 in the next 48 hours to create alternative media in support of fatherhood and American values? Please click here or below to donate today. ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-g/s4oc8929425)
[**Donate**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-g/s3jbc3c1ec6)
Why Dad Saves America?

Our country desperately needs independent voices that aren’t NPR, Disney, and other woke media companies. As a non-profit organization, we are only concerned with serving our mission to be a clear, strong, trusted voice speaking out to save America and Western Civilization.

Dad Saves America has over 450,000 subscribers and 42 million views!

Our content reaches millions to inspire them to become fathers or to become better fathers, which is needed to save our nation.

[You can help Dad Saves America and Emergent Order Foundation FIGHT for dads, promote the values of liberty, show kids an alternative to victimhood culture by clicking here to donate $10, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount >>>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-g/ser10290b65)
[**Donate $10**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-g/sbnb9a73121)

[**Donate $35**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-g/sasfc24360f)

[**Donate $50**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-g/s8p7791ddac)

[**Donate $100**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-g/s0gb00b79ff)

[**Donate $250**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-g/s1r43a04ff9)

[**Donate $500**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-g/s3ue6f2f6ae)

[**Donate $1000**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-g/sdi16f40aa2)

[**Donate Any Other Amount**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-g/s0o2cbbd6c3)
We are fighting a war with the cultural epidemic of victimhood and exposing the radicals who wish to eliminate the role of masculinity and fathers from our country.

By supporting Dad Saves America, you are standing up for:
* Personal responsibility
* The defense of the nuclear family from cultural Marxism and toxic woke ideology
* Liberty, free speech, and discourse
* The hearts and minds of young men who are desperate for role models that can inspire them to build families, take heroic action, and save our country

This is not a fight that can wait.

As you are reading this, the enemies of the nuclear family, America, and our values are mobilizing to destroy the role of fatherhood and masculinity once and for all.

I am calling upon you to take action by making the most generous donation you can afford to make today. [Please click here to make a gift of $10, $35, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or any amount >>>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-g/sfq7f7d9f97)

Please join us today, Patriot. I am counting on your help to reach our $24,000 goal in the next 48 hours.

We have a country to save. Let’s get to work, NOW.

John Papola
Co-Founder & CEO, Emergent Order Foundation
